title: Socializing & Routine
description: Casual, peer-to-peer interactions where the tone is relaxed and direct. Focuses on daily habits, meeting friends, and expressing current actions.

sentence.zh: 我正在圖書館看書。
sentence.py: Wǒ zhèngzài túshūguǎn kànshū.
sentence.en: I am currently reading a book in the library.

sentence.zh: 你週末打算做什麼？
sentence.py: Nǐ zhōumò dǎsuàn zuò shénme?
sentence.en: What do you plan to do this weekend?

vocab.definition: to make an appointment; to invite

sentence.zh: 我想約你星期六一起吃午餐。
sentence.py: Wǒ xiǎng yuē nǐ xīngqíliù yīqǐ chī wǔcān.
sentence.en: I want to invite you to have lunch together on Saturday.

sentence.zh: 最近工作真的很忙。
sentence.py: Zuìjìn gōngzuò zhēnde hěn máng.
sentence.en: Work has been really busy lately.

sentence.zh: 你下午有空嗎？
sentence.py: Nǐ xiàwǔ yǒu kòng ma?
sentence.en: Are you free this afternoon?

sentence.zh: 我們邊喝咖啡邊聊天吧。
sentence.py: Wǒmen biān hē kāfēi biān liáotiān ba.
sentence.en: Let's chat while drinking coffee.

sentence.zh: 今晚有個老同學的聚會。
sentence.py: JīnWǎn yǒu ge lǎo tóngxué de jùhuì.
sentence.en: There is a gathering of old classmates tonight.

sentence.zh: 我對攝影非常有興趣。
sentence.py: Wǒ duì shèyǐng fēicháng yǒu xìngqù.
sentence.en: I am very interested in photography.

sentence.zh: 我習慣每天早上慢跑。
sentence.py: Wǒ xíguàn měitiān zǎoshàng mànpǎo.
sentence.en: I am used to jogging every morning.

sentence.zh: 我偶爾會去電影院看電影。
sentence.py: Wǒ ǒu'ěr huì qù diànyǐngyuàn kàn diànyǐng.
sentence.en: I occasionally go to the cinema to watch movies.

sentence.zh: 他經常去圖書館借書。
sentence.py: Tā jīngcháng qù túshūguǎn jiè shū.
sentence.en: He often goes to the library to borrow books.

sentence.zh: 週末愉快！
sentence.py: Zhōumò yúkuài!
sentence.en: Have a nice weekend!

sentence.zh: 我們好久沒見面了。
sentence.py: Wǒmen hǎojiǔ méi jiànmiàn le.
sentence.en: We haven't met for a long time.

sentence.zh: 你現在講話方便嗎？
sentence.py: Nǐ xiànzài jiǎnghuà fāngbiàn ma?
sentence.en: Is it convenient for you to talk right now?

vocab.definition: by the way; while you're at it

sentence.zh: 你去超市時順便幫我買瓶牛奶。
sentence.py: Nǐ qù chāoshì shí shùnbiàn bāng wǒ mǎi píng niúnǎi.
sentence.en: Buy me a bottle of milk while you're at the supermarket.

sentence.zh: 聽音樂可以讓人放鬆心情。
sentence.py: Tīng yīnyuè kěyǐ ràng rén fàngsōng xīnqíng.
sentence.en: Listening to music can help people relax.

sentence.zh: 看到鄰居要記得打招呼。
sentence.py: Kàndào línjū yào jìdé dǎ zhāohū.
sentence.en: Remember to greet your neighbors when you see them.

sentence.zh: 對不起，我因為塞車遲到了。
sentence.py: Duìbùqǐ, wǒ yīnwèi sāichē chídàole.
sentence.en: Sorry, I'm late because of traffic.

sentence.zh: 會議將於九點準時開始。
sentence.py: Huìyì jiāng yú jiǔ diǎn zhǔnshí kāishǐ.
sentence.en: The meeting will start punctually at nine o'clock.

sentence.zh: 謝謝你的幫忙，我真的很感激。
sentence.py: Xièxiè nǐ de bāngmáng, wǒ zhēnde hěn gǎnjī.
sentence.en: Thanks for your help, I really appreciate it.

sentence.zh: 你能推薦一家好吃的餐廳嗎？
sentence.py: Nǐ néng tuījiàn yījiā hǎochī de cāntǐng ma?
sentence.en: Can you recommend a good restaurant?

sentence.zh: 謝謝你跟我分享這些有趣的事。
sentence.py: Xièxiè nǐ gēn wǒ fēnxiǎng zhèxiē yǒuqù de shì.
sentence.en: Thanks for sharing these interesting things with me.

sentence.zh: 我很期待下週的旅行。
sentence.py: Wǒ hěn qīdài xià zhōu de lǚxíng.
sentence.en: I am looking forward to next week's trip.

sentence.zh: 我們保持聯繫吧。
sentence.py: Wǒmen bǎochí liánxì ba.
sentence.en: Let's keep in touch.

sentence.zh: 你太客氣了，這只是小事。
sentence.py: Nǐ tài kèqì le, zhè zhǐshì xiǎoshì.
sentence.en: You're too polite, it's just a small matter.

sentence.zh: 祝你有個愉快的一天。
sentence.py: Zhù nǐ yǒu ge yúkuài de yītiān.
sentence.en: Wish you a pleasant day.

sentence.zh: 生病時要好好照顧自己。
sentence.py: Shēngbìng shí yào hǎohǎo zhàogù zìjǐ.
sentence.en: Take good care of yourself when you are sick.

sentence.zh: 謝謝你熱情的招待。
sentence.py: Xièxiè nǐ rèqíng de zhāodài.
sentence.en: Thank you for your warm hospitality.

sentence.zh: 讓我向你介紹我的朋友。
sentence.py: Ràng wǒ xiàng nǐ jièshào wǒ de péngyǒu.
sentence.en: Let me introduce my friend to you.

sentence.zh: 午餐吃什麼？我都隨便。
sentence.py: Wǔcān chī shénme? Wǒ dōu suíbiàn.
sentence.en: What's for lunch? I'm fine with anything.

sentence.zh: 別當真，我只是在開玩笑。
sentence.py: Bié dàngzhēn, wǒ zhǐshì zài kāi wánxiào.
sentence.en: Don't take it seriously, I'm just joking.

sentence.zh: 我感覺今天天氣很舒服。
sentence.py: Wǒ gǎnjué jīntiān tiānqì hěn shūfú.
sentence.en: I feel the weather is very comfortable today.

sentence.zh: 我們的度假計畫取消了。
sentence.py: Wǒmen de dùjià jìhuà qǔxiāole.
sentence.en: Our vacation plan was cancelled.

sentence.zh: 這個問題其實很簡單。
sentence.py: Zhège wèntí qíshí hěn jiǎndān.
sentence.en: This question is actually very simple.

sentence.zh: 這件事的情況非常複雜。
sentence.py: Zhè jiàn shì de qíngkuàng fēicháng fùzá.
sentence.en: The situation of this matter is very complex.

sentence.zh: 我家附近有一家公園。
sentence.py: Wǒjiā fùjìn yǒu yījiā gōngyuán.
sentence.en: There is a park near my house.

sentence.zh: 這間超商二十四小時營業，很方便。
sentence.py: Zhè jiān chāoshāng èrshísì xiǎoshí yíngyè, hěn fāngbiàn.
sentence.en: This convenience store is open 24 hours, very convenient.

sentence.zh: 這裡的居住環境很安靜。
sentence.py: Zhèlǐ de jūzhù huánjìng hěn ānjìng.
sentence.en: The living environment here is very quiet.

sentence.zh: 週末學校有很多有趣的活動。
sentence.py: Zhōumò xuéxiào yǒu hěnduō yǒuqù de huódòng.
sentence.en: There are many interesting activities at school on the weekend.

sentence.zh: 你有沒有關於他的最新消息？
sentence.py: Nǐ yǒu méiyǒu guānyú tā de zuìxīn xiāoxí?
sentence.en: Do you have any latest news about him?

sentence.zh: 我正在準備明天的報告。
sentence.py: Wǒ zhèngzài zhǔnbèi míngtiān de bàogào.
sentence.en: I am preparing for tomorrow's report.

sentence.zh: 我決定明天去爬山。
sentence.py: Wǒ juédìng míngtiān qù páshān.
sentence.en: I decided to go hiking tomorrow.

sentence.zh: 人生充滿了各種選擇。
sentence.py: Rénshēng chōngmǎnle gèzhǒng xuǎnzé.
sentence.en: Life is full of choices.

sentence.zh: 請給我一點時間考慮一下。
sentence.py: Qǐng gěi wǒ yīdiǎn shíjiān kǎolǜ yīxià.
sentence.en: Please give me some time to consider.

sentence.zh: 別擔心，一切都會好的。
sentence.py: Bié dānxīn, yīqiè dōu huì hǎo de.
sentence.en: Don't worry, everything will be fine.

sentence.zh: 下個月我們要放暑假了。
sentence.py: Xià ge yuè wǒmen yào fàng shǔjià le.
sentence.en: We are going to have summer vacation next month.

sentence.zh: 我最喜歡去日本旅遊。
sentence.py: Wǒ zuì xǐhuān qù Rìběn lǚyóu.
sentence.en: I like traveling to Japan the most.

sentence.zh: 山上的風景非常漂亮。
sentence.py: Shānshàng de fēngjǐng fēicháng piàoliang.
sentence.en: The scenery on the mountain is very beautiful.

sentence.zh: 我們可以在這裡照相嗎？
sentence.py: Wǒmen kěyǐ zài zhèlǐ zhàoxiàng ma?
sentence.en: Can we take a photo here?

sentence.zh: 那次旅行留下了美好的回憶。
sentence.py: Nà cì lǚyóu liú xiàle měihǎo de huíyì.
sentence.en: That trip left beautiful memories.

scenarios.title: Status Updates
scenarios.description: Catching up with a friend about what's happening in their life recently.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 嘿！好久不見，最近在忙什麼？
dialogue.py: Hēi! Hǎojiǔ bùjiàn, zuìjìn zài máng shénme?
dialogue.en: Hey! Long time no see, what have you been busy with lately?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 也沒什麼，就是上班、下班，老樣子。
dialogue.py: Yě méi shénme, jiùshì shàngbān, xiàbān, lǎo yàngzi.
dialogue.en: Not much, just work, off work, same old.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 聽起來很充實啊！工作還順利嗎？
dialogue.py: Tīng qǐlái hěn chōngshí a! Gōngzuò hái shùnlì ma?
dialogue.en: Sounds productive! Is work going well?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 還可以，就是壓力有點大。你呢？
dialogue.py: Hái kěyǐ, jiùshì yālì yǒudiǎn dà. Nǐ ne?
dialogue.en: It's okay, just a bit of pressure. How about you?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我最近在學攝影，覺得很有趣。
dialogue.py: Wǒ zuìjìn zài xué shèyǐng, juédé hěn yǒuqù.
dialogue.en: I've been learning photography lately, I find it very interesting.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 哇，真不錯！下次分享照片給我看。
dialogue.py: Wa, zhēn bùcuò! Xià cì fēnxiǎng zhàopiàn gěi wǒ kàn.
dialogue.en: Wow, that's great! Share some photos with me next time.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒問題！有空再約出來聊。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí! Yǒu kòng zài yuē chūlái liáo.
dialogue.en: No problem! Let's meet up and chat when you're free.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好啊，保持聯繫！
dialogue.py: Hǎo a, bǎochí liánxì!
dialogue.en: Sure, keep in touch!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 拜拜！
dialogue.py: Bàibài!
dialogue.en: Bye!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 拜拜！
dialogue.py: Bàibài!
dialogue.en: Bye!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我們真的好久沒坐下來好好聊天了。
dialogue.py: Wǒmen zhēnde hǎojiǔ méi zuò xiàlái hǎohǎo liáotiān le.
dialogue.en: We really haven't sat down and had a good chat for a long time.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 是啊，自從你換了新工作以後，我們就很少見面。
dialogue.py: Shì a, zìcóng nǐ huànle xīn gōngzuò yǐhòu, wǒmen jiù hěn shǎo jiànmiàn.
dialogue.en: Yeah, since you changed to your new job, we've rarely met.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒辦法，新公司剛開始真的太忙了，每天都要加班。
dialogue.py: Méi bànfǎ, xīn gōngsī gāng kāishǐ zhēnde tài mángle, měitiān dōu yào jiābān.
dialogue.en: Can't help it, the new company was really too busy at the beginning, had to work overtime every day.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 現在應該比較適應了吧？
dialogue.py: Xiànzài yīnggāi bǐjiào shìyìngle ba?
dialogue.en: You should be more adjusted now, right?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 對，現在好多了。我上週末還去台中玩了一趟。
dialogue.py: Duì, xiànzài hǎoduōle. Wǒ shàng zhōumò hái qù Táizhōng wánle yī tàng.
dialogue.en: Yes, much better now. I even went to Taichung for a trip last weekend.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 台中？那邊風景很漂亮吧？
dialogue.py: Táizhōng? Nàbiān fēngjǐng hěn piàoliang ba?
dialogue.en: Taichung? The scenery there must be beautiful, right?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 漂亮是漂亮，但人真的很多。你最近呢？有沒有什麼新鮮事？
dialogue.py: Piàoliang shì piàoliang, dàn rén zhēnde hěnduō. Nǐ zuìjìn ne? Yǒu méiyǒu shéme xīnxiān shì?
dialogue.en: It is beautiful, but there are really a lot of people. How about you? Anything new?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我打算下個月去日本旅遊，現在正在準備行程。
dialogue.py: Wǒ dǎsuàn xià ge yuè qù Rìběn lǚyóu, xiànzài zhèngzài zhǔnbèi xíngchéng.
dialogue.en: I plan to go to Japan for a trip next month, and I'm currently preparing the itinerary.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 太羨慕了！打算去哪些地方？
dialogue.py: Tài xiànmù le! Dǎsuàn qù nǎxiē dìfāng?
dialogue.en: So jealous! Where do you plan to go?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 主要是東京和京都，想去看看古蹟和吃美食。
dialogue.py: Zhǔyào shì Dōngjīng hé Jīngdū, xiǎng qù kàn kàn gǔjī hé chī měishí.
dialogue.en: Mainly Tokyo and Kyoto, want to see historical sites and eat delicious food.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 記得多拍些照片，回來跟我分享。
dialogue.py: Jìdé duō pāi xiē zhàopiàn, huílái gēn wǒ fēnxiǎng.
dialogue.en: Remember to take more photos and share them with me when you get back.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 那是一定的。對了，你最近還有在運動嗎？
dialogue.py: Nà shì yīdìng de. Duìle, nǐ zuìjìn hái yǒu zài yùndòng ma?
dialogue.en: Definitely. By the way, are you still exercising lately?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 偶爾會去慢跑，但最近比較懶。
dialogue.py: Ǒu'ěr huì qù mànpǎo, dàn zuìjìn bǐjiào lǎn.
dialogue.en: Occasionally I go jogging, but I've been a bit lazy lately.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 要注意身體健康啊！
dialogue.py: Yào zhùyì shēntǐ jiànkāng a!
dialogue.en: Take care of your health!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我知道啦，謝謝你的關心。
dialogue.py: Wǒ zhīdàole, xièxiè nǐ de guānxīn.
dialogue.en: I know, thanks for your concern.

usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ zuìjìn zài máng shénme?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ zuìjìn dōu zài máng gōngzuò.
usefulSentences.en_q: What have you been busy with lately?
usefulSentences.en_a: I've been busy with work lately.

usefulSentences.py_q: Gōngzuò hái shùnlì ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Hái bùcuò, zhǐshì yǒudiǎn lèi.
usefulSentences.en_q: Is work going well?
usefulSentences.en_a: Not bad, just a bit tired.

usefulSentences.a: 我打算去電影院看電影。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhōumò yǒu shéme dǎsuàn?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ dǎsuàn qù diànyǐngyuàn kàn diànyǐng.
usefulSentences.en_q: Any plans for the weekend?
usefulSentences.en_a: I plan to go to the cinema to watch a movie.

usefulSentences.py_q: Yǒu kòng yuē chūlái jiàn ge miàn ba?
usefulSentences.py_a: Hǎo a, xià zhōu liù zěnmeyàng?
usefulSentences.en_q: Let's meet up when you're free?
usefulSentences.en_a: Sure, how about next Saturday?

usefulSentences.py_q: Bǎochí liánxì ó!
usefulSentences.py_a: Méi wèntí, zàijiàn!
usefulSentences.en_q: Keep in touch!
usefulSentences.en_a: No problem, goodbye!

paragraphs.zh: 王先生和李先生是大學時期的好朋友。畢業後，他們各自進入了不同的公司工作。雖然在同一個城市，但因為工作繁忙，他們已經半年多沒有見面了。
paragraphs.py: Wáng xiānshēng hé Lǐ xiānshēng shì dàxué shíqí de hǎo péngyǒu. Bìyè hòu, tāmen gèzì jìnrùle bùtóng de gōngsī gōngzuò. Suīrán zài tóng yīgè chéngshì, dàn yīnwèi gōngzuò fánmáng, tāmen yǐjīng bànnián duō méiyǒu jiànmiàn le.
paragraphs.en: Mr. Wang and Mr. Li were good friends in university. After graduation, they each joined different companies to work. Although they are in the same city, because of busy work, they haven't met for more than half a year.

paragraphs.zh: 今天下班後，他們約在一家安靜的咖啡廳聊天。王先生分享了他最近學習攝影的趣事，而李先生則提到了他即將到來的日本旅行計畫。兩人都覺得，能和老朋友坐下來聊聊近況，是非常放鬆的事。
paragraphs.py: Jīntiān xiàbān hòu, tāmen yuē zài yījiā ānjìng de kāfēi tīng liáotiān. Wáng xiānshēng fēnxiǎngle tā zuìjìn xuéxí shèyǐng de qùshì, ér Lǐ xiānshēng zé tídàole tā jíjiāng dàolái de Rìběn lǚyóu jìhuà. Liǎng rén dōu juédé, néng hé lǎo péngyǒu zuò xiàlái liáo liáo jìnkuàng, shì fēicháng fàngsōng de shì.
paragraphs.en: After work today, they met at a quiet cafe to chat. Mr. Wang shared interesting things about his recent photography studies, while Mr. Li mentioned his upcoming Japan travel plan. Both felt that sitting down with an old friend to talk about recent events is very relaxing.

paragraphs.zh: 在聊天的過程中，他們也回憶起大學時期的美好時光。雖然生活壓力很大，但友情讓他們感到溫暖。最後，他們約定下個月再聚會，並提醒彼此要注意身體健康。
paragraphs.py: Zài liáotiān de guòchéng zhōng, tāmen yě huíyì qǐ dàxué shíqí de měihǎo shíguāng. Suīrán shēnghuó yālì hěn dà, dàn yǒuqíng ràng tāmen gǎndào wēnnuǎn. Zuìhòu, tāmen yuēdìng xià ge yuè zài jùhuì, bìng tíxǐng bǐcǐ yào zhùyì shēntǐ jiànkāng.
paragraphs.en: During the chat, they also recalled the beautiful times of university. Although life is stressful, friendship makes them feel warm. Finally, they agreed to meet again next month and reminded each other to take care of their health.

comprehension.question: 王先生和李先生多久沒見面了？
李先生下個月打算做什麼？
他們在那裡見面聊天？

quiz.question: 當你想問別人週末的計畫時，可以說：
「老樣子」通常用來表達什麼？
options: 生活跟以前一樣，沒什麼改變

scenarios.title: Daily Routine
scenarios.description: Talking about daily habits, exercise, and household chores.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你每天都幾點起床？
dialogue.py: Nǐ měitiān dōu jǐ diǎn qǐchuáng?
dialogue.en: What time do you wake up every day?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我通常六點半就起床了。
dialogue.py: Wǒ tōngcháng liù diǎn bàn jiù qǐchuáng le.
dialogue.en: I usually wake up at 6:30.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 哇，那麼早！起得來嗎？
dialogue.py: Wa, nàme zǎo! Qǐ de lái ma?
dialogue.en: Wow, so early! Can you get up?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 習慣了。起床後我會先去慢跑。
dialogue.py: Xíguàn le. Qǐchuáng hòu wǒ huì xiān qù mànpǎo.
dialogue.en: I'm used to it. After getting up, I go jogging first.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 真健康。我都睡到八點。
dialogue.py: Zhēn jiànkāng. Wǒ dōu shuì dào bā diǎn.
dialogue.en: So healthy. I sleep until 8 o'clock.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 早點起床精神會比較好哦。
dialogue.py: Zǎo diǎn qǐchuáng jīngshén huì bǐjiào hǎo ó.
dialogue.en: Waking up early gives you more energy.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我也想嘗試，但總覺得很難。
dialogue.py: Wǒ yě xiǎng chángshì, dàn zǒng juédé hěn nán.
dialogue.en: I want to try too, but I always find it hard.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 慢慢來，先從早起十五分鐘開始。
dialogue.py: Mànmàn lái, xiān cóng zǎoqǐ shíwǔ fēnzhōng kāishǐ.
dialogue.en: Take it slow, start by waking up 15 minutes earlier.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好建議，我明天試試看。
dialogue.py: Hǎo jiànyì, wǒ míngtiān shìshì kàn.
dialogue.en: Good suggestion, I'll try it tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 加油！
dialogue.py: Jiāyóu!
dialogue.en: Good luck!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 最近看你精神不錯，是有在運動嗎？
dialogue.py: Zuìjìn kàn nǐ jīngshén bùcuò, shì yǒu zài yùndòng ma?
dialogue.en: You look energetic lately, have you been exercising?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 對啊，我最近開始實行規律的生活。
dialogue.py: Duì a, wǒ zuìjìn kāishǐ shíxíng guīlǜ de shēnghuó.
dialogue.en: Yes, I've started implementing a regular routine lately.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 規律的生活？具體是怎麼做的？
dialogue.py: Guīlǜ de shēnghuó? Jùtǐ shì zěnme zuò de?
dialogue.en: A regular routine? What exactly do you do?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 每天早上六點起床，喝杯溫水，然後去公園慢跑半小時。
dialogue.py: Měitiān zǎoshàng liù diǎn qǐchuáng, hē bēi wēnshuǐ, ránhòu qù gōngyuán mànpǎo bàn xiǎoshí.
dialogue.en: Wake up at 6:00 every morning, drink a glass of warm water, then go jogging in the park for half an hour.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 聽起來很棒。那早餐呢？
dialogue.py: Tīng qǐlái hěn bàng. Nà zǎocān ne?
dialogue.en: Sounds great. What about breakfast?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我會自己做簡單的早餐，像是燕麥或是全麥吐司。
dialogue.py: Wǒ huì zìjǐ zuò jiǎndān de zǎocān, xiàng shì yànmài huòshì quánmài tǔsī.
dialogue.en: I make a simple breakfast myself, like oats or whole wheat toast.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 自己做早餐真的比較健康。那你晚上幾點睡？
dialogue.py: Zìjǐ zuò zǎocān zhēnde bǐjiào jiànkāng. Nà nǐ wǎnshàng jǐ diǎn shuì?
dialogue.en: Making breakfast yourself is indeed healthier. What time do you go to bed at night?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我盡量在十一點前上床睡覺，睡前不看手機。
dialogue.py: Wǒ jǐnliàng zài shíyī diǎn qián shàngchuáng shuìjiào, shuìqián bù kàn shǒujī.
dialogue.en: I try to get to bed before 11:00, and I don't look at my phone before sleeping.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 睡前不看手機真的很難做到，我都會滑很久。
dialogue.py: Shuìqián bù kàn shǒujī zhēnde hěn nán zuò dào, wǒ dōu huì huá hěnjiǔ.
dialogue.en: It's really hard not to look at the phone before bed, I always scroll for a long time.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 這就是重點。不看手機後，我的睡眠品質提升了很多。
dialogue.py: Zhè jiùshì zhòngdiǎn. Bù kàn shǒujī hòu, wǒ de shuìmián pǐnzhí tíshēngle hěnduō.
dialogue.en: That's the key. After stopping looking at the phone, my sleep quality improved a lot.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 難怪你氣色這麼好。除了運動，你還有其他習慣嗎？
dialogue.py: Nánguài nǐ qìsè zhème hǎo. Chúle yùndòng, nǐ hái yǒu qítā xíguàn ma?
dialogue.en: No wonder your complexion is so good. Besides exercise, do you have other habits?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我現在每天會花十五分鐘讀書或冥想，讓心靜下來。
dialogue.py: Wǒ xiànzài měitiān huì huā shíwǔ fēnzhōng dúshū huò míngxiǎng, ràng xīn jìng xiàlái.
dialogue.en: I now spend 15 minutes every day reading or meditating to calm my mind.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 聽你這麼說，我也想開始改變我的生活習慣了。
dialogue.py: Tīng nǐ zhème shuō, wǒ yě xiǎng kāishǐ gǎibiàn wǒ de shēnghuó xíguàn le.
dialogue.en: Hearing you say this, I want to start changing my lifestyle habits too.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 隨時開始都不晚，我們可以互相鼓勵。
dialogue.py: Suíshí kāishǐ dōu bù wǎn, wǒmen kěyǐ hùxiāng gǔlì.
dialogue.en: It's never too late to start at any time, we can encourage each other.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好，那我們一起加油！
dialogue.py: Hǎo, nà wǒmen yīqǐ jiāyóu!
dialogue.en: Okay, let's work hard together!

usefulSentences.a: 我通常十一點左右睡覺。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ tōngcháng jǐ diǎn shuìjiào?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ tōngcháng shíyī diǎn zuǒyòu shuìjiào.
usefulSentences.en_q: What time do you usually go to bed?
usefulSentences.en_a: I usually go to bed around eleven.

usefulSentences.a: 有，我每天早上都會去慢跑。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ yǒu yùndòng de xíguàn ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Yǒu, wǒ měitiān zǎoshàng dōu huì qù mànpǎo.
usefulSentences.en_q: Do you have an exercise habit?
usefulSentences.en_a: Yes, I go jogging every morning.

usefulSentences.a: 我早餐通常吃三明治和咖啡。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ zǎocān dōu chī shénme?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ zǎocān tōngcháng chī sānmíngzhì hé kāfēi.
usefulSentences.en_q: What do you usually have for breakfast?
usefulSentences.en_a: I usually have a sandwich and coffee for breakfast.

usefulSentences.a: 剛開始很難，但現在習慣了。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zǎoqǐ duì nǐ yǒu kùnnán ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Gāng kāishǐ hěn nán, dàn xiànzài xíguàn le.
usefulSentences.en_q: Is waking up early difficult for you?
usefulSentences.en_a: It was hard at first, but now I'm used to it.

usefulSentences.a: 我睡前會聽一些放鬆的音樂。
usefulSentences.py_q: Shuìqián nǐ huì zuò shénme?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ shuìqián huì tīng yīxiē fàngsōng de yīnyuè.
usefulSentences.en_q: What do you do before bed?
usefulSentences.en_a: I listen to some relaxing music before bed.

paragraphs.zh: 在現代繁忙的生活中，建立規律的日常生活習慣非常重要。規律的生活不僅能提升工作效率，還能促進身心健康。許多成功的人都有早起的習慣，這讓他們有更多的時間準備一天的工作。
paragraphs.py: Zài xiàndài fánmáng de shēnghuó zhōng, jiànlì guīlǜ de rìcháng shēnghuó xíguàn fēicháng zhòngyào. Guīlǜ de shēnghuó bùjǐn néng tíshēng gōngzuò xiàolǜ, hái néng cùjìn shēnxīn jiànkāng. Xǔduō chénggōng de rén dōu yǒu zǎoqǐ de xíguàn, zhè ràng tāmen yǒu gèng duō de shíjiān zhǔnbèi yītiān de gōngzuò.
paragraphs.en: In modern busy life, establishing a regular daily routine is very important. A regular life can not only improve work efficiency but also promote physical and mental health. Many successful people have the habit of waking up early, which gives them more time to prepare for the day's work.

paragraphs.zh: 除了早起，適度的運動也是不可或缺的。每天花三十分鐘慢跑或散步，可以幫助減輕壓力，讓心情變得愉快。此外，健康的飲食習慣，如準時吃早餐、多喝水，也能讓身體保持活力。
paragraphs.py: Chúle zǎoqǐ, shìdù de yùndòng yěshì bùkě huòquē de. Měitiān huā sānshí fēnzhōng mànpǎo huò sànbù, kěyǐ bāngzhù jiǎnqīng yālì, ràng xīnqíng biàndé yúkuài. Cǐwài, jiànkāng de yǐnshí xíguàn, rú zhǔnshí chī zǎocān, duō hē shuǐ, yě néng ràng shēntǐ bǎochí huólì.
paragraphs.en: In addition to waking up early, moderate exercise is also indispensable. Spending thirty minutes jogging or walking every day can help reduce stress and make the mood pleasant. In addition, healthy eating habits, such as eating breakfast on time and drinking more water, can also keep the body energetic.

paragraphs.zh: 最後，充足的睡眠是健康生活的基石。盡量保持規律的作息時間，睡前避免使用電子產品，有助於提高睡眠品質。只要持之以恆，每個人都能擁有更健康、更有意義的生活。
paragraphs.py: Zuìhòu, chōngzú de shuìmián shì jiànkāng shēnghuó de jīshí. Jǐnliàng bǎochí guīlǜ de zuòxí shíjiān, shuìqián bìmiǎn shǐyòng diànzǐ chǎnpǐ, yǒu zhù yú tígāo shuìmián pǐnzhí. Zhǐyào chízhīyǐhéng, měi gè rén dōu néng yǒngyǒu gèng jiànkāng, gèng yǒu yìyì de shēnghuó.
paragraphs.en: Finally, sufficient sleep is the foundation of a healthy life. Try to maintain a regular sleep schedule and avoid using electronic products before bed to help improve sleep quality. As long as you persevere, everyone can have a healthier and more meaningful life.

comprehension.question: 根據文章，規律生活有什麼好處？
早起對成功人士有什麼幫助？
options: 讓他們有更多時間準備工作

comprehension.question: 睡前避免使用電子產品有什麼幫助？

scenarios.title: Meeting New People
scenarios.description: Introductions and icebreakers at a social gathering.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你好！我是大衛，很高興認識你。
dialogue.py: Nǐ hǎo! Wǒ shì Dàwèi, hěn gāoxìng rènshì nǐ.
dialogue.en: Hello! I'm David, nice to meet you.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 你好，大衛。我叫小美，也很高興認識你。
dialogue.py: Nǐ hǎo, Dàwèi. Wǒ jiào Xiǎoměi, yě hěn gāoxìng rènshì nǐ.
dialogue.en: Hello, David. I'm Xiao Mei, nice to meet you too.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你是小明的朋友嗎？
dialogue.py: Nǐ shì Xiǎomíng de péngyǒu ma?
dialogue.en: Are you Xiao Ming's friend?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 對，我們是大學同學。你呢？
dialogue.py: Duì, wǒmen shì dàxué tóngxué. Nǐ ne?
dialogue.en: Yes, we were university classmates. How about you?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我是他的同事。
dialogue.py: Wǒ shì tā de tóngshì.
dialogue.en: I'm his colleague.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 原來如此。你在哪裡工作？
dialogue.py: Yuánlái rúcǐ. Nǐ zài nǎlǐ gōngzuò?
dialogue.en: I see. Where do you work?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我在一家科技公司當工程師。
dialogue.py: Wǒ zài yījiā kējì gōngsī dāng gōngchéngshī.
dialogue.en: I work as an engineer at a tech company.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 哇，聽起來很專業！
dialogue.py: Wa, tīng qǐlái hěn zhuānyè!
dialogue.en: Wow, sounds very professional!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 哪裡，只是很忙而已。你呢？
dialogue.py: Nǎlǐ, zhǐshì hěn máng éryǐ. Nǐ ne?
dialogue.en: Not really, just very busy. How about you?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我是在國小教英文的老師。
dialogue.py: Wǒ shì zài guóxiǎo jiào Yīngwén de lǎoshī.
dialogue.en: I'm an English teacher at an elementary school.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 小美，你除了教書，平常有什麼興趣嗎？
dialogue.py: Xiǎoměi, nǐ chúle jiāoshū, píngcháng yǒu shéme xìngqù ma?
dialogue.en: Xiao Mei, besides teaching, do you have any hobbies?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我挺喜歡自助旅行的，每年都會出國一兩次。
dialogue.py: Wǒ tǐng xǐhuān zìzhù lǚyóu de, měinián dōu huì chūguó yī liǎng cì.
dialogue.en: I quite like solo traveling, I go abroad once or twice every year.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 真的嗎？我也很喜歡旅行！你最喜歡哪個國家？
dialogue.py: Zhēnde ma? Wǒ yě hěn xǐhuān lǚyóu! Nǐ zuì xǐhuān nǎge guójiā?
dialogue.en: Really? I like traveling too! Which country do you like most?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我覺得泰國很不錯，東西好吃，風景也美。
dialogue.py: Wǒ juédé Tàiguó hěn bùcuò, dōngxī hǎochī, fēngjǐng yě měi.
dialogue.en: I think Thailand is great, the food is delicious and the scenery is beautiful.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 泰國我也去過，那裡的按摩真的很舒服。
dialogue.py: Tàiguó wǒ yě qùguò, nàlǐ de ànmó zhēnde hěn shūfú.
dialogue.en: I've been to Thailand too, the massage there is really comfortable.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒錯！除了旅行，我偶爾也會去聽音樂會。
dialogue.py: Méicuò! Chúle lǚyóu, wǒ ǒu'ěr huì qù tīng yīnyuèhuì.
dialogue.en: Exactly! Besides traveling, I occasionally go to concerts.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 音樂會？你喜歡哪種類型的音樂？
dialogue.py: Yīnyuèhuì? Nǐ xǐhuān nǎ zhǒng lèixíng de yīnyuè?
dialogue.en: Concerts? What kind of music do you like?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我比較喜歡古典樂，覺得可以讓人心情平靜。
dialogue.py: Wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān gǔdiǎn yuè, juédé kěyǐ ràng rén xīnqíng píngjìng.
dialogue.en: I prefer classical music, I find it can calm the mind.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 古典樂很深奧呢。我平時比較常聽流行音樂。
dialogue.py: Gǔdiǎn yuè hěn shēn'ào ne. Wǒ píngshí bǐjiào cháng tīng liúxíng yīnyuè.
dialogue.en: Classical music is quite profound. I usually listen to pop music more often.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 流行的也不錯啊，有很多旋律很好聽的歌。
dialogue.py: Liúxíng de yě bùcuò a, yǒu hěnduō xuánlǜ hěn hǎotīng de gē.
dialogue.en: Pop music is good too, there are many songs with great melodies.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 對了，這附近有一家不錯的咖啡廳，你有興趣一起去嗎？
dialogue.py: Duìle, zhè fùjìn yǒu yījiā bùcuò de kāfēi tīng, nǐ yǒu xìngqù yīqǐ qù ma?
dialogue.en: By the way, there's a good cafe nearby, are you interested in going together?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 現在嗎？好啊，反正我現在也有空。
dialogue.py: Xiànzài ma? Hǎo a, fǎnzhèng wǒ xiànzài yě yǒu kòng.
dialogue.en: Now? Sure, I'm free right now anyway.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那我們走吧，我順便介紹幾個朋友給你認識。
dialogue.py: Nà wǒmen zǒu ba, wǒ shùnbiàn jièshào jǐ ge péngyǒu gěi nǐ rènshì.
dialogue.en: Let's go then, I'll introduce a few friends to you while we're at it.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 太好了，謝謝你。
dialogue.py: Tài hǎole, xièxiè nǐ.
dialogue.en: Great, thank you.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 不客氣！
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì!
dialogue.en: You're welcome!

usefulSentences.py_q: Qǐngwèn nǐ zěnme chēnghu?
usefulSentences.py_a: Jiào wǒ Dàwèi jiù kěyǐ le.
usefulSentences.en_q: How should I call you?
usefulSentences.en_a: You can just call me David.

usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ shì zuò shénme gōngzuò de?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ shì gōngchéngshī.
usefulSentences.en_q: What kind of work do you do?
usefulSentences.en_a: I am an engineer.

usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ píngcháng yǒu shéme xìngqù?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ xǐhuān lǚyóu hé tīng yīnyuè.
usefulSentences.en_q: What are your hobbies?
usefulSentences.en_a: I like traveling and listening to music.

usefulSentences.py_q: Hěn gāoxìng rènshì nǐ.
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ yěshì, hěn gāoxìng rènshì nǐ.
usefulSentences.en_q: Nice to meet you.
usefulSentences.en_a: Me too, nice to meet you.

usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ yěshì Xiǎomíng de péngyǒu ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Duì, wǒmen shì dàxué tóngxué.
usefulSentences.en_q: Are you also Xiao Ming's friend?
usefulSentences.en_a: Yes, we were university classmates.

paragraphs.zh: 參加社交聚會是認識新朋友的好機會。在聚會中，主動向他人打招呼並做自我介紹，是建立聯繫的第一步。一個簡單的微笑和一句『你好』，就能拉近彼此的距離。
paragraphs.py: Cānjiā shèjiāo jùhuì shì rènshì xīn péngyǒu de hǎo jīhuì. Zài jùhuì zhōng, zhǔdòng xiàng tārén dǎ zhāohū bìng zuò zìwǒ jièshào, shì jiànlì liánxì de dì yī bù. Yīgè jiǎndān de wēixiào hé yījù 『nǐ hǎo』, jiù néng lājìn bǐcǐ de jùlí.
paragraphs.en: Attending social gatherings is a good opportunity to meet new friends. In a gathering, taking the initiative to greet others and introduce yourself is the first step in establishing contact. A simple smile and a 'hello' can bridge the distance between each other.

paragraphs.zh: 找到共同的興趣愛好是深入聊天的關鍵。你可以詢問對方的職業、愛好或是最近去過的地方。分享自己的經歷也能讓對話變得更生動。記住，傾聽對方的發言同樣重要，這顯示了你對他人的尊重。
paragraphs.py: Zhǎodào gòngtóng de xìngqù àihào shì shēnrù liáotiān de guānjiàn. Nǐ kěyǐ xúnwèn duìfāng de zhíyè, àihào huòshì zuìjìn qùguò de dìfāng. Fēnxiǎng zìjǐ de jīnglì yě néng ràng duìhuà biàndé gèng shēngdòng. Jìzhù, qīngtīng duìfāng de fāyán tóngyàng zhòngyào, zhè xiǎnshìle nǐ duì tārén de zūnzhòng.
paragraphs.en: Finding common interests is the key to deep conversation. You can ask about the other person's profession, hobbies, or places they've recently visited. Sharing your own experiences can also make the dialogue more vivid. Remember, listening to the other person's speech is equally important, as it shows your respect for others.

paragraphs.zh: 最後，在離開聚會前，別忘了和新朋友交換聯絡方式。你可以說：『很高興認識你，我們保持聯繫。』這樣，一次簡單的見面就可能發展成一段長久的友誼。
paragraphs.py: Zuìhòu, zài líkāi jùhuì qián, bié wàngle hé xīn péngyǒu jiāohuàn liánluò fāngshì. Nǐ kěyǐ shuō: 『hěn gāoxìng rènshì nǐ, wǒmen bǎochí liánxì.』 Zhèyàng, yīcì jiǎndān de jiànmiàn jiù kěnéng fāzhǎn chéng yīduàn chángjiǔ de yǒuyì.
paragraphs.en: Finally, before leaving the gathering, don't forget to exchange contact information with your new friends. You can say: 'Nice to meet you, let's keep in touch.' In this way, a simple meeting can develop into a long-lasting friendship.

comprehension.question: 建立聯繫的第一步是什麼？
options: 主動打招呼與自我介紹

comprehension.question: 如何讓對話變得更生動？
離開聚會前應該做什麼？

scenarios.title: Making Plans
scenarios.description: Negotiating a time and place to meet for a weekend activity.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這週末你有空嗎？我想約你出來逛逛。
dialogue.py: Zhè zhōumò nǐ yǒu kòng ma? Wǒ xiǎng yuē nǐ chūlái guàngguàng.
dialogue.en: Are you free this weekend? I want to invite you to hang out.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 週六下午我有空，週日就要陪家人了。
dialogue.py: Zhōu liù xiàwǔ wǒ yǒu kòng, zhōurì jiù yào péi jiārén le.
dialogue.en: I'm free Saturday afternoon, but I have to be with my family on Sunday.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 週六下午三點在火車站見面怎麼樣？
dialogue.py: Zhōu liù xiàwǔ sān diǎn zài huǒchēzhàn jiànmiàn zěnmeyàng?
dialogue.en: How about meeting at the train station at 3:00 PM on Saturday?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 可以啊。我們打算去哪裡逛？
dialogue.py: Kěyǐ a. Wǒmen dǎsuàn qù nǎlǐ guàng?
dialogue.en: Sure. Where do we plan to go?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 聽說附近新開了一家百貨公司，想去看看。
dialogue.py: Tīngshuō fùjìn xīn kāile yījiā bǎihuò gōngsī, xiǎng qù kàn kàn.
dialogue.en: I heard a new department store opened nearby, I want to check it out.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好啊，我也想買幾件衣服。
dialogue.py: Hǎo a, wǒ yě xiǎng mǎi jǐ jiàn yīfú.
dialogue.en: Okay, I want to buy some clothes too.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那太好了，我們可以一起逛逛。
dialogue.py: Nà tài hǎole, wǒmen kěyǐ yīqǐ guàngguàng.
dialogue.en: That's great, we can shop together.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 那我們就週六三點火車站見囉！
dialogue.py: Nà wǒmen jiù zhōu liù sān diǎn huǒchēzhàn jiàn luo!
dialogue.en: Then we'll meet at the train station at 3:00 on Saturday!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，不見不散！
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, bùjiàn bùsàn!
dialogue.en: No problem, be there or be square!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 拜拜！
dialogue.py: Bàibài!
dialogue.en: Bye!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 下週就是連假了，你有什麼計畫嗎？
dialogue.py: Xià zhōu jiùshì lián jià le, nǐ yǒu shéme jìhuà ma?
dialogue.en: Next week is a long weekend, do you have any plans?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我目前還沒有決定，可能就在家放鬆吧。
dialogue.py: Wǒ mùqián hái méiyǒu juédìng, kěnéng jiù zài jiā fàngsōng ba.
dialogue.en: I haven't decided yet, maybe just relax at home.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 待在家太可惜了，要不要一起去墾丁玩？
dialogue.py: Dài zài jiā tài kěxí le, yào bùyào yīqǐ qù Kěndīng wán?
dialogue.en: It's a pity to stay at home, why don't we go to Kenting together?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 墾丁？現在去會不會人山人海？
dialogue.py: Kěndīng? Xiànzài qù huì bù huì rénshānrénhǎi?
dialogue.en: Kenting? Won't it be crowded with people now?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 肯定是會很多人，但那邊的海邊真的很漂亮。
dialogue.py: Kěndìng shì huì hěnduō rén, dàn nàbiān de hǎibiān zhēnde hěn piàoliang.
dialogue.en: It will definitely be crowded, but the beach there is really beautiful.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 聽起來很心動，但我要考慮一下預算。
dialogue.py: Tīng qǐlái hěn xīndòng, dàn wǒ yào kǎolǜ yīxià yùsuàn.
dialogue.en: Sounds tempting, but I need to consider my budget.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒關係，你可以慢慢考慮。如果要去的的話，我們得趕快訂飯店。
dialogue.py: Méiguānxì, nǐ kěyǐ mànmàn kǎolǜ. Rúguǒ yào qù de de huà, wǒmen děi gǎnkuài dìng fàndiàn.
dialogue.en: No problem, take your time to consider. If we are going, we need to book a hotel quickly.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 飯店現在還訂得到嗎？
dialogue.py: Fàndiàn xiànzài hái dìng dé dào ma?
dialogue.en: Can we still book a hotel now?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我剛才查了一下，還有幾間不錯的民宿有空房。
dialogue.py: Wǒ gāngcái chále yīxià, hái yǒu jǐ jiān bùcuò de mínshù yǒu kòng fáng.
dialogue.en: I just checked, and a few good guesthouses still have vacancies.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 那好吧，你先把資料傳給我看，我明天給你答覆。
dialogue.py: Nà hǎo ba, nǐ xiān bǎ zīliào chuán gěi wǒ kàn, wǒ míngtiān gěi nǐ dáfù.
dialogue.en: Okay then, send me the info first, and I'll give you an answer tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，我等一下就傳。順便問問其他朋友有沒有興趣。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, wǒ děng yīxià jiù chuán. Shùnbiàn wèn wèn qítā péngyǒu yǒu méiyǒu xìngqù.
dialogue.en: No problem, I'll send it in a bit. I'll also ask other friends if they are interested.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好啊，人多一點比較熱鬧。
dialogue.py: Hǎo a, rén duō yīdiǎn bǐjiào rènào.
dialogue.en: Sure, more people will be more fun.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我也這麼覺得。那我們明天再決定囉？
dialogue.py: Wǒ yě zhème juédé. Nà wǒmen míngtiān zài juédìng luo?
dialogue.en: I think so too. Then we'll decide tomorrow?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，明天聯絡。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, míngtiān liánluò.
dialogue.en: Okay, contact you tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 明天見！
dialogue.py: Míngtiān jiàn!
dialogue.en: See you tomorrow!

usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ zhè zhōumò nǐ yǒu kòng ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ yǒu kòng, zěnmele?
usefulSentences.en_q: Are you free this weekend?
usefulSentences.en_a: I'm free, what's up?

usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒmen yuē jǐ diǎn jiànmiàn?
usefulSentences.py_a: Xiàwǔ sān diǎn kěyǐ ma?
usefulSentences.en_q: What time should we meet?
usefulSentences.en_a: Is 3:00 PM okay?

usefulSentences.py_q: Zài nǎlǐ jiànmiàn bǐjiào fāngbiàn?
usefulSentences.py_a: Zài huǒchēzhàn ménkǒu ba.
usefulSentences.en_q: Where is it more convenient to meet?
usefulSentences.en_a: Let's meet at the train station entrance.

usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ yǒu shéme jìhuà ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ dǎsuàn qù Kěndīng wán.
usefulSentences.en_q: What plans do you have?
usefulSentences.en_a: I plan to go to Kenting.

usefulSentences.py_q: Bùjiàn bùsàn!
usefulSentences.py_a: Hǎo, míngtiān jiàn!
usefulSentences.en_q: Be there or be square!
usefulSentences.en_a: Okay, see you tomorrow!

paragraphs.zh: 與朋友約定時間和地點是一門學問。首先，你應該先詢問對方的意願和空閒時間，而不是直接要求對方配合你。這顯示了你對他人的尊重。
paragraphs.py: Yǔ péngyǒu yuēdìng shíjiān hé dìdiǎn shì yī mén xuéwèn. Shǒuxiān, nǐ yīnggāi xiān xúnwèn duìfāng de yìyuàn hé kòngxián shíjiān, ér bùshì zhíjiē yāoqiú duìfāng pèihé nǐ. Zhè xiǎnshìle nǐ duì tārén de zūnzhòng.
paragraphs.en: Negotiating time and place with friends is a skill. First, you should ask about the other person's wishes and free time, rather than directly demanding them to cooperate with you. This shows your respect for others.

paragraphs.zh: 其次，選擇一個對雙方都方便的地點非常重要。火車站、捷運站或是知名的地標都是不錯的選擇。在確定時間後，最好再次確認細節，以防出現誤差。
paragraphs.py: Qícì, xuǎnzé yīgè duì shuāngfāng dōu fāngbiàn de dìdiǎn fēicháng zhòngyào. Huǒchēzhàn, jiéyùnzhàn huòshì zhīmíng de dìbiāo dōu shì bùcuò de xuǎnzé. Zài quèdìng shíjiān hòu, zuì hǎo zàicì quèrèn xìjié, yǐ fáng chūxiàn wùchā.
paragraphs.en: Secondly, choosing a location convenient for both parties is very important. Train stations, MRT stations, or well-known landmarks are all good choices. After confirming the time, it's best to confirm the details again to prevent errors.

paragraphs.zh: 如果因為突發狀況需要更改計畫，應該盡早通知對方並表示歉意。誠實的溝通能避免誤會，維持良好的友誼。最後，記得準時到達，這是基本的社交禮儀。
paragraphs.py: Rúguǒ yīnwèi tūfā zhuàngkuàng xūyào gēnggǎi jìhuà, yīnggāi jǐnzǎo tōngzhī duìfāng bìng biǎoshì qiànyì. Chéngshí de gōutōng néng bìmiǎn wùhuì, wéichí liánghǎo de yǒuyì. Zuìhòu, jìdé zhǔnshí dàodá, zhè shì jīběn de shèjiāo lǐyí.
paragraphs.en: If you need to change plans due to an emergency, you should notify the other person as soon as possible and apologize. Honest communication can avoid misunderstandings and maintain good friendship. Finally, remember to arrive on time, which is basic social etiquette.

comprehension.question: 約定時間的第一步應該是什麼？
options: 詢問對方的意願和空閒時間

comprehension.question: 哪裡是不錯的見面地點？
如果需要更改計畫應該怎麼做？

quiz.question: 「不見不散」通常用於：
options: 確定約會，強調一定會見面

scenarios.title: Changing Plans
scenarios.description: Apologizing for a delay or requesting to reschedule an appointment.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 喂，不好意思，我今天可能要遲到十分鐘。
dialogue.py: Wéi, bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ jīntiān kěnéng yào chídào shí fēnzhōng.
dialogue.en: Hello, sorry, I might be ten minutes late today.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒關係，發生什麼事了？
dialogue.py: Méiguānxì, fāshēng shéme shìle?
dialogue.en: No problem, what happened?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 路上的交通非常塞，車子根本動不了。
dialogue.py: Lùshàng de jiāotōng fēicháng sāi, chēzi gēnběn dòng bùliǎo.
dialogue.en: The traffic on the road is very congested, the cars can't move at all.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 今天是週五，塞車很正常。你慢慢開，安全第一。
dialogue.py: Jīntiān shì zhōuwǔ, sāichē hěn zhèngcháng. Nǐ mànmàn kāi, ānquán dì yī.
dialogue.en: Today is Friday, traffic is normal. Drive slowly, safety first.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝你的體諒。我一到就聯絡你。
dialogue.py: Xièxiè nǐ de tǐliàng. Wǒ yī dào jiù liánlì nǐ.
dialogue.en: Thanks for your understanding. I'll contact you as soon as I arrive.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好，我先在門口等。不急。
dialogue.py: Hǎo, wǒ xiān zài ménkǒu děng. Bù jí.
dialogue.en: Okay, I'll wait at the entrance first. No rush.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 真的太抱歉了。
dialogue.py: Zhēnde tài bàoqiàn le.
dialogue.en: I'm really so sorry.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 別在意，待會見。
dialogue.py: Bié zàiyì, dài huì jiàn.
dialogue.en: Don't mind, see you later.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 待會見！
dialogue.py: Dài huì jiàn!
dialogue.en: See you later!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 拜拜！
dialogue.py: Bàibài!
dialogue.en: Bye!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 喂，小美，真的很抱歉，我明天沒辦法去吃飯了。
dialogue.py: Wéi, Xiǎoměi, zhēnde hěn bàoqiàn, wǒ míngtiān méi bànfǎ qù chīfàn le.
dialogue.en: Hello, Xiao Mei, I'm really sorry, I can't go to dinner tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 怎麼了？是有什麼突發狀況嗎？
dialogue.py: Zěnmele? Shì yǒu shéme tūfā zhuàngkuàng ma?
dialogue.en: What's wrong? Is there an emergency?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我剛接到公司的電話，明天臨時要加一整天的班。
dialogue.py: Wǒ gāng jiē dào gōngsī de diànhuà, míngtiān línshí yào jiā yī zhěng tiān de bān.
dialogue.en: I just got a call from the company, I have to work overtime all day tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 這樣啊，那也沒辦法。工作比較重要。
dialogue.py: Zhèyàng a, nà yě méi bànfǎ. Gōngzuò bǐjiào zhòngyào.
dialogue.en: I see, then there's no help for it. Work is more important.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我真的很期待這次聚會的，沒想到會突然要加班。
dialogue.py: Wǒ zhēnde hěn qīdài zhè cì jùhuì de, méi xiǎngdào huì tūrán yào jiābān.
dialogue.en: I was really looking forward to this gathering, didn't expect to have to work overtime suddenly.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒事啦，我們下次再約就好了。你也不想加班吧？
dialogue.py: Méishì la, wǒmen xià cì zài yuē jiù hǎole. Nǐ yě bùxiǎng jiābān ba?
dialogue.en: It's okay, we'll just reschedule for next time. You don't want to work overtime either, right?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 對啊，想到週末要待在辦公室就覺得累。
dialogue.py: Duì a, xiǎngdào zhōumò yào dài zài bàngōngshì jiù juédé lèi.
dialogue.en: Exactly, thinking about staying in the office on the weekend makes me tired.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 那下週末你有空嗎？同樣的時間？
dialogue.py: Nà xià zhōumò nǐ yǒu kòng ma? Tóngyàng de shíjiān?
dialogue.en: Are you free next weekend then? Same time?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 下週六我目前沒事，應該可以。
dialogue.py: Xià zhōu liù wǒ mùqián méishì, yīnggāi kěyǐ.
dialogue.en: Next Saturday I have nothing so far, it should be fine.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好，那我們就先暫定下週六。如果你公司又有事，再提早跟我說。
dialogue.py: Hǎo, nà wǒmen jiù xiān zhàndìng xià zhōu liù. Rúguǒ nǐ gōngsī yòu yǒushì, zài tízǎo gēn wǒ shuō.
dialogue.en: Okay, then we'll tentatively set it for next Saturday. If your company has something again, let me know in advance.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 一定。為了表示歉意，下次我請客！
dialogue.py: Yīdìng. Wèile biǎoshì qiànyì, xià cì wǒ qǐngkè!
dialogue.en: Definitely. To show my apology, next time is on me!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 既然你都這麼說了，那我就不客氣囉。
dialogue.py: Jìrán nǐ dōu zhème shuōle, nà wǒ jiù bù kèqì luo.
dialogue.en: Since you said so, I won't be polite then.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，那就先這樣，我去準備明天的工作了。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, nà jiù xiān zhèyàng, wǒ qù zhǔnbèi míngtiān de gōngzuò le.
dialogue.en: No problem, that's all for now, I'm going to prepare for tomorrow's work.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 辛苦了，加油！
dialogue.py: Xīnkǔle, jiāyóu!
dialogue.en: You've been working hard, good luck!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝，拜拜！
dialogue.py: Xièxiè, bàibài!
dialogue.en: Thanks, bye!

usefulSentences.q: 不好意思，我今天會晚點到。
usefulSentences.py_q: Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ jīntiān huì wǎndiǎn dào.
usefulSentences.py_a: Méiguānxì, lùshàng xiǎoxīn.
usefulSentences.en_q: Sorry, I'll arrive late today.
usefulSentences.en_a: No problem, be careful on the road.

usefulSentences.q: 明天我臨時有事，沒辦法去了。
usefulSentences.py_q: Míngtiān wǒ línshí yǒushì, méi bànfǎ qùle.
usefulSentences.py_a: Méiguānxì, wǒmen xià cì zài yuē.
usefulSentences.en_q: Something came up tomorrow, I can't make it.
usefulSentences.en_a: No problem, let's reschedule for next time.

usefulSentences.a: 我查一下時間，應該可以。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ kěyǐ gǎi dào xià zhōu ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ chá yīxià shíjiān, yīnggāi kěyǐ.
usefulSentences.en_q: Can you change it to next week?
usefulSentences.en_a: Let me check the time, it should be fine.

usefulSentences.py_q: Zhēnde fēicháng bàoqiàn.
usefulSentences.py_a: Bié zàiyì, wǒ néng lǐjiě.
usefulSentences.en_q: I'm really very sorry.
usefulSentences.en_a: Don't mind, I can understand.

usefulSentences.py_q: Xià cì wǒ qǐngkè!
usefulSentences.py_a: Nà wǒ jiù bù kèqì le.
usefulSentences.en_q: Next time is on me!
usefulSentences.en_a: Then I won't be polite.

paragraphs.zh: 計畫趕不上變化，這是生活中常有的事。當你因為突發狀況而不得不更改或取消約定時，禮貌和誠實是非常重要的。第一時間通知對方，是基本的尊重。
paragraphs.py: Jìhuà gǎnbùshàng biànhuà, zhè shì shēnghuó zhōng cháng yǒu de shì. Dāng nǐ yīnwèi tūfā zhuàngkuàng ér bùdé bù gēnggǎi huò qǔxiāo yuēdìng shí, lǐmào hé chéngshí shì fēicháng zhòngyào de. Dì yī shíjiān tōngzhī duìfāng, shì jīběn de zūnzhòng.
paragraphs.en: Plans can't keep up with changes, which is a common occurrence in life. When you have to change or cancel an appointment due to an emergency, politeness and honesty are very important. Notifying the other person as soon as possible is basic respect.

paragraphs.zh: 在解釋原因時，儘量保持簡明扼要。無論是因為塞車、工作加班還是身體不適，誠實的理由通常都能得到對方的諒解。過度的藉口反而可能讓人感到不真誠。
paragraphs.py: Zài jiěshì yuányīn shí, jǐnliàng bǎochí jiǎnmíng èyào. Wúlùn shì yīnwèi sāichē, gōngzuò jiābān háishì shēntǐ bùshì, chéngshí de yuányīn tōngcháng dōu néng dédào duìfāng de liàngjiě. Guòdù de jièkǒu fǎn'ér kěnéng ràng rén gǎndào bù zhēnchéng.
paragraphs.en: When explaining the reason, try to keep it concise. Whether it's because of traffic, overtime work, or physical discomfort, honest reasons can usually be understood by the other person. Excessive excuses may instead make people feel insincere.

paragraphs.zh: 此外，主動提出替代方案也是展現誠意的好方法。例如，你可以主動提議改到下週，或是下次聚會時由你請客。這能讓對方感受到你依然重視這段友誼，並非刻意放鴿子。
paragraphs.py: Cǐwài, zhǔndòng tíchū tìdài fāng'àn yěshì zhǎnxiàn chéngyì de hǎo fāngfǎ. Lìrú, nǐ kěyǐ zhǔdòng tíyì gǎi dào xià zhōu, huòshì xià cì jùhuì shí yóu nǐ qǐngkè. Zhè néng ràng duìfāng gǎnshòudào nǐ yīrán zhòngshì zhè duàn yǒuyì, bìngfēi kèyì fànggēzi.
paragraphs.en: In addition, proactively proposing an alternative plan is also a good way to show sincerity. For example, you can suggest moving it to next week or offering to pay for the next gathering. This lets the other person feel that you still value this friendship and are not intentionally standing them up.

comprehension.question: 當需要更改計畫時，最重要的兩件事是什麼？
解釋原因時應該如何？
如何展現更改計畫的誠意？

title: Professional & Academic
description: Formal tone focusing on clarity, respect, and technical collaboration in workspace and academic settings.

sentence.zh: 這個項目的進度超前了。
sentence.py: Zhège xiàngmù de jìndù chāoqiánle.
sentence.en: The progress of this project is ahead of schedule.

sentence.zh: 我們需要每週匯報進度。
sentence.py: Wǒmen xūyào měizhōu huìbào jìndù.
sentence.en: We need to report progress every week.

sentence.zh: 這份報告必須在明天前完成。
sentence.py: Zhè fèn bàogào bìxū zài míngtiān qián wánchéng.
sentence.en: This report must be completed before tomorrow.

sentence.zh: 會議將在三號會議室舉行。
sentence.py: Huìyì jiāng zài sān hào huìyìshì jǔxíng.
sentence.en: The meeting will be held in conference room number three.

sentence.zh: 我們下午再討論細節。
sentence.py: Wǒmen xiàwǔ zài tǎolùn xìjié.
sentence.en: Let's discuss the details in the afternoon.

sentence.zh: 很高興能與貴公司合作。
sentence.py: Hěn gāoxìng néng yǔ guì gōngsī hézuò.
sentence.en: It's a pleasure to collaborate with your company.

sentence.zh: 謝謝你提供的寶貴回饋。
sentence.py: Xièxiè nǐ tígōng de bǎoguì huíkuì.
sentence.en: Thank you for the valuable feedback you provided.

sentence.zh: 你有什麼改進的建議嗎？
sentence.py: Nǐ yǒu shéme gǎijìn de jiànyì ma?
sentence.en: Do you have any suggestions for improvement?

sentence.zh: 我們要提高工作的效率。
sentence.py: Wǒmen yào tígāo gōngzuò de xiàolǜ.
sentence.en: We need to improve work efficiency.

sentence.zh: 這是我們本季度的目標。
sentence.py: Zhè shì wǒmen běn jìdù de mùbiāo.
sentence.en: This is our goal for this quarter.

sentence.zh: 截止日期是本週五下午五點。
sentence.py: Jiézhǐ rìqí shì běn zhōu wǔ xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn.
sentence.en: The deadline is 5 PM this Friday.

sentence.zh: 每個人都有特定的任務。
sentence.py: Měi gè rén dōu yǒu tèdìng de rènwù.
sentence.en: Everyone has a specific task.

sentence.zh: 我們需要找到一個雙贏的解決方案。
sentence.py: Wǒmen xūyào zhǎodào yīgè shuāngyíng de jiějué fāng'àn.
sentence.en: We need to find a win-win solution.

sentence.zh: 這對我們來說是一個巨大的挑戰。
sentence.py: Zhè duì wǒmen lái shuō shì yīgè jùdà de tiǎozhàn.
sentence.en: This is a huge challenge for us.

sentence.zh: 我們應該合理分配公司資源。
sentence.py: Wǒmen yīnggāi hélǐ fēnpèi gōngsī zīyuán.
sentence.en: We should allocate company resources reasonably.

sentence.zh: 這個項目超出了我們的預算。
sentence.py: Zhège xiàngmù chāochūle wǒmen de yùsuàn.
sentence.en: This project has exceeded our budget.

sentence.zh: 團隊精神是成功的關鍵。
sentence.py: Tuánduì jīngshén shì chénggōng de guānjiàn.
sentence.en: Team spirit is the key to success.

sentence.zh: 良好的溝通可以避免誤解。
sentence.py: Liánghǎo de gōutōng kěyǐ bìmiǎn wùjiě.
sentence.en: Good communication can avoid misunderstandings.

sentence.zh: 他在會議上的簡報非常精彩。
sentence.py: Tā zài huìyì shàng de jiǎnbào fēicháng jīngcǎi.
sentence.en: His presentation at the meeting was excellent.

sentence.zh: 數據顯示市場正在增長。
sentence.py: Shùjù xiǎnshì shìchǎng zhèngzài zēngzhǎng.
sentence.en: The data shows the market is growing.

sentence.zh: 我們需要深入分析競爭對手。
sentence.py: Wǒmen xūyào shēnrù fēnxī jìngzhēng duìshǒu.
sentence.en: We need to analyze our competitors in depth.

sentence.zh: 這項新技術將改變我們的產業。
sentence.py: Zhè xiàng xīn jìshù jiāng gǎibiàn wǒmen de chǎnyè.
sentence.en: This new technology will change our industry.

sentence.zh: 他對這方面的知識非常專業。
sentence.py: Tā duì zhè fāngmiàn de zhīshì fēicháng zhuānyè.
sentence.en: His knowledge in this area is very professional.

sentence.zh: 這個研究花費了三年的時間。
sentence.py: Zhège yánjiū huāfèile sān nián de shíjiān.
sentence.en: This research took three years.

sentence.zh: 他致力於學術交流活動。
sentence.py: Tā zhìlì yú xuéshù jiāoliú huódòng.
sentence.en: He is committed to academic exchange activities.

sentence.zh: 我的論文導師給了我很多幫助。
sentence.py: Wǒ de lùnwén dǎoshī gěile wǒ hěnduō bāngzhù.
sentence.en: My thesis advisor helped me a lot.

sentence.zh: 他在這家銀行做暑期實習。
sentence.py: Tā zài zhè jiā yínháng zuò shǔqí shíxí.
sentence.en: He is doing a summer internship at this bank.

sentence.zh: 請把你的履歷寄到我郵箱。
sentence.py: Qǐng bǎ nǐ de lǚlì jì dào wǒ yóuxiāng.
sentence.en: Please send your resume to my mailbox.

sentence.zh: 我明天下午有一個面試。
sentence.py: Wǒ míngtiān xiàwǔ yǒu yīgè miànshì.
sentence.en: I have an interview tomorrow afternoon.

sentence.zh: 恭喜你被這所大學錄取了。
sentence.py: Gōngxǐ nǐ bèi zhè suǒ dàxué lùqǔle.
sentence.en: Congratulations on being admitted to this university.

sentence.zh: 他因為表現優異而獲得升職。
sentence.py: Tā yīnwèi biǎoxiàn yōuyì ér huòdé shēngzhí.
sentence.en: He got a promotion because of his excellent performance.

sentence.zh: 老闆答應明年給全體員工加薪。
sentence.py: Lǎobǎn dāyìng míngnián gěi quántǐ yuángōng jiāxīn.
sentence.en: The boss promised a salary increase for all employees next year.

sentence.zh: 這週為了趕進度，我們都要加班。
sentence.py: Zhè zhōu wèile gǎn jìdù, wǒmen dōu yào jiābān.
sentence.en: To catch up on progress, we all have to work overtime this week.

sentence.zh: 經理下週要到台北出差。
sentence.py: Jīnglǐ xià zhōu yào dào Táiběi chūchāi.
sentence.en: The manager is going on a business trip to Taipei next week.

sentence.zh: 公司提供為期一週的新進員工培訓。
sentence.py: Gōngsī tígōng wéiqí yī zhōu de xīnjìn yuángōng péixùn.
sentence.en: The company provides a one-week training for new employees.

sentence.zh: 市場競爭非常激烈。
sentence.py: Shìchǎng jìngzhēng fēicháng jīliè.
sentence.en: Market competition is very intense.

sentence.zh: 我們需要開拓新的海外市場。
sentence.py: Wǒmen xūyào kāituò xīn de hǎiwài shìchǎng.
sentence.en: We need to expand into new overseas markets.

sentence.zh: 我們要時刻關注客戶的需求。
sentence.py: Wǒmen yào shíkè guānzhù kèhù de xūqiú.
sentence.en: We must always pay attention to the needs of our clients.

sentence.zh: 雙方將於明日正式簽約。
sentence.py: Shuāngfāng jiāng yú míngrì zhèngshì qiānyuē.
sentence.en: Both parties will formally sign the contract tomorrow.

sentence.zh: 我們需要調整銷售策略。
sentence.py: Wǒmen xūyào tiáozhěng xiāoshòu cèlüè.
sentence.en: We need to adjust our sales strategy.

sentence.zh: 他的辦公室在二十樓。
sentence.py: Tā de bàngōngshì zài èrshí lóu.
sentence.en: His office is on the 20th floor.

sentence.zh: 這台電腦的硬體配備很高。
sentence.py: Zhè tái diànnǎo de yìngtǐ pèibèi hěn gāo.
sentence.en: This computer has high hardware specifications.

sentence.zh: 我們公司開發了一款新軟體。
sentence.py: Wǒmen gōngsī kāifāle yī kuǎn xīn ruǎntǐ.
sentence.en: Our company has developed a new software.

sentence.zh: 請點擊這裡下載文件。
sentence.py: Qǐng diǎnjī zhèlǐ xiàzài wénjiàn.
sentence.en: Please click here to download the document.

sentence.zh: 安裝過程大約需要十分鐘。
sentence.py: Ānzhuāng guòchéng dàyuē xūyào shí fēnzhōng.
sentence.en: The installation process takes about ten minutes.

sentence.zh: 請輸入密碼以登錄系統。
sentence.py: Qǐng shūrù mìmǎ yǐ dēnglù xìtǒng.
sentence.en: Please enter your password to log in to the system.

sentence.zh: 電梯發生故障，正在維修中。
sentence.py: Diàntī fāshēng gùzhàng, zhèngzài wéixiū zhōng.
sentence.en: The elevator is out of order and is being repaired.

sentence.zh: 技術人員已經修復了系統漏洞。
sentence.py: Jìshù rényuán yǐjīng xiūfùle xìtǒng lòudòng.
sentence.en: Technicians have fixed the system vulnerability.

sentence.zh: 我和同事們相處得很融洽。
sentence.py: Wǒ hé tóngshìmen xiāngchǔ de hěn róngqià.
sentence.en: I get along very well with my colleagues.

sentence.zh: 職場中需要不斷學習新技能。
sentence.py: Zhíchǎng zhōng xūyào bùduàn xuéxí xīn jìnéng.
sentence.en: In the workplace, one needs to constantly learn new skills.

scenarios.title: Status Reporting
scenarios.description: Formal project updates in a professional environment.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 大家早安，我們現在開始週會。請各組報告進度。
dialogue.py: Dàjiā zǎo'ān, wǒmen xiànzài kāishǐ zhōuhuì. Qǐng gè zǔ bàogào jìndù.
dialogue.en: Good morning everyone, let's start the weekly meeting. Teams, please report your progress.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 目前前端開發已經完成了百分之八十。
dialogue.py: Mùqián qiánduān kāifā yǐjīng wánchéngle bǎifēnzhī bāshí.
dialogue.en: Currently, the front-end development is 80% complete.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 很好。那後端的進度呢？有沒有遇到什麼困難？
dialogue.py: Hěn hǎo. Nà hòuduān de jìndù ne? Yǒu méiyǒu yù dào shéme kùnnán?
dialogue.en: Good. What about the back-end progress? Any difficulties?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 後端遇到了一些資料庫對接的問題，稍微落後了一點。
dialogue.py: Hòuduān yù dào le yīxiē zīliàokù duìjiē de wèntí, shāowēi luòhòule yīdiǎn.
dialogue.en: The back-end encountered some database integration issues, so it's slightly behind.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 大概落後多久？會影響到最終的截止日期嗎？
dialogue.py: Dàgài luòhòu duōjiǔ? Huì yǐngxiǎng dào zuìzhōng de jiézhǐ rìqí ma?
dialogue.en: Roughly how far behind? Will it affect the final deadline?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 大約落後三天。我們會在本週加班趕回來。
dialogue.py: Dàyuē luòhòu sān tiān. Wǒmen huì zài běn zhōu jiābān gǎn huílái.
dialogue.en: About three days behind. We will work overtime this week to catch up.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好的，如果需要資源支援，隨時跟我說。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, rúguǒ xūyào zīyuán zhīyuán, suíshí gēn wǒ shuō.
dialogue.en: Okay, if you need resource support, let me know at any time.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 謝謝經理。我們預計下週一能完成全部對接。
dialogue.py: Xièxiè jīnglǐ. Wǒmen yùjì xià zhōuyī néng wánchéng quánbù duìjiē.
dialogue.en: Thank you, Manager. We expect to complete all integration by next Monday.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 另外，簡報準備好了嗎？客戶週三要聽匯報。
dialogue.py: Lìngwài, jiǎnbào zhǔnbèi hǎole ma? Kèhù zhōusān yào tīng huìbào.
dialogue.en: Also, is the presentation ready? The client wants a briefing on Wednesday.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 已經初步完成了，稍後我會寄給您審閱。
dialogue.py: Yǐjīng chūbù wánchéngle, shāohòu wǒ huì jì gěi nín shěnyuè.
dialogue.en: It's preliminarily finished. I'll send it to you for review later.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好的。今天會議先到這裡，大家辛苦了。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de. Jīntiān huìyì xiān dào zhèlǐ, dàjiā xīnkǔle.
dialogue.en: Alright. That's all for today's meeting. Good job everyone.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你那邊負責的項目目前狀況如何？
dialogue.py: Nǐ nàbiān fùzé de xiàngmù mùqián zhuàngkuàng rúhé?
dialogue.en: What's the current status of the project you're responsible for?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 目前都在預期進度內，市場調查已經結案了。
dialogue.py: Mùqián dōu zài yùqí jìndù nèi, shìchǎng diàochá yǐjīng jié'àn le.
dialogue.en: Everything is currently within the expected schedule. The market research has been closed.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 分析數據出來了嗎？有沒有什麼驚人的發現？
dialogue.py: Fēnxī shùjù chūláile ma? Yǒu méiyǒu shéme jīngrén de fāxiàn?
dialogue.en: Is the analyzed data out? Any surprising findings?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 數據顯示用戶對於新功能的需求比預期高出百分之三十。
dialogue.py: Shùjù xiǎnshì yònghù duìyú xīn gōngnéng de xūqiú bǐ yùqí gāo chū bǎifēnzhī sānshí.
dialogue.en: The data shows user demand for the new feature is 30% higher than expected.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那太棒了！這對我們的策略調整很有幫助。
dialogue.py: Nà tài bàngle! Zhè duì wǒmen de cèlüè tiáozhěng hěn yǒu bāngzhù.
dialogue.en: That's fantastic! This is very helpful for our strategy adjustment.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 是的，我正在根據這些數據撰寫詳細的分析報告。
dialogue.py: Shì de, wǒ zhèngzài gēnjù zhèxiē shùjù zhuànxiě xiángxì de fēnxī bàogào.
dialogue.en: Yes, I am writing a detailed analysis report based on this data.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 什麼時候可以提交報告？
dialogue.py: Shéme shíhòu kěyǐ tíjiāo bàogào?
dialogue.en: When can you submit the report?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我預計這週五下班前可以發給您。
dialogue.py: Wǒ yùjì zhè zhōuwǔ xiàwǔ qián kěyǐ fā gěi nín.
dialogue.en: I expect to send it to you before off-work this Friday.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好的，辛苦了。週末好好休息。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, xīnkǔle. Zhōumò hǎohǎo xiūxí.
dialogue.en: Alright, good job. Have a good rest this weekend.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 謝謝經理。
dialogue.py: Xièxiè jīnglǐ.
dialogue.en: Thank you, Manager.

usefulSentences.py_q: Mùqián de jìndù rúhé?
usefulSentences.py_a: Mùqián dōu zài jìndùbiǎo shàng.
usefulSentences.en_q: What's the current progress?
usefulSentences.en_a: Currently everything is on schedule.

usefulSentences.py_q: Yǒu méiyǒu yù dào shéme kùnnán?
usefulSentences.py_a: Mùqián méiyǒu, yīqiè shùnlì.
usefulSentences.en_q: Have you encountered any difficulties?
usefulSentences.en_a: None at the moment, everything is going smoothly.

usefulSentences.py_q: Jiézhǐ rìqí shì shéme shíhòu?
usefulSentences.py_a: Jiézhǐ rìqí shì xià zhōuyī.
usefulSentences.en_q: When is the deadline?
usefulSentences.en_a: The deadline is next Monday.

usefulSentences.q: 這份報告什麼時候可以完成？
usefulSentences.a: 我預計明天下午可以交。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhè fèn bàogào shéme shíhòu kěyǐ wánchéng?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ yùjì míngtiān xiàwǔ kěyǐ jiāo.
usefulSentences.en_q: When can this report be finished?
usefulSentences.en_a: I expect to hand it in tomorrow afternoon.

usefulSentences.a: 謝謝，如果有需要我會跟你說。
usefulSentences.py_q: Xūyào wǒ bāngmáng ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Xièxiè, rúguǒ yǒu xūyào wǒ huì gēn nǐ shuō.
usefulSentences.en_q: Do you need my help?
usefulSentences.en_a: Thanks, I'll let you know if I need anything.

paragraphs.zh: 在職場中，及時且準確的進度匯報是團隊合作成功的基石。透過定期的會議，團隊成員可以了解項目的整體走向，並發現潛在的問題。良好的溝通能讓每個人都對目標有清晰的認識。
paragraphs.py: Zài zhíchǎng zhōng, jíshí qiě zhǔnquè de jìndù huìbào shì tuánduì hézuò chénggōng de jīshí. Tòuguò dìngqí de huìyì, tuánduì yuángōng kěyǐ liǎojiě xiàngmù de zhěngtǐ zǒuxiàng, bìng fāxiàn qiánzài de wèntí. Liánghǎo de gōutōng néng ràng měi gè rén dōu duì mùbiāo yǒu qīngxī de rènshì.
paragraphs.en: In the workplace, timely and accurate progress reporting is the cornerstone of successful teamwork. Through regular meetings, team members can understand the overall direction of the project and discover potential issues. Good communication ensures everyone has a clear understanding of the goals.

paragraphs.zh: 當遇到困難或進度落後時，誠實地反應狀況比隱瞞問題更為重要。這能讓管理者及時調整資源，或提供必要的支援。透明的資訊流動有助於提高整體的效率，並建立同儕間的信任。
paragraphs.py: Dāng yù dào kùnnán huò jìndù luòhòu shí, chéngshí de fǎnyìng zhuàngkuàng bǐ yǐnmán wèntí gèng wèi zhòngyào. Zhè néng ràng guǎnlǐ zhě jíshí tiáozhěng zīyuán, huò tígōng bìyào de zhīyuán. Tòumíng de zīxùn liúdòng yǒu zhù yú tígāo zhěngtǐ de xiàolǜ, bìng jiànlì tóngchái jiān de xìnrèn.
paragraphs.en: When encountering difficulties or falling behind schedule, honestly reporting the situation is more important than hiding the problem. This allows managers to adjust resources in time or provide necessary support. Transparent information flow helps improve overall efficiency and build trust among peers.

paragraphs.zh: 此外，撰寫一份清晰、簡潔且數據導向的報告也是一項關鍵技能。一份好的報告不僅能反映工作成果，還能為未來的決策提供有力的依據。因此，每位職場人士都應不斷提升自己的匯報能力。
paragraphs.py: Cǐwài, zhuànxiě yī fèn qīngxī, jiǎnjié qiě shùjù dǎoxiàng de bàogào yěshì yī xiàng guānjiàn jìnéng. Yī fèn hǎo de bàogào bùjǐn néng fǎnyìng gōngzuò chéngguǒ, hái néng wèi wèilái de juécè tígōng yǒulì de yījù. Yīncǐ, měi wèi zhíchǎng rénshì dōu yīng bùduàn tíshēng zìjǐ de huìbào nénglì.
paragraphs.en: In addition, writing a clear, concise, and data-driven report is also a key skill. A good report not only reflects work achievements but also provides a strong basis for future decision-making. Therefore, every professional should constantly improve their reporting skills.

comprehension.question: 為什麼定期的會議很重要？
options: 了解項目走向並發現問題

comprehension.question: 遇到進度落後時應該怎麼辦？
一份好的報告應該具備什麼特點？

quiz.question: 當進度比計畫快時，可以說：

scenarios.title: Seeking Feedback
scenarios.description: Asking for constructive criticism on projects or performance.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你有空幫我看一下這份簡報草案嗎？
dialogue.py: Nǐ yǒu kòng bāng wǒ kàn yīxià zhè fèn jiǎnbào cǎo'àn ma?
dialogue.en: Do you have time to help me look over this presentation draft?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 當然可以，你最想知道哪方面的意見？
dialogue.py: Dāngrán kěyǐ, nǐ zuì xiǎng zhīdào nǎ fāngmiàn de yìjiàn?
dialogue.en: Of course. What aspect do you want feedback on most?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我想知道邏輯是否清晰，還有圖表是否容易理解。
dialogue.py: Wǒ xiǎng zhīdào luójí shìfǒu qīngxī, hái yǒu túbiǎo shìfǒu róngyì lǐjiě.
dialogue.en: I want to know if the logic is clear and if the charts are easy to understand.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好，我看完後給你反饋。你什麼時候需要？
dialogue.py: Hǎo, wǒ kàn wán hòu gěi nǐ huíkuì. Nǐ shéme shíhòu xūyào?
dialogue.en: Okay, I'll give you feedback after reading it. When do you need it?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 不急，明天下午之前給我就行。
dialogue.py: Bù jí, míngtiān xiàwǔ zhīqián gěi wǒ jiùxíng.
dialogue.en: No rush, just before tomorrow afternoon is fine.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題。初步看來，視覺設計很專業。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí. Chūbù kàn lái, shìjué shèjì hěn zhuānyè.
dialogue.en: No problem. From a first glance, the visual design is very professional.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝，我最擔心的就是內容太過冗長。
dialogue.py: Xièxiè, wǒ zuì dānxīn de jiùshì nèiróng tàiguò rǒngcháng.
dialogue.en: Thanks, my biggest worry is that the content is too long-winded.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我會幫你留意哪些部分可以精簡。
dialogue.py: Wǒ huì bāng nǐ liúyì nǎxiē bùfèn kěyǐ jīngjiǎn.
dialogue.en: I'll keep an eye out for parts that can be condensed for you.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 太感謝了，你的意見對我很重要。
dialogue.py: Tài gǎnxièle, nǐ de yìjiàn duì wǒ hěn zhòngyào.
dialogue.en: Thank you so much, your opinion is very important to me.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 別客氣，互相幫忙是應該的。
dialogue.py: Bié kèqì, hùxiāng bāngmáng shì yīnggāi de.
dialogue.en: You're welcome, it's only right to help each other out.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 經理，我想請教您對我上個月表現的看法。
dialogue.py: Jīnglǐ, wǒ xiǎng qǐngjiào nín duì wǒ shàng gè yuè biǎoxiàn de kànfǎ.
dialogue.en: Manager, I'd like to ask for your thoughts on my performance last month.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我很欣賞你的主動性，尤其是那個新項目的提案。
dialogue.py: Wǒ hěn xīnshǎng nǐ de zhǔdòngxìng, yóuqí shì nàge xīn xiàngmù de tí'àn.
dialogue.en: I really appreciate your initiative, especially that proposal for the new project.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝經理。那有沒有哪些地方是我需要改進的？
dialogue.py: Xièxiè jīnglǐ. Nà yǒu méiyǒu nǎxiē dìfāng shì wǒ xūyào gǎìjìn de?
dialogue.en: Thank you, Manager. Are there any areas where I need to improve?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 在團隊溝通方面，你可以再更積極一點。
dialogue.py: Zài tuánduì gōutōng fāngmiàn, nǐ kěyǐ zài gèng jījí yīdiǎn.
dialogue.en: In terms of team communication, you could be a bit more proactive.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我明白了，我會加強與其他部門的聯繫。
dialogue.py: Wǒ míngbáile, wǒ huì jiāqiáng yǔ qítā bùmén de liánxì.
dialogue.en: I understand, I will strengthen my contact with other departments.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 很好。另外，你的時間管理做得不錯，進度抓得很準。
dialogue.py: Hěn hǎo. Lìngwài, nǐ de shíjiān guǎnlǐ zuò de bùcuò, jìndù zhuā de hěn zhǔn.
dialogue.en: Good. Also, your time management is good, you keep on top of the schedule very well.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝您的肯定，我會繼續努力。
dialogue.py: Xièxiè nín de kěndìng, wǒ huì jìxù nǔlì.
dialogue.en: Thank you for the affirmation, I will continue to work hard.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 保持這種學習的態度，你很有潛力。
dialogue.py: Bǎochí zhè zhǒng xuéxí de tàidù, nǐ hěn yǒu qiánlì.
dialogue.en: Keep this learning attitude, you have a lot of potential.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我會的。再次感謝您的寶貴回饋。
dialogue.py: Wǒ huì de. Zàicì gǎnxiè nín de bǎoguì huíkuì.
dialogue.en: I will. Thank you again for your valuable feedback.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不客氣，有問題隨時來找我。
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì, yǒu wèntí suíshí lái zhǎo wǒ.
dialogue.en: You're welcome, come to me anytime if you have questions.

usefulSentences.q: 你對這個有什麼意見嗎？
usefulSentences.a: 我覺得整體不錯，但細節可以再調整。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ duì zhège yǒu shéme yìjiàn ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ juédé zhěngtǐ bùcuò, dàn xìjié kěyǐ zài tiáozhěng.
usefulSentences.en_q: Do you have any opinion on this?
usefulSentences.en_a: I think it's good overall, but details can be adjusted.

usefulSentences.q: 我需要改進的地方有哪些？
usefulSentences.a: 你的專業能力很強，但溝通可以更主動。
usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ xūyào gǎijìn de dìfāng yǒu nǎxiē?
usefulSentences.py_a: Nǐ de zhuānyè nénglì hěn qiáng, dàn gōutōng kěyǐ gèng zhǔdòng.
usefulSentences.en_q: What areas do I need to improve?
usefulSentences.en_a: Your professional skills are strong, but you could be more proactive in communication.

usefulSentences.py_q: Xièxiè nǐ de bǎoguì yìjiàn.
usefulSentences.py_a: Bié kèqì, xīwàng néng bāng dào nǐ.
usefulSentences.en_q: Thank you for your valuable opinion.
usefulSentences.en_a: You're welcome, I hope it helps.

usefulSentences.q: 你什麼時候方便給我反饋？
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ shéme shíhòu fāngbiàn gěi wǒ huíkuì?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ míngtiān xiàwǔ gěi nǐ hǎo ma?
usefulSentences.en_q: When would it be convenient for you to give me feedback?
usefulSentences.en_a: Shall I give it to you tomorrow afternoon?

usefulSentences.q: 這個提案你覺得可行嗎？
usefulSentences.a: 很有創意，但預算可能是一個問題。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhège tí'àn nǐ juédé kěxíng ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Hěn yǒu chuàngyì, dàn yùsuàn kěnéng shì yīgè wèntí.
usefulSentences.en_q: Do you think this proposal is feasible?
usefulSentences.en_a: It's very creative, but budget might be an issue.

paragraphs.zh: 在職業成長的道路上，徵求並接受他人的回饋是進步的捷徑。無論是來自上司、同事還是客戶的意見，都能幫助我們發現自己的盲點。抱持開放且虛心的態度，能讓我們從回饋中吸取營養。
paragraphs.py: Zài zhíyè chéngzhǎng de dàolù shàng, zhēngqiú bìng jiēshòu tārén de huíkuì shì jìnbù de jiéjìng. Wúlùn shì láizì shàngsī, tóngshì háishì kèhù de yìjiàn, dōu néng bāngzhù wǒmen fāxiàn zìjǐ de mángdiǎn. Bàochí kāifàng qiě xūxīn de tàidù, néng ràng wǒmen cóng huíkuì zhōng xīqǔ yíngyǎng.
paragraphs.en: On the path of career growth, seeking and accepting feedback from others is a shortcut to progress. Whether it's opinions from supervisors, colleagues, or clients, they all help us discover our blind spots. Maintaining an open and humble attitude allows us to gain insight from feedback.

paragraphs.zh: 同樣地，提供建設性的回饋也是一門藝術。好的回饋應該是具體的、客觀的，並針對行為而非個人。與其指責錯誤，不如提供改進的建議。透過這種正向的互動，團隊的氛圍會變得更加和諧且高效。
paragraphs.py: Tóngyàng de, tígōng jiànshèxìng de huíkuì yěshì yī mén xuéwèn. Hǎo de huíkuì yīnggāi shì jùtǐ de, kèguān de, bìng zhēnduì xíngwéi ér fēi gèrén. Yǔqí zhǐzé cuòwù, bùrú tígōng gǎijìn de jiànyì. Tòuguò zhè zhǒng zhèngxiàng de hùdòng, tuánduì de fēnwéi huì biàndé gèngjiā héxié qiě gāoxiào.
paragraphs.en: Similarly, providing constructive feedback is also an art. Good feedback should be specific, objective, and directed at behavior rather than the individual. Instead of blaming errors, it's better to offer suggestions for improvement. Through this positive interaction, the team atmosphere becomes more harmonious and efficient.

paragraphs.zh: 最後，要學會區分回饋的質量。並非所有的意見都具備參考價值，我們需要學會過濾掉情緒化的指責，專注於對提升工作質量有幫助的資訊。這是一種職場智慧，也是成熟職場人的表現。
paragraphs.py: Zuìhòu, yào xuéhuì qūfēn huíkuì de zhìliàng. Bìngfēi suǒyǒu de yìjiàn dōu jùbèi cānkǎo jiàzhí, wǒmen xūyào xuéhuì guòlǜ diào qíngxùhuà de zhǐzé, zhuānzhù yú duì tíshēng gōngzuò zhìliàng yǒu bāngzhù de zīxùn. Zhè shì yī zhǒng zhíchǎng zhìhuì, yěshì chéngshú zhíchǎng rén de biǎoxiàn.
paragraphs.en: Finally, one must learn to distinguish the quality of feedback. Not all opinions are worth following; we need to learn to filter out emotional accusations and focus on information helpful for improving work quality. This is a form of workplace wisdom and a sign of a mature professional.

comprehension.question: 為什麼要接受他人的回饋？
好的回饋應該具備什麼特點？
面對所有的意見，我們應該：
options: 學會過濾並專注有幫助的資訊

quiz.question: 「請教」通常用於：
options: 謙虛地向別人詢問意見

scenarios.title: Troubleshooting
scenarios.description: Handling technical issues and finding solutions.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你好，我的電腦剛才突然藍屏了，現在無法開機。
dialogue.py: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ de diànnǎo gāngcái tūrán lánpíngle, xiànzài wúfǎ kāijī.
dialogue.en: Hello, my computer suddenly had a blue screen just now, and now it won't turn on.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 別擔心，請告訴我您的員工編號和電腦型號。
dialogue.py: Bié dānxīn, qǐng gàosù wǒ nín de yuángōng biānhào hé diànnǎo xínghào.
dialogue.en: Don't worry, please tell me your employee ID and computer model.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 編號是12345，型號是T490。
dialogue.py: Biānhào shì 12345, xínghào shì T490.
dialogue.en: ID is 12345, model is T490.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 收到。請問藍屏前您正在執行什麼程式？
dialogue.py: Shōudào. Qǐngwèn lánpíng qián nín zhèngzài zhíxíng shéme chéngshì?
dialogue.en: Received. What programs were you running before the blue screen?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我正在安裝一個新的數據分析軟體。
dialogue.py: Wǒ zhèngzài ānzhuāng yīgè xīn de shùjù fēnxī ruǎntǐ.
dialogue.en: I was installing a new data analysis software.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 可能是軟體衝突導致的。請嘗試按住電源鍵十秒強制重啟。
dialogue.py: Kěnéng shì ruǎntǐ chōngtú dǎozhì de. Qǐng chángshì àn zhù diànyuán jiàn shí miǎo qiángzhì chóngqǐ.
dialogue.en: It might be a software conflict. Please try holding the power button for ten seconds to force a restart.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我試過了，但螢幕還是黑的。
dialogue.py: Wǒ shìguòle, dàn yíngmù háishì hēi de.
dialogue.en: I tried, but the screen is still black.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 那可能是硬體故障。我會安排工程師過去檢查。
dialogue.py: Nà kěnéng shì yìngtǐ gùzhàng. Wǒ huì ānpái gōngchéngshī guòqù jiǎnchá.
dialogue.en: Then it might be a hardware failure. I'll arrange for an engineer to come check it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 大概要等多久？我急著要處理一份報告。
dialogue.py: Dàgài yào děng duōjiǔ? Wǒ jízhe yào chǔlǐ yī fèn bàogào.
dialogue.en: About how long will I have to wait? I'm in a hurry to handle a report.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 大約十五分鐘內。您可以先到公用區使用備用電腦。
dialogue.py: Dàyuē shíwǔ fēnzhōng nèi. Nín kěyǐ xiān dào gōngyòng qū shǐyòng bèiyòng diànnǎo.
dialogue.en: Within about 15 minutes. You can go to the common area to use a spare computer first.

subConversations.type: Debugging a Bug with a Peer

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這段程式碼一直報錯，但我找不到原因。
dialogue.py: Zhè duàn chéngshìmǎ yīzhí bàocuò, dàn wǒ zhǎobùdào yuányīn.
dialogue.en: This piece of code keeps throwing errors, but I can't find the reason.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 報錯訊息是什麼？我們一起分析一下。
dialogue.py: Bàocuò xùnxí shì shéme? Wǒmen yīqǐ fēnxī yīxià.
dialogue.en: What's the error message? Let's analyze it together.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 它說是資料類型不匹配。
dialogue.py: Tā shuō shì zīliào lèixíng bù pǐpèi.
dialogue.en: It says data type mismatch.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 你看第45行，這裡的輸入參數應該是整數，但你傳了字串。
dialogue.py: Nǐ kàn dì sìshíwǔ háng, zhèlǐ de shūrù cānshù yīnggāi shì zhěngshù, dàn nǐ chuánle zìchuàn.
dialogue.en: Look at line 45, the input parameter here should be an integer, but you passed a string.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 喔！我看到了，真是不小心。
dialogue.py: Ō! Wǒ kàndàole, zhēnshi bù xiǎoxīn.
dialogue.en: Oh! I see it now, I was really careless.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒關係，大家都會犯這種錯。改過來再跑一次看看。
dialogue.py: Méiguānxì, dàjiā dōu huì fàn zhè zhǒng cuò. Gǎiguò lái zài pǎo yīcì kàn kàn.
dialogue.en: No problem, everyone makes these kinds of mistakes. Change it and run it again.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 改好了。嘿！運行成功了！
dialogue.py: Gǎihǎole. Hēi! Yùnxíng chénggōngle!
dialogue.en: Fixed. Hey! It ran successfully!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 太好了！問題解決了。
dialogue.py: Tài hǎole! Wèntí jiějuéle.
dialogue.en: Great! Problem solved.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝你的幫忙，不然我可能要弄一整天。
dialogue.py: Xièxiè nǐ de bāngmáng, bùrán wǒ kěnéng yào nòng yī zhěng tiān.
dialogue.en: Thanks for your help, otherwise I might have spent all day on it.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不客氣，我們是團隊嘛。
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì, wǒmen shì tuánduì ma.
dialogue.en: You're welcome, we're a team.

usefulSentences.q: 我的電腦無法登錄系統。
usefulSentences.a: 請確認您的用戶名和密碼是否正確。
usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ de diànnǎo wúfǎ dēnglù xìtǒng.
usefulSentences.py_a: Qǐng quèrèn nín de yònghù míng hé mìmǎ shìfǒu zhèngquè.
usefulSentences.en_q: My computer cannot log into the system.
usefulSentences.en_a: Please confirm if your username and password are correct.

usefulSentences.a: 我幫你檢查一下路由器。
usefulSentences.py_q: Wǎng lù liánxiàn hǎoxiàng yǒu wèntí.
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ bāng nǐ jiǎnchá yīxià lùyóuqì.
usefulSentences.en_q: The network connection seems to have a problem.
usefulSentences.en_a: I'll check the router for you.

usefulSentences.a: 試試看重新安裝或是更新到最新版本。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhège ruǎntǐ yīzhí zài shǎntuì.
usefulSentences.py_a: Shìshì kàn chóngxīn ānzhuāng huòshì gēngxīn dào zuìxīn bǎnběn.
usefulSentences.en_q: This software keeps crashing.
usefulSentences.en_a: Try reinstalling it or updating to the latest version.

usefulSentences.a: 請按照螢幕上的指示取出卡住的紙張。
usefulSentences.py_q: Yìnbiǎojī kǎzhǐle zěnmeyàng?
usefulSentences.py_a: Qǐng ànzhào yíngmù shàng de zhǐshì qǔchū kǎ zhù de zhǐzhāng.
usefulSentences.en_q: What should I do if the printer has a paper jam?
usefulSentences.en_a: Please follow the instructions on the screen to remove the jammed paper.

usefulSentences.q: 技術人員什麼時候會到？
usefulSentences.a: 他們大約十分鐘後會到達您的辦公室。
usefulSentences.py_q: Jìshù rényuán shéme shíhòu huì dào?
usefulSentences.py_a: Tāmen dàyuē shí fēnzhōng hòu huì dàodá nín de bàngōngshì.
usefulSentences.en_q: When will the technicians arrive?
usefulSentences.en_a: They will arrive at your office in about ten minutes.

paragraphs.zh: 在數位化時代，每個人在工作中都難免會遇到技術故障。遇到問題時，保持冷靜是第一步。慌張往往會導致錯誤的操作，進而讓問題變得更複雜。記錄下錯誤訊息，能幫助技術人員更快定位問題。
paragraphs.py: Zài shùwèihuà shídài, měi gè rén zài gōngzuò zhōng dōu nánmiǎn huì yù dào jìshù gùzhàng. Yù dào wèntí shí, bǎochí lěngjìng shì dì yī bù. Huāngzhāng wǎngwǎng huì dǎozhì cuòwù de cāozuò, jìn'ér ràng wèntí biàndé gèng fùzá. Jìlù xià cuòwù xùnxí, néng bāngzhù jìshù rényuán gèng kuài dìngwèi wèntí.
paragraphs.en: In the digital age, everyone inevitably encounters technical failures at work. When facing a problem, staying calm is the first step. Panicking often leads to incorrect operations, which in turn makes the problem more complex. Recording error messages can help technicians locate the problem faster.

paragraphs.zh: 其次，嘗試基本的排除方法，如重啟設備、檢查網路連線或更新軟體。許多常見的小問題都可以透過這些簡單的步驟解決。如果問題依然存在，應及時向專業的技術支援團隊求助，並清晰地描述問題的現象。
paragraphs.py: Qícì, chángshì jīběn de páichú fāngfǎ, rú chóngqǐ shèbèi, jiǎnchá wǎng lù liánxiàn huò gēngxīn ruǎntǐ. Xǔduō chángjiàn de xiǎo wèntí dōu kěyǐ tòuguò zhèxiē jiǎndān de bùzhòu jiějué. Rúguǒ wèntí yīrán cúnzài, yīng jíshí xiàng zhuānyè de jìshù zhīyuán tuánduì qiúzhù, bìng qīngxī de miáoshù wèntí de xiànxiàng.
paragraphs.en: Secondly, try basic troubleshooting methods such as restarting the device, checking the network connection, or updating software. Many common small issues can be resolved through these simple steps. If the problem persists, you should seek help from a professional technical support team in time and clearly describe the symptoms of the problem.

paragraphs.zh: 最後，從問題中學習。了解故障發生的原因，可以幫助我們在未來避免類似的情況。良好的維護習慣，如定期備份重要資料和清理系統，能有效降低技術故障發生的機率。預防勝於治療，這在技術領域同樣適用。
paragraphs.py: Zuìhòu, cóng wèntí zhōng xuéxí. Liǎojiě gùzhàng fāshēng de yuányīn, kěyǐ bāngzhù wǒmen zài wèilái bìmiǎn lèisì de qíngkuàng. Liánghǎo de wéihù xíguàn, rú dìngqí bèifèn zhòngyào zīliào hé qīnglǐ xìtǒng, néng yǒuxiào jiàngdī jìshù gùzhàng fāshēng de jīlǜ. Yùfáng shèng yú zhìliáo, zhè zài jìshù lǐngyù tóngyàng shìyòng.
paragraphs.en: Finally, learn from the problem. Understanding the cause of the failure can help us avoid similar situations in the future. Good maintenance habits, such as regularly backing up important data and cleaning the system, can effectively reduce the probability of technical failures. Prevention is better than cure, and this applies equally in the technical field.

comprehension.question: 遇到技術問題時，第一步應該做什麼？
哪些是基本的故障排除方法？
如何降低技術故障發生的機率？
options: 定期備份資料和清理系統

quiz.question: 「備份」的意思是：
options: 複製並保存檔案以防丟失

scenarios.title: Workspace Logistics
scenarios.description: Managing office resources and logistical arrangements.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我想預約明天下午兩點的會議室。
dialogue.py: Wǒ xiǎng yùyuē míngtiān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn de huìyìshì.
dialogue.en: I'd like to book a meeting room for 2 PM tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 請問預計有多少人參加？需要多大的空間？
dialogue.py: Qǐngwèn yùjì yǒu duōshǎo rén cānjiā? Xūyào duōdà de kōngjiān?
dialogue.en: How many people are expected to attend? How much space do you need?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 大約十個人。我們需要有投影設備。
dialogue.py: Dàyuē shí gè rén. Wǒmen xūyào yǒu tóuyǐng shèbèi.
dialogue.en: About ten people. We need projection equipment.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，B號會議室目前那個時段是空的。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, B hào huìyìshì mùqián nàge shíduàn shì kōng de.
dialogue.en: Okay, Meeting Room B is currently empty during that slot.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 太好了，請幫我登記，預計使用兩小時。
dialogue.py: Tài hǎole, qǐng bāng wǒ dēngjì, yùjì shǐyòng liǎng xiǎoshí.
dialogue.en: Great, please register it for me. We expect to use it for two hours.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 已經幫您登記好了。如果您需要茶水服務，請提早告知。
dialogue.py: Yǐjīng bāng nín dēngjì hǎole. Rúguǒ nín xūyào cháshuǐ fúwù, qǐng tízǎo gàozhī.
dialogue.en: It's all set for you. If you need tea service, please let us know in advance.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好的，謝謝。另外，我們還需要幾個白板筆。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, xièxiè. Lìngwài, wǒmen hái xūyào jǐ gè báibǎnbǐ.
dialogue.en: Okay, thanks. Also, we'll need a few whiteboard markers.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，我會先放在桌上。還有其他需求嗎？
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, wǒ huì xiān fàng zài zhuō shàng. Hái yǒu qítā xūqiú ma?
dialogue.en: No problem, I'll put them on the table first. Anything else?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 目前沒有了，謝謝你的協助。
dialogue.py: Mùqián méiyǒule, xièxiè nǐ de xiézhù.
dialogue.en: That's all for now, thanks for your assistance.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不客氣，祝您會議順利。
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì, zhù nín huìyì shùnlì.
dialogue.en: You're welcome, hope your meeting goes well.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 行政部你好，我想申領一些辦公用品。
dialogue.py: Xíngzhèng bù nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng shēnlǐng yīxiē bàngōng yòngpǐn.
dialogue.en: Hello, Administration Department, I'd like to request some office supplies.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，請列出您需要的清單。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, qǐng liè chū nín xūyào de qīngdān.
dialogue.en: Sure, please list the items you need.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我需要三盒原子筆、五包影印紙和兩台計算機。
dialogue.py: Wǒ xūyào sān hé yuánzǐbǐ, wǔ bāo yǐngyìnzhǐ hé liǎng tái jìsuànjī.
dialogue.en: I need three boxes of ballpoint pens, five packs of printer paper, and two calculators.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 計算機目前庫存不足，我們需要採購，可能要等兩天。
dialogue.py: Jìsuànjī mùqián kùcún bùzú, wǒmen xūyào cǎigòu, kěnéng yào děng liǎng tiān.
dialogue.en: We're currently low on calculators and need to purchase them; it might take two days.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒關係，其他的可以先給我們嗎？
dialogue.py: Méiguānxì, qítā de kěyǐ xiān gěi wǒmen ma?
dialogue.en: That's fine, can we have the others first?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，您下午可以過來領取，或是我們送過去。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, nín xiàwǔ kěyǐ guòlái lǐngqǔ, huòshì wǒmen sòng guòqù.
dialogue.en: No problem, you can come pick them up this afternoon, or we can deliver them to you.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 如果不麻煩的話，請幫我們送過來，謝謝。
dialogue.py: Rúguǒ bù máfan de huà, qǐng bāng wǒmen sòng guòlái, xièxiè.
dialogue.en: If it's not too much trouble, please deliver them to us, thanks.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，沒問題。請在這裡簽個名。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, méi wèntí. Qǐng zài zhèlǐ qiān gè míng.
dialogue.en: Sure, no problem. Please sign here.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 簽好了。計算機到的時候再麻煩通知我。
