dialogue.py: Qiānhǎole. Jìsuànjī dào de shíhòu zài máfan tōngzhī wǒ.
dialogue.en: All signed. Please let me know when the calculators arrive.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 一定會的，再見。
dialogue.py: Yīdìng huì de, zàijiàn.
dialogue.en: Will do, goodbye.

usefulSentences.a: 您可以透過公司系統或直接向行政部預約。
usefulSentences.py_q: Rúhé yùyuē huìyìshì?
usefulSentences.py_a: Nín kěyǐ tòuguò gōngsī xìtǒng huò zhíjiē xiàng xíngzhèng bù yùyuē.
usefulSentences.en_q: How do I book a meeting room?
usefulSentences.en_a: You can book through the company system or directly with the admin department.

usefulSentences.q: 辦公用品快用完了怎麼辦？
usefulSentences.a: 請填寫申領單交給行政部。
usefulSentences.py_q: Bàngōng yòngpǐn kuài yòng wánle zěnmeyàng?
usefulSentences.py_a: Qǐng tiánxiě shēnlǐng dān jiāo gěi xíngzhèng bù.
usefulSentences.en_q: What if we're running out of office supplies?
usefulSentences.en_a: Please fill out a request form and give it to the admin department.

usefulSentences.q: 飲水機沒水了，可以幫忙換嗎？
usefulSentences.a: 好的，我馬上安排工作人員去更換。
usefulSentences.py_q: Yǐnshuǐjī méishuǐle, kěyǐ bāngmáng huàn ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Hǎo de, wǒ mǎshàng ānpái gōngzuò rényuán qù gēnghuàn.
usefulSentences.en_q: The water dispenser is empty, can you help change it?
usefulSentences.en_a: Sure, I'll arrange for staff to change it immediately.

usefulSentences.a: 有的，在休息室提供免費的咖啡和茶。
usefulSentences.py_q: Gōngsī yǒu tígōng cháshuǐ ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Yǒu de, zài xiūxíshì tígōng miǎnfèi de kāfēi hé chá.
usefulSentences.en_q: Does the company provide refreshments?
usefulSentences.en_a: Yes, free coffee and tea are available in the breakroom.

usefulSentences.q: 這份文件需要影印幾份？
usefulSentences.a: 請幫我準備十份，雙面列印。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhè fèn wénjiàn xūyào yǐngyìn jǐ fèn?
usefulSentences.py_a: Qǐng bāng wǒ zhǔnbèi shí fèn, shuāngmiàn lièyìn.
usefulSentences.en_q: How many copies of this document do you need?
usefulSentences.en_a: Please prepare ten copies for me, double-sided printing.

paragraphs.zh: 高效的辦公室後勤是公司運作的潤滑劑。從會議室的預約到辦公用品的供應，每一個環節都影響著員工的工作效率。一個井然有序的辦公環境，能讓員工更專注於核心任務。
paragraphs.py: Gāoxiào de bàngōngshì hòuqín shì gōngsī yùnzuò de rùnhuájì. Cóng huìyìshì de yùyuē dào bàngōng yòngpǐn de gōngyìng, měi yīgè huánjié dōu yǐngxiǎngzhe yuángōng de gōngzuò xiàolǜ. Yīgè jǐngrán yǒuxù de bàngōng huánjìng, néng ràng yuángōng gèng zhuānzhù yú héxīn rènwù.
paragraphs.en: Efficient office logistics are the lubricant for company operations. From meeting room bookings to the supply of office materials, every link affects employee productivity. An orderly office environment allows employees to focus more on core tasks.

paragraphs.zh: 行政部門扮演著至關重要的角色。他們不僅負責維護辦公設施，還要處理各種繁瑣的行政事務。員工應遵守公司的資源使用規範，如節約用電、合理申領物資，這有助於降低營運成本並實踐環保理念。
paragraphs.py: Xíngzhèng bùmén bànyǎnzhe zhìguān zhòngyào de juésè. Tāmen bùjǐn fùzé wéihù bàngōng shèshī, hái yào chǔlǐ gèzhǒng fánsuǒ de xíngzhèng shìwù. Yuángōng yīng zūnshǒu gōngsī de zīyuán shǐyòng guīfàn, rú jiéyuē yòngdiàn, hélǐ shēnlǐng wùzī, zhè yǒu zhù yú jiàngdī yíngyùn chéngběn bìng shíjiàn huánbǎo lǐniàn.
paragraphs.en: The administration department plays a vital role. They are not only responsible for maintaining office facilities but also for handling various tedious administrative matters. Employees should follow the company's resource usage guidelines, such as saving electricity and requesting materials reasonably, which helps reduce operating costs and practice environmental concepts.

paragraphs.zh: 此外，良好的後勤支援也能提升員工的福利感。例如，乾淨的休息室、充足的飲用水以及定期的健康檢查，都能讓員工感受到公司的關懷。這對於留住人才、提升團隊凝聚力具有正面的作用。
paragraphs.py: Cǐwài, liánghǎo de hòuqín zhīyuán yě néng tíshēng yuángōng de fúlì gǎn. Lìrú, gānjìng de xiūxíshì, chōngzú de yǐnyòngshuǐ yǐjí dìngqí de jiànkāng jiǎnchá, dōu néng ràng yuángōng gǎnshòudào gōngsī de guānhuái. Zhè duìyú liúzhù réncái, tíshēng tuánduì níngjùlì jùyǒu zhèngmiàn de zuòyòng.
paragraphs.en: In addition, good logistical support can also enhance employees' sense of well-being. For example, clean rest areas, sufficient drinking water, and regular health check-ups all let employees feel the company's care. This has a positive effect on retaining talent and enhancing team cohesion.

comprehension.question: 辦公室後勤對公司有什麼作用？
員工在資源使用上應該注意什麼？
options: 節約用電、合理申領物資

comprehension.question: 良好的後勤支援如何提升員工凝聚力？
options: 讓員工感受到公司的關懷

scenarios.title: Networking
scenarios.description: Making professional connections and following up.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 您好，我很欣賞您剛才關於人工智慧的演講。
dialogue.py: Nín hǎo, wǒ hěn xīnshǎng nín gāngcái guānyú réngōng zhìhuì de yǎnjiǎng.
dialogue.en: Hello, I really enjoyed your talk on Artificial Intelligence just now.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 謝謝。我是林強，在科技大學擔任教授。請問您是？
dialogue.py: Xièxiè. Wǒ shì Lín Qiáng, zài kējì dàxué dānrèn jiàoshòu. Qǐngwèn nín shì?
dialogue.en: Thank you. I'm Lin Qiang, a professor at the University of Science and Technology. And you are?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我是王大衛，目前在一家新創公司擔任產品經理。
dialogue.py: Wǒ shì Wáng Dàwèi, mùqián zài yījiā xīnchuàng gōngsī dānrèn chǎnpǐn jīnglǐ.
dialogue.en: I'm David Wang, currently a product manager at a startup.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 很高興認識你。你們公司目前主要研究哪個領域？
dialogue.py: Hěn gāoxìng rènshì nǐ. Nǐmen gōngsī mùqián zhǔyào yánjiū nǎge lǐngyù?
dialogue.en: Nice to meet you. Which field is your company mainly researching right now?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我們專注於利用大數據優化物流效率。
dialogue.py: Wǒmen zhuānzhù yú lìyòng dà shùjù yōuhuà wùliú xiàolǜ.
dialogue.en: We focus on using big data to optimize logistics efficiency.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 這是一個很有前景的方向。這是我名片。
dialogue.py: Zhè shì yīgè hěn yǒu qiánjǐng de fāngxiàng. Zhè shì wǒ míngpiàn.
dialogue.en: That's a very promising direction. Here's my business card.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝，這是我的。希望能有機會向您請教更多專業知識。
dialogue.py: Xièxiè, zhè shì wǒ de. Xīwàng néng yǒu jīhuì xiàng nín qǐngjiào gèng duō zhuānyè zhīshì.
dialogue.en: Thank you, and here's mine. I hope to have the opportunity to seek more professional knowledge from you.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，歡迎隨時透過電子郵件與我聯繫。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, huānyíng suíshí tòuguò diànzǐ yóujiàn yǔ wǒ liánxì.
dialogue.en: No problem, feel free to contact me via email anytime.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 太好了，祝您今天愉快。
dialogue.py: Tài hǎole, zhù nín jīntiān yúkuài.
dialogue.en: Great, have a pleasant day.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 也祝你愉快，再見。
dialogue.py: Yě zhù nǐ yúkuài, zàijiàn.
dialogue.en: You too, goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 林教授您好，我是上週在研討會與您見面的王大衛。
dialogue.py: Lín jiàoshòu nín hǎo, wǒ shì shàng zhōu zài yántǎohuì yǔ nín jiànmiàn de Wáng Dàwèi.
dialogue.en: Hello Professor Lin, I'm David Wang, who met you at the seminar last week.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 大衛你好，我記得你。近來好嗎？
dialogue.py: Dàwèi nǐ hǎo, wǒ jìdé nǐ. Jìnlái hǎo ma?
dialogue.en: Hello David, I remember you. How have you been lately?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我很好，謝謝。我想請教您下週是否有空一起喝杯咖啡？
dialogue.py: Wǒ hěn hǎo, xièxiè. Wǒ xiǎng qǐngjiào nín xià zhōu shìfǒu yǒu kòng yīqǐ hē bēi kāfēi?
dialogue.en: I'm doing well, thank you. I was wondering if you're free to have a cup of coffee together next week?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好啊，你想聊聊關於哪個主題？
dialogue.py: Hǎo a, nǐ xiǎng liáo liáo guānyú nǎge zhǔtí?
dialogue.en: Sure, what topic would you like to chat about?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 關於我們最近在物流演算法上的挑戰，想聽聽您的建議。
dialogue.py: Guānyú wǒmen zuìjìn zài wùliú yǎnsuànfǎ shàng de tiǎozhàn, xiǎng tīng tīng nín de jiànyì.
dialogue.en: Regarding our recent challenges in logistics algorithms, I'd like to hear your suggestions.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，週二下午兩點在校園內的咖啡廳見面如何？
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, zhōu'èr xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn zài xiàoyuán nèi de kāfēi tīng jiànmiàn rúhé?
dialogue.en: No problem, how about meeting at the campus cafe at 2 PM on Tuesday?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那是我的榮幸，謝謝教授。我會準時到達。
dialogue.py: Nà shì wǒ de róngxìng, xièxiè jiàoshòu. Wǒ huì zhǔnshí dàodá.
dialogue.en: It's my honor, thank you, Professor. I will arrive on time.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 太客氣了。到時候見。
dialogue.py: Tài kèqìle. Dào shíhòu jiàn.
dialogue.en: You're too kind. See you then.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 教授再見！
dialogue.py: Jiàoshòu zàijiàn!
dialogue.en: Goodbye, Professor!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 再見！
dialogue.py: Zàijiàn!
dialogue.en: Goodbye!

usefulSentences.q: 我可以跟您交換名片嗎？
usefulSentences.a: 當然可以，這是我的名片。
usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ kěyǐ gēn nín jiāohuàn míngpiàn ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Dāngrán kěyǐ, zhè shì wǒ de míngpiàn.
usefulSentences.en_q: May I exchange business cards with you?
usefulSentences.en_a: Of course, here is my card.

usefulSentences.a: 我從事電子商務相關的產業。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nín zài nǎge lǐngyù gōngzuò?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ cóngshì diànzǐ shāngwù xiāngguān de chǎnyè.
usefulSentences.en_q: Which field do you work in?
usefulSentences.en_a: I work in the e-commerce industry.

usefulSentences.a: 我也是，這是我的聯繫方式。
usefulSentences.py_q: Xīwàng néng yǔ nín bǎochí liánxì.
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ yěshì, zhè shì wǒ de liánxì fāngshì.
usefulSentences.en_q: I hope to stay in touch with you.
usefulSentences.en_a: Me too, here's my contact info.

usefulSentences.q: 您對這個趨勢有什麼看法？
usefulSentences.a: 我覺得這是一個非常有趣的轉變。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nín duì zhège qūshì yǒu shéme kànfǎ?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ juédé zhè shì yīgè fēicháng yǒuqù de zhuǎnbiàn.
usefulSentences.en_q: What's your take on this trend?
usefulSentences.en_a: I think this is a very interesting shift.

usefulSentences.py_q: Xièxiè nín chōukòng yǔ wǒ jiāotán.
usefulSentences.py_a: Bié kèqì, hěn gāoxìng rènshì nǐ.
usefulSentences.en_q: Thank you for taking the time to talk with me.
usefulSentences.en_a: You're welcome, nice to meet you.

paragraphs.zh: 在職業生涯中，建立良好的人脈關係與專業技能同樣重要。人脈不僅能提供豐富的資訊與資源，還能在關鍵時刻為你帶來新的機會。參加行業會議、研討會和社交活動是認識同行的絕佳途徑。
paragraphs.py: Zài zhíyè shēngyá zhōng, jiànlì liánghǎo de rénmài guānxì yǔ zhuānyè jìnéng tóngyàng zhòngyào. Rénmài bùjǐn néng tígōng fēngfù de zīxùn yǔ zīyuán, hái néng zài guānjiàn shíkè wèi nǐ dài lái xīn de jīhuì. Cānjiā hángyè huìyì, yántǎohuì hé shèjiāo huódòng shì rènshì tóngháng de juéjiā tújìng.
paragraphs.en: In a professional career, building good networking relationships is as important as professional skills. Networking not only provides rich information and resources but can also bring you new opportunities at critical moments. Attending industry conferences, seminars, and social events are excellent ways to meet peers.

paragraphs.zh: 成功的社交並非只是單向的索取，而是建立在互惠互利的基礎上。主動分享自己的見解，並真誠地關心他人的成就，能讓你贏得尊重。在交換名片後，及時的後續跟進，如發送一封感謝信，能加深對方對你的印象。
paragraphs.py: Chénggōng de shèjiāo bìngfēi zhǐshì dānxiàng de suǒqǔ, ér shì jiànlì zài hùhuì hùlì de jīchǔ shàng. Zhǔdòng fēnxiǎng zìjǐ de jiànjiě, bìng zhēnchéng de guānxīn tārén de chéngjiù, néng ràng nǐ yíngdé zūnzhòng. Zài jiāohuàn míngpiàn hòu, jíshí de hòuxù gēnjìn, rú fāsòng yī fèn gǎnxiè xìn, néng jiāshēn duìfāng duì nǐ de yìnxiàng.
paragraphs.en: Successful networking isn't just one-way taking; it's built on a foundation of mutual benefit. Taking the initiative to share your insights and sincerely caring about others' achievements can win you respect. After exchanging business cards, timely follow-ups, such as sending a thank-you note, can deepen the other person's impression of you.

paragraphs.zh: 最後，要學會長期經營你的人脈網。人脈的建立需要時間與耐心，而不是急功近利地達成某個目的。透過持續的交流與互相幫助，原本陌生的同行可能會成為志同道合的夥伴。記住，真誠是建立持久關係的關鍵。
paragraphs.py: Zuìhòu, yào xuéhuì chángqī jīngyíng nǐ de rénmài wǎng. Rénmài de jiànlì xūyào shíjiān yǔ nàixīn, ér bùshì jígōngjìnlì de dáchéng mǒu gè mùdì. Tòuguò chíxù de jiāoliú yǔ hùxiāng bāngmáng, yuánběn mòshēng de tóngháng kěnéng huì chéngwéi zhìtóngdàohé de huǒbàn. Jìzhù, zhēnchéng shì jiànlì chíjiǔ guānxì de guānjiàn.
paragraphs.en: Finally, learn to cultivate your network in the long term. Building networking takes time and patience, rather than rushing for a quick goal. Through continuous exchange and mutual help, originally strange peers might become like-minded partners. Remember, sincerity is the key to building lasting relationships.

comprehension.question: 人脈在職業生涯中有什麼好處？
options: 提供資訊、資源和新機會

comprehension.question: 交換名片後應該做什麼？
建立持久人脈關係的關鍵是什麼？

quiz.question: 「請教」的意思是：
options: 向別人學習或詢問意見

title: Navigating the City
description: Transactional but polite conversations necessary for independent living, including errands and services.

sentence.zh: 搭捷運去台北101非常方便。
sentence.py: Dā jiéyùn qù Táiběi 101 fēicháng fāngbiàn.
sentence.en: Taking the MRT to Taipei 101 is very convenient.

sentence.zh: 公車大約每十分鐘有一班。
sentence.py: Gōngchē dàyuē měi shí fēnzhōng yǒu yī bān.
sentence.en: The bus comes about every ten minutes.

sentence.zh: 如果趕時間，可以叫計程車。
sentence.py: Rúguǒ gǎn shíjiān, kěyǐ jiào jìchéngchē.
sentence.en: If you're in a hurry, you can call a taxi.

sentence.zh: 便利商店可以繳費也可以寄件。
sentence.py: Biànlì shāngdiàn kěyǐ jiǎofèi yě kěyǐ jìjiàn.
sentence.en: Convenience stores can be used for paying bills and sending packages.

sentence.zh: 你可以去服務台詢問地圖。
sentence.py: Nǐ kěyǐ qù fúwùtái xúnwèn dìtú.
sentence.en: You can ask for a map at the service desk.

sentence.zh: 我想去郵局寄包裹到國外。
sentence.py: Wǒ xiǎng qù yóujú jì bāoguǒ dào guówài.
sentence.en: I want to go to the post office to send a package abroad.

sentence.zh: 銀行的營業時間到下午三點半。
sentence.py: Yínháng de yíngyè shíjiān dào xiàwǔ sān diǎn bàn.
sentence.en: The bank's business hours are until 3:30 PM.

sentence.zh: 這附近哪裡有提款機可以領錢？
sentence.py: Zhè fùjìn nǎlǐ yǒu tíkuǎnjī kěyǐ lǐngqián?
sentence.en: Where is there an ATM nearby to withdraw money?

sentence.zh: 感冒的話，去家附近的診所看醫生就好。
sentence.py: Gǎnmào de huà, qù jiā fùjìn de zhěnsuǒ kàn yīshēng jiù hǎo.
sentence.en: If you have a cold, just go to a clinic near your house to see a doctor.

sentence.zh: 大醫院通常需要等很久。
sentence.py: Dà yīyuàn tōngcháng xūyào děng hěnjiǔ.
sentence.en: Large hospitals usually require a long wait.

sentence.zh: 你看過這間診所嗎？要先掛號喔。
sentence.py: Nǐ kànguò zhè jiān zhěnsuǒ ma? Yào xiān guàhào ō.
sentence.en: Have you been to this clinic before? You need to register first.

sentence.zh: 看醫生時別忘了帶健保卡。
sentence.py: Kàn yīshēng shí bié wàngle dài jiànbǎokǎ.
sentence.en: Don't forget to bring your health insurance card when seeing a doctor.

sentence.zh: 拿著處方箋去藥局領藥。
sentence.py: Názhe chǔfāngjiān qù yàojú lǐng yào.
sentence.en: Take the prescription to the pharmacy to get the medicine.

sentence.zh: 記得按時吃藥，多喝水。
sentence.py: Jìdé ànshí chī yào, duō hē shuǐ.
sentence.en: Remember to take your medicine on time and drink plenty of water.

sentence.zh: 在城市裡租屋的開銷很大。
sentence.py: Zài chéngshì lǐ zūwū de kāixiāo hěn dà.
sentence.en: Renting a house in the city is very expensive.

sentence.zh: 房東人很好，有問題都會幫忙處理。
sentence.py: Fángdōng rén hěn hǎo, yǒu wèntí dōu huì bāngmáng chǔlǐ.
sentence.en: The landlord is very nice and helps handle any problems.

sentence.zh: 新來的房客是個大學生。
sentence.py: Xīn lái de fángkè shì ge dàxuéshēng.
sentence.en: The new tenant is a university student.

sentence.zh: 租房子通常要付兩個月的押金。
sentence.py: Zū fángzi tōngcháng yào fù liǎng gè yuè de yājīn.
sentence.en: Renting an apartment usually requires a two-month deposit.

sentence.zh: 每個月五號要記得交租金。
sentence.py: Měi gè yuè wǔ hào yào jìdé jiāo zūjīn.
sentence.en: Remember to pay the rent on the 5th of every month.

sentence.zh: 夏天冷氣開太多，水電費會很貴。
sentence.py: Xiàtiān lěngqì kāi tài duō, shuǐdiànfèi huì hěn guì.
sentence.en: Running the AC too much in summer will make the utility bills very expensive.

sentence.zh: 在台灣要追垃圾車丟垃圾。
sentence.py: Zài Táiwān yào zhuī lèsèchē diū lèsè.
sentence.en: In Taiwan, you have to chase the trash truck to throw away garbage.

sentence.zh: 寶特瓶和紙類都要分類回收。
sentence.py: Bǎotèpíng hé zhǐlèi dōu yào fēnlèi huíshōu.
sentence.en: Plastic bottles and paper must be sorted for recycling.

sentence.zh: 如果遺失錢包，可以去警察局報案。
sentence.py: Rúguǒ yíshī qiánbāo, kěyǐ qù jǐngchájú bào'àn.
sentence.en: If you lose your wallet, you can go to the police station to report it.

sentence.zh: 我對這區不熟，差點迷路了。
sentence.py: Wǒ duì zhè qū bù shú, chàdiǎn mílù le.
sentence.en: I'm not familiar with this area and almost got lost.

sentence.zh: 看手機地圖導航很方便。
sentence.py: Kàn shǒujī dìtú dǎoháng hěn fāngbiàn.
sentence.en: It's convenient to use a mobile map for navigation.

sentence.zh: 你走錯方向了，郵局在反方向。
sentence.py: Nǐ zǒu cuò fāngxiàng le, yóujú zài fǎn fāngxiàng.
sentence.en: You're going the wrong way; the post office is in the opposite direction.

sentence.zh: 在下一個路口往左轉。
sentence.py: Zài xià yīgè lùkǒu wǎng zuǒzhuǎn.
sentence.en: Turn left at the next intersection.

sentence.zh: 看到超商後右轉就到了。
sentence.py: Kàndào chāoshāng hòu yòuzhuǎn jiù dào le.
sentence.en: Turn right after seeing the convenience store and you're there.

sentence.zh: 沿著這條路直走五分鐘。
sentence.py: Yánzhe zhè tiáo lù zhízǒu wǔ fēnzhōng.
sentence.en: Go straight along this road for five minutes.

sentence.zh: 過馬路時要看紅綠燈。
sentence.py: Guò mǎlù shí yào kàn hóng lǜ dēng.
sentence.en: Look at the traffic lights when crossing the road.

sentence.zh: 紅燈停，綠燈行。
sentence.py: Hóngdēng tíng, lǜdēng xíng.
sentence.en: Red light stop, green light go.

sentence.zh: 他在十字路口等我。
sentence.py: Tā zài shízìlùkǒu děng wǒ.
sentence.en: He is waiting for me at the intersection.

sentence.zh: 過這座橋就到市中心了。
sentence.py: Guò zhè zuò qiáo jiù dào shì zhōngxīn le.
sentence.en: Cross this bridge and you'll be in the city center.

sentence.zh: 超市的生鮮水果比較便宜。
sentence.py: Chāoshì de shēngxiān shuǐguǒ bǐjiào piányí.
sentence.en: Fresh fruit at the supermarket is relatively cheaper.

sentence.zh: 早上可以去菜市場買到新鮮的魚。
sentence.py: Zǎoshàng kěyǐ qù càishìchǎng mǎidào xīnxiān de yú.
sentence.en: You can buy fresh fish at the traditional market in the morning.

sentence.zh: 我週末喜歡去購物中心逛逛。
sentence.py: Wǒ zhōumò xǐhuān qù gòuwù zhòngxīn guàngguàng.
sentence.en: I like to go to the shopping mall on weekends.

sentence.zh: 請問可以在櫃檯直接付款嗎？
sentence.py: Qǐngwèn kěyǐ zài guìtái zhíjiē fùkuǎn ma?
sentence.en: Can I pay directly at the counter?

sentence.zh: 這家店可以使用信用卡結帳。
sentence.py: Zhè jiā diàn kěyǐ shǐyòng xìnyòngkǎ jiézhàng.
sentence.en: This store accepts credit cards for checkout.

sentence.zh: 這家小店只收現金。
sentence.py: Zhè jiā xiǎo diàn zhǐ shōu xiànjīn.
sentence.en: This small shop only accepts cash.

sentence.zh: 我的悠遊卡餘額不足，需要儲值。
sentence.py: Wǒ de yōuyóukǎ yú'é bùzú, xūyào chǔzhí.
sentence.en: My EasyCard balance is low and needs topping up.

vocab.definition: to top up; to add value

sentence.zh: 去便利商店儲值一百元。
sentence.py: Qù biànlì shāngdiàn chǔzhí yī bǎi yuán.
sentence.en: Go to the convenience store to top up 100 dollars.

sentence.zh: 請給我收據，謝謝。
sentence.py: Qǐng gěi wǒ shōujù, xièxiè.
sentence.en: Please give me the receipt, thank you.

sentence.zh: 在台灣，發票可以對獎。
sentence.py: Zài Táiwān, fāpiào kěyǐ duìjiǎng.
sentence.en: In Taiwan, receipts can be used for the lottery.

sentence.zh: 你有一件包裹寄到了。
sentence.py: Nǐ yǒu yī jiàn bāoguǒ jì dào le.
sentence.en: A package has arrived for you.

sentence.zh: 我想寄信給遠方的朋友。
sentence.py: Wǒ xiǎng jìxìn gěi yuǎnfāng de péngyǒu.
sentence.en: I want to mail a letter to a friend far away.

sentence.zh: 快遞通常隔天就會送到。
sentence.py: Kuàidì tōngcháng gétiān jiù huì sòng dào.
sentence.en: Express delivery usually arrives the next day.

sentence.zh: 這間餐廳很有名，建議先預約。
sentence.py: Zhè jiān cāntǐng hěn yǒumíng, jiànyì xiān yùyuē.
sentence.en: This restaurant is very famous; it's recommended to make a reservation first.

sentence.zh: 辦理業務時需要身分證明。
sentence.py: Bànlǐ yèwù shí xūyào shēnfèn zhèngmíng.
sentence.en: Identification is required when processing business.

sentence.zh: 超商可以影印文件。
sentence.py: Chāoshāng kěyǐ yǐngyìn wénjiàn.
sentence.en: Documents can be photocopied at convenience stores.

sentence.zh: 現在很少人用傳真機了。
sentence.py: Xiànzài hěn shǎo rén yòng chuánzhēnjī le.
sentence.en: Very few people use fax machines now.

scenarios.title: Transportation
scenarios.description: Learning how to navigate public transport like the MRT and buses.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 請問這附近有捷運站嗎？
dialogue.py: Qǐngwèn zhè fùjìn yǒu jiéyùnzhàn ma?
dialogue.en: Excuse me, is there an MRT station nearby?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 有，直走過馬路就是了。
dialogue.py: Yǒu, zhí zǒu guò mǎlù jiùshì le.
dialogue.en: Yes, go straight across the road and you're there.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 去台北車站要搭哪一線？
dialogue.py: Qù Táiběi chēzhàn yào dā nǎ yī xiàn?
dialogue.en: Which line should I take to Taipei Main Station?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 你要搭紅線，往淡水的方向。
dialogue.py: Nǐ yào dā hóngxiàn, wǎng Dànshuǐ de fāngxiàng.
dialogue.en: You need to take the Red Line, towards Tamsui.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我的悠遊卡沒錢了，可以在這裡儲值嗎？
dialogue.py: Wǒ de yōuyóukǎ méi qián le, kěyǐ zài zhèlǐ chǔzhí ma?
dialogue.en: My EasyCard has no money; can I top it up here?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 可以，那邊有自動儲值機。
dialogue.py: Kěyǐ, nàbiān yǒu zìdòng chǔzhí jī.
dialogue.en: Yes, there are automatic top-up machines over there.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝。請問下一班車幾點到？
dialogue.py: Xièxiè. Qǐngwèn xià yī bān chē jǐ diǎn dào?
dialogue.en: Thank you. When does the next train arrive?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 捷運很快，大約三分鐘就有一班。
dialogue.py: Jiéyùn hěn kuài, dàyuē sān fēnzhōng jiù yǒu yī bān.
dialogue.en: The MRT is very fast; there's a train about every three minutes.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 明白了，非常感謝！
dialogue.py: Míngbáile, fēicháng gǎnxiè!
dialogue.en: Understood, thank you very much!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不客氣，祝你搭車順利。
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì, zhù nǐ dāchē shùnlì.
dialogue.en: You're welcome, have a smooth ride.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 不好意思，請問這台公車有到市中心嗎？
dialogue.py: Bù hǎoyìsi, qǐngwèn zhè tái gōngchē yǒu dào shì zhōngxīn ma?
dialogue.en: Excuse me, does this bus go to the city center?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 有，不過你要在第五站下車。
dialogue.py: Yǒu, bùguò nǐ yào zài dì wǔ zhàn xiàchē.
dialogue.en: Yes, but you have to get off at the fifth stop.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 請問票價是多少錢？
dialogue.py: Qǐngwèn piàojià shì duōshǎo qián?
dialogue.en: How much is the fare?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 一段票是十五元。你可以刷卡或付現金。
dialogue.py: Yī duàn piào shì shíwǔ yuán. Nǐ kěyǐ shuākǎ huò fù xiànjīn.
dialogue.en: A single-zone fare is 15 dollars. You can swipe your card or pay cash.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 上車刷卡還是下車刷卡？
dialogue.py: Shàngchē shuākǎ háishì xiàchē shuākǎ?
dialogue.en: Do I swipe when getting on or getting off?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 現在大部分都是上下車都要刷卡。
dialogue.py: Xiànzài dà bùfèn dōu shì shàngxià chē dōu yào shuākǎ.
dialogue.en: Nowadays, most require swiping both when getting on and off.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 如果要下車，要先按鈴嗎？
dialogue.py: Rúguǒ yào xiàchē, yào xiān ànlíng ma?
dialogue.en: If I want to get off, do I need to press the bell first?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 對，快到站的時候按一下鈴，司機就會停車。
dialogue.py: Duì, kuài dào zhàn de shíhòu àn yīxià líng, sījī jiù huì tíngchē.
dialogue.en: Yes, press the bell when you're almost at the stop, and the driver will stop.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝，這是我第一次搭當地的公車。
dialogue.py: Xièxiè, zhè shì wǒ dì yī cì dā dāngdì de gōngchē.
dialogue.en: Thank you, this is my first time taking the local bus.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 別擔心，車上會有廣播提醒到哪一站。
dialogue.py: Bié dānxīn, chē shàng huì yǒu guǎngbò tíxǐng dào nǎ yī zhàn.
dialogue.en: Don't worry, there will be announcements on the bus reminding you of the stops.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那太好了，謝謝你！
dialogue.py: Nà tài hǎole, xièxiè nǐ!
dialogue.en: That's great, thank you!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題！
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí!
dialogue.en: No problem!

usefulSentences.py_q: Zhè fùjìn yǒu jiéyùnzhàn ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Zhí zǒu guò mǎlù jiù dào le.
usefulSentences.en_q: Is there an MRT station nearby?
usefulSentences.en_a: Go straight across the road and you're there.

usefulSentences.py_q: Gōngchē piàojià duōshǎo qián?
usefulSentences.py_a: Yī duàn piào shì shíwǔ yuán.
usefulSentences.en_q: How much is the bus fare?
usefulSentences.en_a: A single-zone fare is 15 dollars.

usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ de yōuyóukǎ xūyào chǔzhí.
usefulSentences.py_a: Nàbiān yǒu zìdòng chǔzhí jī.
usefulSentences.en_q: My EasyCard needs to be topped up.
usefulSentences.en_a: There are automatic top-up machines over there.

usefulSentences.q: 這台公車有到台北車站嗎？
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhè tái gōngchē yǒu dào Táiběi chēzhàn ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Yǒu, qǐng shàngchē.
usefulSentences.en_q: Does this bus go to Taipei Main Station?
usefulSentences.en_a: Yes, please get on.

usefulSentences.py_q: Xiàchē yào ànlíng ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Duì, qǐng xiān ànlíng zài xiàchē.
usefulSentences.en_q: Do I need to press the bell to get off?
usefulSentences.en_a: Yes, please press the bell before getting off.

paragraphs.zh: 在現代城市中，公共交通是人們生活中不可或缺的一部分。捷運和公車是最受歡迎的選擇。捷運以其準時和快速著稱，特別是在上下班尖峰時間，可以避開交通堵塞。
paragraphs.py: Zài xiàndài chéngshì zhōng, gōnggòng jiāotōng shì rénmen shēnghuó zhōng bùkě huòquē de yībùfèn. Jiéyùn hé gōngchē shì zuì shòu huānyíng de xuǎnzé. Jiéyùn yǐ qí zhǔnshí hé kuàisù zhùchēng, tèbié shì zài shàngxiàbān jiānfēng shíjiān, kěyǐ bìkāi jiāotōng dǔsè.
paragraphs.en: In modern cities, public transport is an indispensable part of people's lives. The MRT and buses are the most popular choices. The MRT is known for its punctuality and speed, especially during peak commuting hours, as it can avoid traffic jams.

paragraphs.zh: 公車則提供了更廣泛的路線，可以到達捷運沒辦法覆蓋的社區。搭乘公車時，乘客需要注意上車或下車是否需要刷卡。大部分城市的交通卡，如悠遊卡，都可以在這兩種交通工具上通用。
paragraphs.py: Gōngchē zé tígōngle gèng guǎngfàn de lùxiàn, kěyǐ dàodá jiéyùn méi bànfǎ fùgài de shèqū. Dāchéng gōngchē shí, chéngkè xūyào zhùyì shàngchē huò xiàchē shìfǒu xūyào shuākǎ. Dà bùfèn chéngshì de jiāotōng kǎ, rú yōuyóukǎ, dōu kěyǐ zài zhè liǎng zhǒng jiāotōng gōngjù shàng tōngyòng.
paragraphs.en: Buses provide a wider range of routes, reaching communities that the MRT cannot cover. When taking a bus, passengers need to note whether swiping a card is required when getting on or off. Transit cards in most cities, like the EasyCard, can be used on both modes of transport.

paragraphs.zh: 為了讓旅程更順利，乘客應該學會如何查看路線圖和時間表。現在許多手機應用程式都能提供即時的公車動態，讓等待時間變得更短。遵守搭乘禮儀，如禮讓博愛座，也是城市文明的體現。
paragraphs.py: Wèile ràng lǚchéng gèng shùnlì, chéngkè yīnggāi xuéhuì rúhé chákàn lùxiàn tú hé shíjiānbiǎo. Xiànzài xǔduō shǒujī yìngyòng chéngxù dōu néng tígōng jíshí de gōngchē dòngtài, ràng děngdài shíjiān biàndé gèng duǎn. Zūnshǒu dāchéng lǐyí, rú lǐràng bó'ài zuò, yěshì chéngshì wénmíng de tǐxiàn.
paragraphs.en: To make the journey smoother, passengers should learn how to check route maps and schedules. Many mobile apps now provide real-time bus updates, making waiting times shorter. Observing riding etiquette, such as giving up priority seats, is also a reflection of urban civility.

scenarios.title: Convenience Stores
scenarios.description: Utilizing the multi-functional services of convenience stores in daily life.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你好，我想繳水費和電費。
dialogue.py: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng jiǎo shuǐfèi hé diànfèi.
dialogue.en: Hello, I'd like to pay my water and electricity bills.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，請給我你的帳單。這兩張一共是八百五十元。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, qǐng gěi wǒ nǐ de zhàngdān. Zhè liǎng zhāng yīgòng shì bābǎi wǔshí yuán.
dialogue.en: Okay, please give me your bills. These two total 850 dollars.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我可以用信用卡付嗎？
dialogue.py: Wǒ kěyǐ yòng xìnyòngkǎ fù ma?
dialogue.en: Can I pay with a credit card?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不好意思，代收費用只能收現金或感應式支付。
dialogue.py: Bù hǎoyìsi, dàishōu fèiyòng zhǐ néng shōu xiànjīn huò gǎnyìng shì zhīfù.
dialogue.en: Sorry, bill payments can only be made with cash or contactless payment.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那我付現金好了。這是一千元。
dialogue.py: Nà wǒ fù xiànjīn hǎole. Zhè shì yīqiān yuán.
dialogue.en: I'll pay cash then. Here is 1,000 dollars.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 找你一百五十元。這是你的收據和發票。
dialogue.py: Zhǎo nǐ yībǎi wǔshí yuán. Zhè shì nǐ de shōujù hé fāpiào.
dialogue.en: Here is 150 dollars change. These are your receipt and invoice.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝。對了，這張發票可以對獎嗎？
dialogue.py: Xièxiè. Duìle, zhè zhāng fāpiào kěyǐ duìjiǎng ma?
dialogue.en: Thank you. By the way, can this invoice be used for the lottery?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 可以，兩個月對一次獎，祝你中獎！
dialogue.py: Kěyǐ, liǎng gè yuè duì yīcì jiǎng, zhù nǐ zhòngjiǎng!
dialogue.en: Yes, the lottery is held every two months. Good luck!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 太好了，謝謝你的說明。
dialogue.py: Tài hǎole, xièxiè nǐ de shuōmíng.
dialogue.en: Great, thank you for your explanation.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不客氣，慢走！
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì, màn zǒu!
dialogue.en: You're welcome, take care!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你好，我要領包裹。我的手機末三碼是 123。
dialogue.py: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ yào lǐng bāoguǒ. Wǒ de shǒujī mò sān mǎ shì 123.
dialogue.en: Hello, I want to pick up a package. The last three digits of my phone number are 123.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，請稍等我查一下。請問你的姓名是？
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, qǐng shāo děng wǒ chá yīxià. Qǐngwèn nǐ de xìngmíng shì?
dialogue.en: Okay, please wait a moment while I check. What is your name?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我姓林，雙木林。
dialogue.py: Wǒ xìng Lín, shuāngmù lín.
dialogue.en: My last name is Lin.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 林先生，找到了。這件包裹已經付過款了，請出示身分證件。
dialogue.py: Lín xiānshēng, zhǎodào le. Zhè jiàn bāoguǒ yǐjīng fùguò kuǎn le, qǐng chūshì shēnfèn zhèngmíng.
dialogue.en: Mr. Lin, found it. This package has been paid for, so please show your ID.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好的，這是我的健保卡，可以嗎？
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, zhè shì wǒ de jiànbǎokǎ, kěyǐ ma?
dialogue.en: Okay, is my Health Insurance card okay?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 可以，請在螢幕上簽名。
dialogue.py: Kěyǐ, qǐng zài yíngmù shàng qiānmíng.
dialogue.en: Yes, please sign on the screen.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 簽好了。請問這附近有影印機嗎？
dialogue.py: Qiān hǎole. Qǐngwèn zhè fùjìn yǒu yǐngyìnjī ma?
dialogue.en: Done. Is there a photocopy machine nearby?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 就在那邊角落，你可以自己操作，也可以請我幫忙。
dialogue.py: Jiù zài nàbiān jiǎoluò, nǐ kěyǐ zìjǐ cāozuò, yě kěyǐ qǐng wǒ bāngmáng.
dialogue.en: It's right there in the corner; you can operate it yourself or ask me for help.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我想印一份文件，超商也可以印照片嗎？
dialogue.py: Wǒ xiǎng yìn yī fèn wénjiàn, chāoshāng yě kěyǐ yìn zhàopiàn ma?
dialogue.en: I want to print a document; can convenience stores also print photos?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 可以的，你可以上傳到雲端再過來印。
dialogue.py: Kěyǐ de, nǐ kěyǐ shàngchuán dào yúnduān zài guòlái yìn.
dialogue.en: Yes, you can upload to the cloud and then come here to print.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 超商的功能真的太多了，真方便。
dialogue.py: Chāoshāng de gōngnéng zhēnde tài duōle, zhēn fāngbiàn.
dialogue.en: Convenience stores really have so many functions; it's so convenient.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 是啊，有需要隨時過來。
dialogue.py: Shì a, yǒu xūyào suíshí guòlái.
dialogue.en: Yes, come by whenever you need.

usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ xiǎng jiǎo diànhuàfèi.
usefulSentences.py_a: Qǐng gěi wǒ zhàngdān, bāng nín sǎomiáo.
usefulSentences.en_q: I'd like to pay my phone bill.
usefulSentences.en_a: Please give me the bill; I'll scan it for you.

usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ yào lǐng bāoguǒ, mò sān mǎ 456.
usefulSentences.py_a: Qǐng chūshì shēnfèn zhèngmíng héduì.
usefulSentences.en_q: I'm here to pick up a package; the last three digits are 456.
usefulSentences.en_a: Please show your ID for verification.

usefulSentences.a: 您可以先選擇功能，再投幣。
usefulSentences.py_q: Qǐngwèn yǐngyìnjī zěnme yòng?
usefulSentences.py_a: Nǐ kěyǐ xiān xuǎnzé gōngnéng, zài tóubì.
usefulSentences.en_q: How do I use the photocopy machine?
usefulSentences.en_a: You can select the function first, then insert coins.

usefulSentences.q: 這裡可以儲值悠遊卡嗎？
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhèlǐ kěyǐ chǔzhí yōuyóukǎ ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Kěyǐ, qǐngwèn yào chǔzhí duōshǎo?
usefulSentences.en_q: Can I top up my EasyCard here?
usefulSentences.en_a: Yes, how much would you like to top up?

usefulSentences.q: 這張發票我不用，可以捐嗎？
usefulSentences.a: 沒問題，投進捐款箱就可以了。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhè zhāng fāpiào wǒ bùyòng, kěyǐ juān ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Méi wèntí, tóujìn juānkuǎn xiāng jiù kěyǐ le.
usefulSentences.en_q: I don't need this receipt; can I donate it?
usefulSentences.en_a: No problem, just drop it in the donation box.

reading.title: 台灣便利商店的萬能服務

paragraphs.zh: 在台灣，便利商店不只是買飲料和零食的地方，更是一個『萬能服務站』。無論是早上的早餐、深夜的宵夜，還是各種生活瑣事，都可以在這裡完成。這種高度的便利性是台灣生活的特色之一。
paragraphs.py: Zài Táiwān, biànlì shāngdiàn bù zhǐshì mǎi yǐnliào hé língshí de dìfāng, gèng shì yīgè 『wànnéng fúwùzhàn』. Wúlùn shì zǎoshàng de zǎocān, shēnyè de xiāoyè, háishì gèzhǒng shēnghuó suǒshì, dōu kěyǐ zài zhèlǐ wánchéng. Zhèzhǒng gāodù de biànlìxìng shì Táiwān shēnghuó de tèsè zhī yī.
paragraphs.en: In Taiwan, convenience stores are not just places to buy drinks and snacks; they are 'all-purpose service stations.' Whether it's breakfast in the morning, a late-night snack, or various life errands, everything can be done here. This high level of convenience is one of the characteristics of life in Taiwan.

paragraphs.zh: 除了基本的購物，便利商店還提供代收帳單的服務。你可以拿著水電費、學費或停車費的帳單在櫃檯繳費。此外，包裹寄送和領取也是非常受歡迎的功能。很多人選擇在超商領取網路購物的商品，因為時間非常彈性。
paragraphs.py: Chúle jīběn de gòuwù, biànlì shāngdiàn hái tígōng dàishōu zhàngdān de fúwù. Nǐ kěyǐ názhe shuǐdiànfèi, xuéfèi huò tíngchēfèi de zhàngdān zài guìtái jiǎofèi. Cǐwài, bāoguǒ jìsòng hé lǐngqǔ yěshì fēicháng shòu huānyíng de gōngnéng. Hěnduō rén xuǎnzé zài chāoshāng lǐngqǔ wǎng lù gòuwù de shāngpǐn, yīnwèi shíjiān fēicháng tánxìng.
paragraphs.en: In addition to basic shopping, convenience stores also provide bill payment services. You can take your water, electricity, tuition, or parking bills to the counter to pay. Furthermore, package delivery and pickup are also very popular features. Many people choose to pick up online shopping items at convenience stores because the timing is very flexible.

paragraphs.zh: 便利商店內還設有多功能事務機，可以影印、掃描、傳真，甚至列印雲端文件和照片。對於沒有印表機的人來說非常方便。店內通常也設有提款機和座位區，讓人在忙碌的都市生活中，隨時都能找到一個休息或處理事務的地方。
paragraphs.py: Biànlì shāngdiàn nèi hái shè yǒu duō gōngnéng shìwù jī, kěyǐ yǐngyìn, sǎomiáo, chuánzhēn, shènzhì lièyìn yúnduān wénjiàn hé zhàopiàn. Duìyú méiyǒu yìnbiaojī de rén lái shuō fēicháng fāngbiàn. Diànnèi tōngcháng yě shè yǒu tíkuǎnjī hé zuòwèiqū, ràng rén zài mánglù de dūshì shēnghuó zhōng, suíshí dōu néng zhǎodào yīgè xiūxí huò chǔlǐ shìwù de dìfāng.
paragraphs.en: Convenience stores are also equipped with multi-functional office machines that can photocopy, scan, fax, and even print cloud documents and photos. This is very convenient for people who don't have a printer. There are usually ATMs and seating areas in the stores, allowing people to find a place to rest or handle errands at any time in busy city life.
