scenarios.title: Housing
scenarios.description: Discussing rental terms and handling household issues with a landlord.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 您好，我在網路上看到您的租屋資訊，想過來看看房子。
dialogue.py: Nín hǎo, wǒ zài wǎnglù shàng kàndào nín de zūwū zīxùn, xiǎng guòlái kàn kàn fángzi.
dialogue.en: Hello, I saw your rental information online and would like to come and see the apartment.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好啊，請進。這間是套房，有獨立的衛浴設備。
dialogue.py: Hǎo a, qǐng jìn. Zhè jiān shì tàofáng, yǒu dúlì de wèiyù shèbèi.
dialogue.en: Sure, please come in. This is a studio with its own bathroom.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 採光看起來不錯。請問每個月的租金是多少？
dialogue.py: Cǎiguāng kàn qǐlái bùcuò. Qǐngwèn měi gè yuè de zūjīn shì duōshǎo?
dialogue.en: The lighting looks good. How much is the monthly rent?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 租金是一萬二千元，包含網路和第四台。
dialogue.py: Zūjīn shì yīwàn èrqiān yuán, bāohán wǎnglù hé dìsìtái.
dialogue.en: The rent is 12,000 dollars, including internet and cable TV.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那水電費怎麼算呢？
dialogue.py: Nà shuǐdiànfèi zěnme suàn ne?
dialogue.en: How are the utility bills calculated?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 水費每個月固定一百元，電費則是按電表計算，一度五元。
dialogue.py: Shuǐfèi měi gè yuè gùdìng yībǎi yuán, diànfèi zé shì àn diànbiǎo jìsuàn, yīdù wǔ yuán.
dialogue.en: The water fee is fixed at 100 dollars a month, and electricity is calculated by the meter, 5 dollars per unit.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 押金需要付多少？
dialogue.py: Yājīn xūyào fù duōshǎo?
dialogue.en: How much is the deposit?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 押金是兩個月。如果退租時房子沒損壞，會全額退還。
dialogue.py: Yājīn shì liǎng gè yuè. Rúguǒ tuìzū shí fángzi méi sǔnhuài, huì quán'é tuìhuán.
dialogue.en: The deposit is two months. If there's no damage when you move out, it will be fully refunded.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這裡可以養寵物或抽菸嗎？
dialogue.py: Zhèlǐ kěyǐ yǎng chǒngwù huò chōuyān ma?
dialogue.en: Are pets or smoking allowed here?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不好意思，為了環境整潔，我們禁止養寵物和抽菸。
dialogue.py: Bù hǎoyìsi, wèile huánjìng zhěngjié, wǒmen jìnzhǐ yǎng chǒngwù hé chōuyān.
dialogue.en: Sorry, for the sake of cleanliness, we prohibit pets and smoking.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我了解了。這間房子我很喜歡，我考慮一下明天答覆您。
dialogue.py: Wǒ liǎojiě le. Zhè jiān fángzi wǒ hěn xǐhuān, wǒ kǎolǜ yīxià míngtiān dáfù nín.
dialogue.en: I understand. I like this apartment very much; I'll consider it and get back to you tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，等你的消息。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, děng nǐ de xiāoxi.
dialogue.en: No problem, waiting for your news.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 房東您好，我是三樓的房客。我房間的冷氣好像壞了。
dialogue.py: Fángdōng nín hǎo, wǒ shì sānlóu de fángkè. Wǒ fángjiān de lěngqì hǎoxiàng huàile.
dialogue.en: Hello Landlord, I'm the tenant on the third floor. The AC in my room seems to be broken.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 冷氣怎麼了？是不會冷還是沒辦法開機？
dialogue.py: Lěngqì zěnmele? Shì bù huì lěng háishì méi bànfǎ kāijī?
dialogue.en: What's wrong with the AC? Is it not cooling or not turning on?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 可以開機，但是運轉的聲音很大，而且完全沒有冷風。
dialogue.py: Kěyǐ kāijī, dànshì yùnzhuǎn de shēngyīn hěn dà, érqiě wánquán méiyǒu lěngfēng.
dialogue.en: It turns on, but the operating noise is very loud, and there's no cold air at all.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 那可能是漏冷媒或者是濾網太髒了。我明天請師傅過去看。
dialogue.py: Nà kěnéng shì lòu lěngméi huòzhě shì lǜwǎng tài zàngle. Wǒ míngtiān qǐng shīfù guòqù kàn.
dialogue.en: It might be a refrigerant leak or the filter is too dirty. I'll ask a technician to go over tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 請問師傅大約幾點會到？我得留人在家。
dialogue.py: Qǐngwèn shīfù dàyuē jǐ diǎn huì dào? Wǒ děi liú rén zài jiā.
dialogue.en: What time will the technician arrive? I need to have someone at home.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 下午兩點左右可以嗎？
dialogue.py: Xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn zuǒyòu kěyǐ ma?
dialogue.en: Is around 2:00 PM okay?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 兩點可以，謝謝房東。另外，廁所的燈泡也燒壞了。
dialogue.py: Liǎng diǎn kěyǐ, xièxiè fángdōng. Lìngwài, cèsuǒ de dēngpào yě shāohuài le.
dialogue.en: Two o'clock is fine, thanks. Also, the light bulb in the bathroom has burnt out.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 燈泡是耗材，通常是房客自己換，但我明天順便幫你換好了。
dialogue.py: Dēngpào shì hàocái, tōngcháng shì fángkè zìjǐ huàn, dàn wǒ míngtiān shùnbiàn bāng nǐ huàn hǎole.
dialogue.en: Light bulbs are consumables and are usually replaced by the tenant, but I'll replace it for you tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 真的太感謝了，麻煩您了。
dialogue.py: Zhēnde tài gǎnxiè le, máfan nín le.
dialogue.en: Thank you so much; sorry for the trouble.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不客氣，明天見。
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì, míngtiān jiàn.
dialogue.en: You're welcome, see you tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 明天見！
dialogue.py: Míngtiān jiàn!
dialogue.en: See you tomorrow!

usefulSentences.py_q: Yīgè yuè de zūjīn shì duōshǎo?
usefulSentences.py_a: Zūjīn shì yīwàn èrqiān yuán.
usefulSentences.en_q: How much is the monthly rent?
usefulSentences.en_a: The rent is 12,000 dollars.

usefulSentences.a: 通常要付兩個月的押金。
usefulSentences.py_q: Yājīn yào fù jǐ gè yuè?
usefulSentences.py_a: Tōngcháng yào fù liǎng gè yuè de yājīn.
usefulSentences.en_q: How many months of deposit do I need to pay?
usefulSentences.en_a: Usually, it's a two-month deposit.

usefulSentences.q: 水電費包含在租金裡嗎？
usefulSentences.py_q: Shuǐdiànfèi bāohán zài zūjīn lǐ ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Bù bāohán, yào lìngwài jìsuàn.
usefulSentences.en_q: Are utility bills included in the rent?
usefulSentences.en_a: No, they are calculated separately.

usefulSentences.q: 廁所的水管好像塞住了。
usefulSentences.a: 我馬上找水電工去修理。
usefulSentences.py_q: Cèsuǒ de shuǐguǎn hǎoxiàng sāizhù le.
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ mǎshàng zhǎo shuǐdiàngōng qù xiūlǐ.
usefulSentences.en_q: The bathroom pipe seems to be clogged.
usefulSentences.en_a: I'll find a plumber to fix it right away.

usefulSentences.a: 大樓有統一的垃圾集中處。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhèlǐ kěyǐ dào lèsè ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Dàlóu yǒu tǒngyī de lèsè jízhōng chù.
usefulSentences.en_q: Can I throw away trash here?
usefulSentences.en_a: The building has a unified trash collection point.

reading.title: 在台灣租屋的注意事項

paragraphs.zh: 在台灣租房子，首先要了解不同的房型。『套房』通常包含獨立的衛浴設備，而『雅房』則需要與其他房客共用廁所和浴室。套房的隱私性較高，但租金也相對較貴。
paragraphs.py: Zài Táiwān zū fángzi, shǒuxiān yào liǎojiě bùtóng de fángxíng. 『Tàofáng』 tōngcháng bāohán dúlì de wèiyù shèbèi, ér 『yǎfáng』 zé xūyào yǔ qítā fángkè gòngyòng cèsuǒ hé yùshì. Tàofáng de yǐnsīxìng jiào gāo, dàn zūjīn yě xiāngduì jiào guì.
paragraphs.en: When renting a house in Taiwan, first understand the different types of rooms. A 'studio' (taofang) usually includes private bathroom facilities, while a 'private room' (yafang) requires sharing the toilet and bathroom with other tenants. Studios offer more privacy, but the rent is also relatively more expensive.

paragraphs.zh: 簽訂租賃契約時，一定要看清楚合約條款。除了租金和押金，還要確認水電費、管理費和網路費的負擔方式。押金在台灣法律規定最高不能超過兩個月租金。此外，也要詢問是否可以養寵物、報稅或遷入戶籍。
paragraphs.py: Qiāndìng zūlìn qìyuē shí, yīdìng yào kàn qīngchǔ héyuē tiáokuǎn. Chúle zūjīn hé yājīn, hái yào quèrèn shuǐdiànfèi, guǎnlǐfèi hé wǎnglùfèi de fùdān fāngshì. Yājīn zài Táiwān fǎlǜ guīdìng zuìgāo bùnéng chāoguò liǎng gè yuè zūjīn. Cǐwài, yě yào xúnwèn shìfǒu kěyǐ yǎng chǒngwù, bàoshuì huò qiānrù hùjí.
paragraphs.en: When signing a lease agreement, make sure to read the contract terms clearly. In addition to rent and deposit, confirm how utility bills, management fees, and internet fees are handled. In Taiwan, the law stipulates that the deposit cannot exceed two months' rent. Additionally, inquire whether pets are allowed, if rent can be declared for taxes, or if you can register your residency there.

paragraphs.zh: 居住期間如果設備損壞，通常由房東負責維修，除非是房客人為造成。房客應該保持房屋的整潔，並準時交租金。良好的溝通是維持房東與房客關係的關鍵。如果遇到糾紛，可以尋求法律諮詢或地方調解委員會的幫助。
paragraphs.py: Jūzhù qījiān rúguǒ shèbèi sǔnhuài, tōngcháng yóu fángdōng fùzé wéixiū, chúfēi shì fángkè rénwéi zàochéng. Fángkè yīnggāi bǎochí fángwū de zhěngjié, bìng zhǔnshí jiāo zūjīn. Liánghǎo de gōutōng shì wéichí fángdōng yǔ fángkè guānxì de guānjiàn. Rúguǒ yù dào jiūfēn, kěyǐ xúnqiú fǎlǜ zīxún huò dìfāng tiáojiě wěiyuánhuì de bāngzhù.
paragraphs.en: During the period of residence, if equipment is damaged, the landlord is usually responsible for repairs, unless caused by the tenant. Tenants should keep the house clean and pay rent on time. Good communication is key to maintaining the relationship between landlord and tenant. If a dispute occurs, you can seek legal advice or help from a local mediation committee.

comprehension.question: 「雅房」和「套房」的主要差別是什麼？
法律規定押金最高不能超過幾個月？
如果租屋設備自然損壞，應該由誰負責維修？

quiz.question: 「押金」通常在什麼時候退還？
options: 退租並確認房屋無損後

quiz.question: 哪一個詞代表「租房的人」？
看房子時，如果陽光充足，我們會說這裡：

scenarios.title: Healthcare
scenarios.description: Visiting a clinic, explaining symptoms, and understanding medical advice.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你好，我想掛號。我喉嚨痛而且有點發燒。
dialogue.py: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng guàhào. Wǒ hóulóng tòng érqiě yǒudiǎn fāshāo.
dialogue.en: Hello, I'd like to register. I have a sore throat and a bit of a fever.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，請問以前來過嗎？請給我你的健保卡。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, qǐngwèn yǐqián láiguò ma? Qǐng gěi wǒ nǐ de jiànbǎokǎ.
dialogue.en: Okay, have you been here before? Please give me your Health Insurance card.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這是我第一次來。這是我的健保卡。
dialogue.py: Zhè shì wǒ dì yī cì lái. Zhè shì wǒ de jiànbǎokǎ.
dialogue.en: This is my first time. Here is my health insurance card.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，請填一下初診資料表。現在前面還有三個人在等。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, qǐng tián yīxià chūzhěn zīliào biǎo. Xiànzài qiánmiàn hái yǒu sān gè rén zài děng.
dialogue.en: Okay, please fill out this first-visit information form. There are three people waiting ahead of you.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 大約要等多久？
dialogue.py: Dàyuē yào děng duōshǎo?
dialogue.en: About how long is the wait?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 大約十五到二十分鐘。輪到你時會叫名字。
dialogue.py: Dàyuē shíwǔ dào èrshí fēnzhōng. Lúndào nǐ shí huì jiào míngzì.
dialogue.en: About 15 to 20 minutes. We'll call your name when it's your turn.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: (過了一會兒) 林先生，請進二號診間。
dialogue.py: Lín xiānshēng, qǐng jìn èr hào zhěnjiān.
dialogue.en: (After a while) Mr. Lin, please go to consultation room number two.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 哪裡不舒服？這種情況持續多久了？
dialogue.py: Nǎlǐ bù shūfú? Zhèzhǒng qíngkuàng chíxù duōshǎole?
dialogue.en: What's bothering you? How long has this been going on?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 昨天晚上開始喉嚨痛，今天早上覺得頭暈暈的。
dialogue.py: Zuótiān wǎnshàng kāishǐ hóulóng tòng, jīntiān zǎoshàng juédé tóu yūnyūn de.
dialogue.en: My throat started hurting last night, and I felt dizzy this morning.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 先幫你量個體溫。嗯，三十八度，確實有點發燒。
dialogue.py: Xiān bāng nǐ liáng gè tǐwēn. En, sānshíbā dù, quèshí yǒudiǎn fāshāo.
dialogue.en: Let's take your temperature first. Hmm, 38 degrees; you do have a slight fever.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 醫生，嚴重嗎？需要打針嗎？
dialogue.py: Yīshēng, yánzhòng ma? Xūyào dǎzhēn ma?
dialogue.en: Doctor, is it serious? Do I need an injection?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不用打針，只是普通的感冒。我開三天的藥給你。
dialogue.py: Bùyòng dǎzhēn, zhǐshì pǔtōng de gǎnmào. Wǒ kāi sāntiān de yào gěi nǐ.
dialogue.en: No need for an injection; it's just a common cold. I'll prescribe three days of medicine for you.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你好，我來領藥。這是我的處方箋。
dialogue.py: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ lái lǐng yào. Zhè shì wǒ de chǔfāngjiān.
dialogue.en: Hello, I'm here to pick up medicine. This is my prescription.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，請稍等。這有三種藥，分別是退燒藥、止痛藥和消炎藥。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, qǐng shāo děng. Zhè yǒu sān zhǒng yào, fēnbié shì tuìshāoyào, zhǐtòngyào hé xiāoyányào.
dialogue.en: Okay, please wait a moment. There are three types of medicine: fever reducer, painkiller, and anti-inflammatory.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 請問這些藥要怎麼吃？
dialogue.py: Qǐngwèn zhèxiē yào yào zěnme chī?
dialogue.en: How should I take these medicines?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 三餐飯後吃，每次各一顆。如果沒發燒了，退燒藥可以不用吃。
dialogue.py: Sāncān fànhòu chī, měicì gè yī kē. Rúguǒ méi fāshāole, tuìshāoyào kěyǐ bùyòng chī.
dialogue.en: Take one of each after three meals a day. If you don't have a fever anymore, you can stop taking the fever reducer.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 吃完藥會想睡覺嗎？
dialogue.py: Chī wán yào huì xiǎng shuìjiào ma?
dialogue.en: Will I feel sleepy after taking the medicine?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 感冒藥通常會有一點嗜睡的副作用。吃完後盡量休息，不要開車。
dialogue.py: Gǎnmàoyào tōngcháng huì yǒu yīdiǎn shìshuì de fùzuòyòng. Chī wán hòu jǐnliàng xiūxí, bùyào kāichē.
dialogue.en: Cold medicine usually has a side effect of drowsiness. Rest as much as possible after taking it, and don't drive.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 有什麼需要忌口的嗎？
dialogue.py: Yǒu shéme xūyào jìkǒu de ma?
dialogue.en: Are there any dietary restrictions?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 少吃辛辣或油炸的食物，多喝溫開水。
dialogue.py: Shǎo chī xīnlà huò yóuzhá de shíwù, duō hē wēn kāishuǐ.
dialogue.en: Eat less spicy or fried food, and drink more warm water.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好的，謝謝藥師。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, xièxiè yàoshī.
dialogue.en: Okay, thank you, pharmacist.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不客氣，祝你早日康復！
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì, zhù nǐ zǎorì kāngfù!
dialogue.en: You're welcome, wish you a speedy recovery!

usefulSentences.a: 我頭痛、咳嗽，還有點鼻塞。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǎlǐ bù shūfú?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ tóutòng, késòu, hái yǒudiǎn bísāi.
usefulSentences.en_q: What's wrong?
usefulSentences.en_a: I have a headache, a cough, and a bit of a stuffy nose.

usefulSentences.py_q: Zhège yào yào zěnme chī?
usefulSentences.py_a: Sāncān fànhòu chī, měicì yī kē.
usefulSentences.en_q: How should I take this medicine?
usefulSentences.en_a: Take one pill after three meals a day.

usefulSentences.q: 我有藥物過敏，要注意嗎？
usefulSentences.a: 請告訴醫生你對什麼藥過敏。
usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ yǒu yàowù guòmǐn, yào zhùyì ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Qǐng gàosù yīshēng nǐ duì shénme yào guòmǐn.
usefulSentences.en_q: I have drug allergies; should I be careful?
usefulSentences.en_a: Please tell the doctor what medicine you are allergic to.

usefulSentences.a: 大部分有健保給付，只需付掛號費。
usefulSentences.py_q: Xūyào zìfèi ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Dà bùfèn yǒu jiànbǎo gěifù, zhǐ xū fù guàhào fèi.
usefulSentences.en_q: Do I need to pay out of pocket?
usefulSentences.en_a: Most is covered by health insurance; you only need to pay the registration fee.

usefulSentences.py_q: Zhù nǐ zǎorì kāngfù!
usefulSentences.py_a: Xièxiè nǐ de guānxīn.
usefulSentences.en_q: Wish you a speedy recovery!
usefulSentences.en_a: Thank you for your concern.

paragraphs.zh: 台灣的全民健康保險制度聞名世界。只要擁有一張健保卡，民眾就可以用非常低廉的價格享受到高品質的醫療服務。無論是感冒、牙痛或是需要長期治療的疾病，健保都提供了強大的支持。
paragraphs.py: Táiwān de quánmín jiànkāng bǎoxiǎn zhìdù wénmíng shìjiè. Zhǐyào yǒngyǒu yī zhāng jiànbǎokǎ, mínzhòng jiù kěyǐ yòng fēicháng dīlián de jiàgé xiǎngshòu dào gāo pǐnzhí de yīliáo fúwù. Wúlùn shì gǎnmào, yátòng huòshì xūyào chángqī zhìliáo de jíbìng, jiànbǎo dōu tígōngle qiángdà de zhīchí.
paragraphs.en: Taiwan's National Health Insurance system is world-famous. With a health insurance card, people can enjoy high-quality medical services at a very low price. Whether it's a cold, a toothache, or a disease requiring long-term treatment, the insurance provides strong support.

paragraphs.zh: 在台灣看醫生非常方便。巷弄內隨處可見各科的『診所』，如內科、小兒科、牙科等。診所通常不需要預約，現場掛號即可看診。如果情況較嚴重，診所醫生也會協助轉診到設備更完善的大醫院。
paragraphs.py: Zài Táiwān kàn yīshēng fēicháng fāngbiàn. Xiànglòng nèi suíchù kějiàn gèkē de 『zhěnsuǒ』, rú nèikē, xiǎo'érkē, yákē děng. Zhěnsuǒ tōngcháng bù xūyào yùyuē, xiànchǎng guàhào jíkě kànzhěn. Rúguǒ qíngkuàng jiào yánzhòng, zhěnsuǒ yīshēng yě huì xiézhù zhuǎnzhěn dào shèbèi gèng wánshàn de dà yīyuàn.
paragraphs.en: Seeing a doctor in Taiwan is very convenient. Clinics for various specialties, such as internal medicine, pediatrics, and dentistry, are everywhere in the alleys. Clinics usually don't require an appointment; you can register on-site for a consultation. If the situation is more serious, the clinic doctor will also assist in referring you to a larger hospital with better equipment.

paragraphs.zh: 領藥的流程也非常簡單。看診後，醫生會開立『處方箋』，病人可以選擇在診所附設的藥局或是外面的特約藥局領藥。藥師會詳細說明藥物的用法和注意事項。這種醫藥分業的制度確保了用藥的安全性。
paragraphs.py: Lǐng yào de liúchéng yě fēicháng jiǎndān. Kànzhěn hòu, yīshēng huì kāilì 『chǔfāngjiān』, bìngrén kěyǐ xuǎnzé zài zhěnsuǒ fùshè de yàojú huòshì wàimiàn de tèyuē yàojú lǐng yào. Yàoshī huì xiángxì shuōmíng yàowù de yòngfǎ hé zhùyì shìxiàng. Zhèzhǒng yīyào fēnyè de zhìdù quèbǎole yòngyào de ānquánxìng.
paragraphs.en: The process of picking up medicine is also very simple. After the consultation, the doctor will issue a 'prescription,' and the patient can choose to pick up the medicine at the pharmacy attached to the clinic or at an outside contracted pharmacy. The pharmacist will explain the usage and precautions of the medicine in detail. This system of separating medical practice and pharmacy ensures the safety of medicine use.

comprehension.question: 在台灣享受低廉醫療服務的關鍵是什麼？
診所醫生如果覺得病人情況嚴重會怎麼做？
誰負責說明藥物的用法？

quiz.question: 如果你喉嚨痛、發燒，你可能是：
「副作用」是指：
options: 藥物帶來的額外反應(如想睡)

quiz.question: 看醫生時，醫生開的那張紙叫什麼？

scenarios.title: Directions
scenarios.description: Asking for and giving directions to landmarks in the city.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 不好意思，請問這附近有郵局嗎？
dialogue.py: Bù hǎoyìsi, qǐngwèn zhè fùjìn yǒu yóujú ma?
dialogue.en: Excuse me, is there a post office nearby?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 有啊。你往前走，在第二個紅綠燈右轉。
dialogue.py: Yǒu a. Nǐ wǎng qián zǒu, zài dì èr gè hónglǜdēng yòuzhuǎn.
dialogue.en: Yes. Walk straight and turn right at the second traffic light.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 右轉後還要走很久嗎？
dialogue.py: Yòuzhuǎn hòu hái yào zǒu hěnjiǔ ma?
dialogue.en: Is it a long walk after turning right?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不用，再走大約三分鐘就到了。它在你的左手邊。
dialogue.py: Bùyòng, zài zǒu dàyuē sān fēnzhōng jiù dào le. Tā zài nǐ de zuǒshǒubiān.
dialogue.en: No, it's about a three-minute walk. It's on your left.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 請問郵局對面有什麼顯眼的地標嗎？
dialogue.py: Qǐngwèn yóujú duìmiàn yǒu shéme xiǎnyǎn de dìbiāo ma?
dialogue.en: Is there a noticeable landmark opposite the post office?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 對面有一家很大的星巴克咖啡店。
dialogue.py: Duìmiàn yǒu yījiā hěn dà de Xīngbākè kāfēidiàn.
dialogue.en: There's a large Starbucks coffee shop opposite.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 太好了，謝謝您的詳細說明。
dialogue.py: Tài hǎole, xièxiè nín de xiángxì shuōmíng.
dialogue.en: Great, thank you for your detailed explanation.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不客氣，祝你順利找到。
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì, zhù nǐ shùnlì zhǎodào.
dialogue.en: You're welcome, hope you find it easily.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝，再見！
dialogue.py: Xièxiè, zàijiàn!
dialogue.en: Thank you, goodbye!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 再見！
dialogue.py: Zàijiàn!
dialogue.en: Goodbye!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 不好意思，打擾了。我好像迷路了。我想去這間博物館。
dialogue.py: Bù hǎoyìsi, dǎrǎole. Wǒ hǎoxiàng mílùle. Wǒ xiǎng qù zhè jiān bówùguǎn.
dialogue.en: Excuse me, sorry to bother you. I seem to be lost. I want to go to this museum.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我看看。喔，你現在走的方向剛好相反。
dialogue.py: Wǒ kàn kàn. Ō, nǐ xiànzài zǒu de fāngxiàng gānghǎo fǎnxiàng.
dialogue.en: Let me see. Oh, you're currently walking in the exact opposite direction.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 真的嗎？我看手機地圖，它叫我往這邊走。
dialogue.py: Zhēnde ma? Wǒ kàn shǒujī dìtú, tā jiào wǒ wǎng zhèbiān zǒu.
dialogue.en: Really? I was looking at my phone map, and it told me to go this way.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 有時候地圖的羅盤會失靈。你現在要往回走，過那個十字路口。
dialogue.py: Yǒushíhòu dìtú de luópán huì shīlíng. Nǐ xiànzài yào wǎng huí zǒu, guò nàge shízìlùkǒu.
dialogue.en: Sometimes the map's compass glitches. You need to go back now and cross that intersection.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 過路口後呢？
dialogue.py: Guò lùkǒu hòu ne?
dialogue.en: And after the intersection?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 過路口後直走，看到一間藍色的建築物就是了。
dialogue.py: Guò lùkǒu hòu zhízǒu, kàndào yījiān lánsè de jiànzhùwù jiùshì le.
dialogue.en: Go straight after the intersection, and the blue building you see is it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 大約要走多久？我有點趕時間。
dialogue.py: Dàyuē yào zǒu duōshǎo? Wǒ yǒudiǎn gǎn shíjiān.
dialogue.en: About how long is the walk? I'm in a bit of a hurry.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 大約十分鐘吧。如果你想快一點，那邊可以租借公共自行車。
dialogue.py: Dàyuē shí fēnzhōng ba. Rúguǒ nǐ xiǎng kuài yīdiǎn, nàbiān kěyǐ zūjiè gōnggòng zìxíngchē.
dialogue.en: About ten minutes. If you want to be faster, you can rent a public bike over there.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好主意，用騎的應該比較快。
dialogue.py: Hǎo zhǔyì, yòng qí de yīnggāi bǐjiào kuài.
dialogue.en: Good idea, riding should be faster.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 對，沿著自行車道騎大約五分鐘就到了。
dialogue.py: Duì, yánzhe zìxíngchē dào qí dàyuē wǔ fēnzhōng jiù dào le.
dialogue.en: Yes, it takes about five minutes along the bike path.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 太感謝你的熱心幫忙了！
dialogue.py: Tài gǎnxiè nǐ de rèxīn bāngmáng le!
dialogue.en: Thank you so much for your kind help!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 別客氣，祝你參觀愉快。
dialogue.py: Bié kèqì, zhù nǐ cānguān yúkuài.
dialogue.en: You're welcome, hope you enjoy your visit.

usefulSentences.a: 往前走，第二個路口右轉。
usefulSentences.py_q: Qǐngwèn yóujú zěnme zǒu?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǎng qián zǒu, dì èr gè lùkǒu yòuzhuǎn.
usefulSentences.en_q: How do I get to the post office?
usefulSentences.en_a: Go forward and turn right at the second intersection.

usefulSentences.q: 我在地圖上找不到這個地方。
usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ zài dìtú shàng zhǎo bù dào zhège dìfāng.
usefulSentences.py_a: Ràng wǒ bāng nǐ kàn yīxià.
usefulSentences.en_q: I can't find this place on the map.
usefulSentences.en_a: Let me help you take a look.

usefulSentences.q: 這附近有什麼顯眼的地標嗎？
usefulSentences.a: 轉角有一家很大的銀行。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhè fùjìn yǒu shéme xiǎnyǎn de dìbiāo ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Zhuǎnjiǎo yǒu yījiā hěn dà de yínháng.
usefulSentences.en_q: Are there any noticeable landmarks nearby?
usefulSentences.en_a: There's a large bank on the corner.

usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ zǒu cuò fāngxiàng le ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Duì, nǐ yào wǎng fǎn fāngxiàng zǒu.
usefulSentences.en_q: Am I going the wrong way?
usefulSentences.en_a: Yes, you need to go in the opposite direction.

usefulSentences.py_q: Zǒulù qù yào duōshǎo?
usefulSentences.py_a: Dàyuē shí fēnzhōng jiù dào le.
usefulSentences.en_q: How long does it take to walk there?
usefulSentences.en_a: It takes about ten minutes.

paragraphs.zh: 在一個陌生的城市裡找路，對很多人來說是個挑戰。雖然現在手機導航非常普及，但學會如何口頭詢問方向仍然是一項重要的技能。這不僅能幫你快速找到目的地，也是與當地人互動的好機會。
paragraphs.py: Zài yīgè mòshēng de chéngshì lǐ zhǎo lù, duì hěnduō rén lái shuō shì gè tiǎozhàn. Suīrán xiànzài shǒujī dǎoháng fēicháng pǔjí, dàn xuéhuì rúhé kǒutóu xúnwèn fāngxiàng réngrán shì yī xiàng zhòngyào de jìnéng. Zhè bùjǐn néng bāng nǐ kuàisù zhǎodào mùdìdì, yěshì yǔ dāngdì rén hùdòng de hǎo jīhuì.
paragraphs.en: Finding your way in a strange city is a challenge for many people. Although mobile navigation is now very popular, learning how to ask for directions verbally is still an important skill. This can not only help you find your destination quickly but also provide a good opportunity to interact with locals.

paragraphs.zh: 問路時，首先要禮貌地打招呼，例如說『不好意思，請問...』。當對方提供指引時，要注意聽關鍵詞，如『左轉』、『右轉』、『直走』或是特定的『地標』。地標如超商、銀行、公園等，能幫助你確認自己是否走在正確的路上。
paragraphs.py: Wèn lù shí, shǒuxiān yào lǐmǎodì dǎ zhāohū, lìrú shuō 『bù hǎoyìsi, qǐngwèn...』. Dāng duìfāng tígōng zhǐyǐn shí, yào zhùyì tīng guānjiàncí, rú 『zuǒzhuǎn』, 『yòuzhuǎn』, 『zhízǒu』 huòshì tèdìng de 『dìbiāo』. Dìbiāo rú chāoshāng, yínháng, gōngyuán děng, néng bāngzhù nǐ quèrèn zìjǐ shìfǒu zǒu zài zhèngquè de lùshàng.
paragraphs.en: When asking for directions, first greet politely, for example, by saying 'Excuse me, may I ask...'. When the other person provides guidance, pay attention to key words such as 'turn left', 'turn right', 'go straight', or specific 'landmarks'. Landmarks like convenience stores, banks, and parks can help you confirm if you're on the right track.

paragraphs.zh: 如果你完全迷失了方向，找人求助比盲目亂走更好。除了路人，便利商店的店員或警察局也是尋求協助的好地方。在得到幫助後，別忘了誠懇地向對方道謝。這份善意會讓你的旅程變得更加溫暖。
paragraphs.py: Rúguǒ nǐ wánquán míshīle fāngxiàng, zhǎo rén qiúzhù bǐ mángmù luàn zǒu gèng hǎo. Chúle lùrén, biànlì shāngdiàn de diànyuán huò jǐngchájú yěshì xúnqiú xiézhù de hǎo dìfāng. Zài dédào bāngzhù hòu, bié wàngle chéngkěn de xiàng duìfāng dàoxiè. Zhè fèn shànyì huì ràng nǐ de lǚchéng biàndé gèngjiā wēnnuǎn.
paragraphs.en: If you're completely lost, asking for help is better than wandering blindly. Besides passers-by, convenience store clerks or police stations are also good places to seek assistance. After getting help, don't forget to thank the person sincerely. This kindness will make your journey warmer.

comprehension.question: 問路時最基本的禮儀是什麼？
哪一個詞可以用來確認位置？
除了路人，還可以向誰尋求找路協助？

quiz.question: 如果你看到紅綠燈，那是：
當別人幫你指路後，你應該說：

title: Digital Communication
description: Written and remote communication including messaging, calls, and digital etiquette.

sentence.zh: 你最常用的通訊軟體是什麼？
sentence.py: Nǐ zuì chángyòng de tōngxùn ruǎntǐ shì shénme?
sentence.en: What is the messaging app you use most often?

sentence.zh: 你可以去應用商店下載這個程式。
sentence.py: Nǐ kěyǐ qù yìngyòng shāngdiàn xiàzài zhège chéngshì.
sentence.en: You can go to the app store to download this program.

sentence.zh: 我忘記了我的登入帳號。
sentence.py: Wǒ wàngjìle wǒ de dēngrù zhànghào.
sentence.en: I forgot my login account.

sentence.zh: 請不要把密碼告訴別人。
sentence.py: Qǐng bùyào bǎ mìmǎ gàosù biérén.
sentence.en: Please don't tell your password to others.

sentence.zh: 你需要輸入密碼才能登入。
sentence.py: Nǐ xūyào shūrù mìmǎ cáinéng dēngrù.
sentence.en: You need to enter your password to log in.

sentence.zh: 離開前記得登出你的帳號。
sentence.py: Líkāi qián jìdé dēngchū nǐ de zhànghào.
sentence.en: Remember to log out of your account before leaving.

sentence.zh: 我剛傳了一則訊息給你。
sentence.py: Wǒ gāng chuánle yī zé xùnxí gěi nǐ.
sentence.en: I just sent a message to you.

sentence.zh: 我們可以用語音通話聊聊嗎？
sentence.py: Wǒmen kěyǐ yòng yǔyīn tōnghuà liáo liáo ma?
sentence.en: Can we talk via voice call?

sentence.zh: 我想跟家人進行視訊通話。
sentence.py: Wǒ xiǎng gēn jiārén jìnxíng shìxùn tōnghuà.
sentence.en: I want to have a video call with my family.

sentence.zh: 我把你加入我們的聚餐群組了。
sentence.py: Wǒ bǎ nǐ jiārù wǒmen de jùcān qúnzǔ le.
sentence.en: I've added you to our dinner group chat.

sentence.zh: 這個貓咪貼圖好可愛！
sentence.py: Zhège māomī tiētú hǎo kě'ài!
sentence.en: This cat sticker is so cute!

sentence.zh: 他在訊息後面加了一個笑臉表情符號。
sentence.py: Tā zài xùnxí hòumiàn jiāle yīgè xiàoliǎn biǎoqíng fúhào.
sentence.en: He added a smiley face emoji after the message.

sentence.zh: 請分享你的位置給我。
sentence.py: Qǐng fēnxiǎng nǐ de wèizhì gěi wǒ.
sentence.en: Please share your location with me.

sentence.zh: 點擊這個連結就可以看到照片。
sentence.py: Diǎnjī zhège liánjié jiù kěyǐ kàndào zhàopiàn.
sentence.en: Click this link to see the photos.

sentence.zh: 請把報告寄到我的電子郵件。
sentence.py: Qǐng bǎ bàogào jì dào wǒ de diànzǐ yóujiàn.
sentence.en: Please send the report to my email.

sentence.zh: 寫郵件時別忘了填寫主旨。
sentence.py: Xiě yóujiàn shí bié wàngle tiánxiě zhǔzhǐ.
sentence.en: Don't forget to fill in the subject when writing an email.

sentence.zh: 請查收電子郵件中的附件。
sentence.py: Qǐng cháshōu diànzǐ yóujiàn zhōng de fùjiàn.
sentence.en: Please check the attachment in the email.

sentence.zh: 訊息已經傳送成功。
sentence.py: Xùnxí yǐjīng chuánsòng chénggōng.
sentence.en: The message has been sent successfully.

sentence.zh: 我有接收到你寄來的檔案。
sentence.py: Wǒ yǒu jiēshōu dào nǐ jì lái de dàng'àn.
sentence.en: I received the file you sent.

sentence.zh: 我會盡快回覆你的郵件。
sentence.py: Wǒ huì jǐnkuài huífù nǐ de yóujiàn.
sentence.en: I will reply to your email as soon as possible.

sentence.zh: 請把這封信轉寄給老闆。
sentence.py: Qǐng bǎ zhè fēng xìn zhuǎnjì gěi lǎobǎn.
sentence.en: Please forward this letter to the boss.

sentence.zh: 我的信箱裡全是垃圾郵件。
sentence.py: Wǒ de xìnxiāng lǐ quán shì lājī yóujiàn.
sentence.en: My mailbox is full of spam.

sentence.zh: 我們下午三點有個線上會議。
sentence.py: Wǒmen xiàwǔ sān diǎn yǒu gè xiànshàng huìyì.
sentence.en: We have an online meeting at 3:00 PM.

sentence.zh: 現在很多人都在線上工作。
sentence.py: Xiànzài hěnduō rén dōu zài xiànshàng gōngzuò.
sentence.en: Many people are working online now.

sentence.zh: 遠端辦公在疫情期間變得很流行。
sentence.py: Yuǎnduān bàngōng zài yìqíng qījiān biàndé hěn liúxíng.
sentence.en: Remote office became very popular during the pandemic.

sentence.zh: 請開啟螢幕共享，讓我們看看你的簡報。
sentence.py: Qǐng kāiqǐ yíngmù gòngxiǎng, ràng wǒmen kàn kàn nǐ de jiǎnbào.
sentence.en: Please turn on screen sharing so we can see your presentation.

sentence.zh: 不說話時請把麥克風靜音。
sentence.py: Bù shuōhuà shí qǐng bǎ màikèfēng jìngyīn.
sentence.en: Please mute your microphone when not speaking.

sentence.zh: 你需要取消靜音才能說話。
sentence.py: Nǐ xūyào qǔxiāo jìngyīn cáinéng shuōhuà.
sentence.en: You need to unmute to speak.

sentence.zh: 我的網路連線不太穩定。
sentence.py: Wǒ de wǎng lù liánxiàn bù tài wěndìng.
sentence.en: My internet connection is not very stable.

sentence.zh: 這裡的手機訊號很弱。
sentence.py: Zhèlǐ de shǒujī xùnhào hěn ruò.
sentence.en: The mobile signal here is very weak.

sentence.zh: 請問這裡有提供免費的無線網路嗎？
sentence.py: Qǐngwèn zhèlǐ yǒu tígōng miǎnfèi de wúxiàn wǎng lù ma?
sentence.en: Is there free Wi-Fi provided here?

sentence.zh: 我的手機電池快沒電了。
sentence.py: Wǒ de shǒujī diànchí kuài méi diàn le.
sentence.en: My phone battery is running low.

sentence.zh: 我可以借用你的充電器嗎？
sentence.py: Wǒ kěyǐ jièyòng nǐ de chōngdiàn qì ma?
sentence.en: Can I borrow your charger?

sentence.zh: 我不喜歡手機一直跳出通知。
sentence.py: Wǒ bù xǐhuān shǒujī yīzhí tiàochū tōngzhī.
sentence.en: I don't like my phone constantly popping up notifications.

sentence.zh: 我們應該保護好自己的個人隱私。
sentence.py: Wǒmen yīnggāi bǎohù hǎo zìjǐ de gèrén yǐnsī.
sentence.en: We should protect our personal privacy.

sentence.zh: 你可以在設定中更改語言。
sentence.py: Nǐ kěyǐ zài shèdìng zhōng gēnggǎi yǔyán.
sentence.en: You can change the language in the settings.

sentence.zh: 我封鎖了那個一直傳廣告的人。
sentence.py: Wǒ fēngsuǒle nàge yīzhí chuán guǎnggào de rén.
sentence.en: I blocked the person who kept sending ads.

sentence.zh: 如果你看到騷擾訊息，可以向平台檢舉。
sentence.py: Rúguǒ nǐ kàndào sāorǎo xùnxí, kěyǐ xiàng píngtái jiǎnjǔ.
sentence.en: If you see harassing messages, you can report them to the platform.

sentence.zh: 請更新你的個人資料。
sentence.py: Qǐng gēngxīn nǐ de gèrén zīliào.
sentence.en: Please update your profile.

sentence.zh: 他在通訊軟體上的狀態是「忙碌中」。
sentence.py: Tā zài tōngxùn ruǎntǐ shàng de zhuàngtài shì 'mánglù zhōng'.
sentence.en: His status on the messaging app is 'Busy'.

sentence.zh: 現在的年輕人花很多時間在社群媒體上。
sentence.py: Xiànzài de niánqīng rén huā hěnduō shíjiān zài shèqún méitǐ shàng.
sentence.en: Young people nowadays spend a lot of time on social media.

sentence.zh: 我正在上傳旅行的照片。
sentence.py: Wǒ zhèngzài shàngchuán lǚxíng de zhàopiàn.
sentence.en: I am uploading photos from my trip.

sentence.zh: 他在網路上發了一篇有趣的貼文。
sentence.py: Tā zài wǎng lù shàng fāle yī piān yǒuqù de tiēwén.
sentence.en: He published an interesting post online.

sentence.zh: 如果你有問題，可以在下方留言。
sentence.py: Rúguǒ nǐ yǒu wèntí, kěyǐ zài xiàfāng liúyán.
sentence.en: If you have questions, you can leave a comment below.

sentence.zh: 別忘了給這部影片按讚哦！
sentence.py: Bié wàngle gěi zhè bù yǐngpiàn àn zàn ó!
sentence.en: Don't forget to like this video!

sentence.zh: 我追蹤了很多有趣的插畫家。
sentence.py: Wǒ zhuīzōngle hěnduō yǒuqù de chāhuà jiā.
sentence.en: I follow many interesting illustrators.

sentence.zh: 歡迎訂閱我的頻道。
sentence.py: Huānyíng dìngyuè wǒ de píndào.
sentence.en: Welcome to subscribe to my channel.

sentence.zh: 數位轉型對企業來說非常重要。
sentence.py: Shùwèi zhuǎnxíng duì qǐyè lái shuō fēicháng zhòngyào.
sentence.en: Digital transformation is very important for enterprises.

sentence.zh: 網路溝通也需要注意禮儀。
sentence.py: Wǎng lù gōutōng yě xūyào zhùyì lǐyí.
sentence.en: Online communication also requires attention to etiquette.

sentence.zh: 這個應用程式非常好用。
sentence.py: Zhège yìngyòng chéngshì fēicháng hǎoyòng.
sentence.en: This application is very useful.

scenarios.title: Messaging Apps
scenarios.description: Exchanging contact information and sending media via messaging apps.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你有在用 Line 嗎？我想加你的好友，方便以後聯絡。
dialogue.py: Nǐ yǒu zài yòng Line ma? Wǒ xiǎng jiā nǐ de hǎoyǒu, fāngbiàn yǐhòu liánluò.
dialogue.en: Do you use Line? I'd like to add you as a friend for future contact.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 有啊，我每天都會用。我的 ID 是 xiaomei123，你搜尋看看。
dialogue.py: Yǒu a, wǒ měitiān dūhuì yòng. Wǒ de ID shì xiaomei123, nǐ sōuxún kàn kàn.
dialogue.en: Yes, I use it every day. My ID is xiaomei123, try searching for it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好，我現在搜尋。你的大頭照是一隻穿衣服的貓嗎？
dialogue.py: Hǎo, wǒ xiànzài sōuxún. Nǐ de dàtóuzhào shì yī zhī chuān yīfú de māo ma?
dialogue.en: Okay, I'm searching now. Is your profile picture a cat wearing clothes?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒錯，那是我的貓。我看到你的邀請了，我現在就按確認。
dialogue.py: Méicuò, nà shì wǒ de māo. Wǒ kàndào nǐ de yāoqǐng le, wǒ xiànzài jiù àn quèrèn.
dialogue.en: Correct, that's my cat. I see your invitation; I'll press confirm now.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 太好了！我等一下把我們昨天聚餐的照片 and 資訊傳給你。
dialogue.py: Tài hǎole! Wǒ děng yīxià bǎ wǒmen zuótiān jùcān de zhàopiàn hé zīxùn chuán gěi nǐ.
dialogue.en: Great! I'll send you the photos and information from our dinner yesterday in a bit.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，我收到後會回覆你。我也會把餐廳的連結分享在我們的群組裡。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, wǒ shōudào hòu huífù nǐ. Wǒ yě huì bǎ cāntǐng de liánjié fēnxiǎng zài wǒmen de qúnzǔ lǐ.
dialogue.en: No problem, I'll reply once I get them. I'll also share the restaurant link in our group.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你還在那個舊的群組裡嗎？還是我們開一個新的？
dialogue.py: Nǐ hái zài nàge jiù de qúnzǔ lǐ ma? Háishì wǒmen kāi yīgè xīn de?
dialogue.en: Are you still in that old group? Or should we start a new one?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 開一個新的吧，這樣資訊比較不會亂掉。
dialogue.py: Kāi yīgè xīn de ba, zhèyàng zīxùn bǐjiào bù huì luàn diào.
dialogue.en: Let's start a new one, so the information doesn't get cluttered.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好主意，我現在就把你和其他人拉進去。
dialogue.py: Hǎo zhǔyì, wǒ xiànzài jiù bǎ nǐ hé qítā rén lā jìnqù.
dialogue.en: Good idea, I'll add you and the others in right now.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 看到了，我已經進去了。謝謝你的幫忙！
dialogue.py: Kàndàole, wǒ yǐjīng jìnqùle. Xièxiè nǐ de bāngmáng!
dialogue.en: I see it, I'm in. Thanks for your help!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你看，這是我昨天去宜蘭旅行拍的照片，那裡的風景超美。
dialogue.py: Nǐ kàn, zhè shì wǒ zuótiān qù Yílán lǚxíng pāi de zhàopiàn, nàlǐ de fēngjǐng chāo měi.
dialogue.en: Look, these are the photos I took on my trip to Yilan yesterday; the scenery there is so beautiful.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 哇，天好藍喔！你可以把原圖傳給我嗎？我想存起來。
dialogue.py: Wa, tiān hǎo lán ō! Nǐ kěyǐ bǎ yuántú chuán gěi wǒ ma? Wǒ xiǎng cún qǐlái.
dialogue.en: Wow, the sky is so blue! Can you send me the original images? I want to save them.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，我現在傳。這些檔案有點大，可能要花一點時間。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, wǒ xiànzài chuán. Zhèxiē dàng'àn yǒudiǎn dà, kěnéng yào huā yīdiǎn shíjiān.
dialogue.en: No problem, I'm sending them now. These files are a bit large, so it might take some time.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 收到了，謝謝！那個「謝謝」的貓咪貼圖好可愛，是在哪裡買的？
dialogue.py: Shōudàole, xièxiè! Nàge 'xièxiè' de māomī tiētú hǎo kě'ài, shì zài nǎlǐ mǎi de?
dialogue.en: Received, thanks! That 'thank you' cat sticker is so cute, where did you buy it?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 是在貼圖小舖買的，最近剛推出的。我把購買連結傳給你。
dialogue.py: Shì zài tiētú xiǎopù mǎi de, zuìjìn gāng tuīchū de. Wǒ bǎ gòumǎi liánjié chuán gěi nǐ.
dialogue.en: I bought it in the sticker shop; it was just released recently. I'll send you the purchase link.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 太棒了，我也要去下載！我最喜歡收集這種可愛的貼圖了。
dialogue.py: Tài bàngle, wǒ yě yào qù xiàzài! Wǒ zuì xǐhuān shōují zhèzhǒng kě'ài de tiētú le.
dialogue.en: Excellent, I'm going to download it too! I love collecting these kinds of cute stickers.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 對了，這張照片裡的人是誰？我好像沒見過。
dialogue.py: Duìle, zhè zhāng zhàopiàn lǐ de rén shì shéi? Wǒ hǎoxiàng méi jiànguò.
dialogue.en: By the way, who is this person in the photo? I don't think I've met them.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 喔，那是我的表弟，他這次也跟我們一起去。
dialogue.py: Ō, nà shì wǒ de biǎodì, tā zhè cì yě gēn wǒmen yīqǐ qù.
dialogue.en: Oh, that's my cousin; he went with us this time too.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 原來如此。下次有機會也介紹給我認識吧！
dialogue.py: Yuánlái rúcǐ. Xià cì yǒu jīhuì yě jièshào gěi wǒ rènshì ba!
dialogue.en: I see. If there's a chance next time, introduce me too!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好啊，沒問題。我先把照片轉傳給他看。
dialogue.py: Hǎo a, méi wèntí. Wǒ xiān bǎ zhàopiàn zhuǎnfachuán gěi tā kàn.
dialogue.en: Sure, no problem. I'll forward the photos to him first.

usefulSentences.q: 我可以加你的 Line 嗎？
usefulSentences.a: 當然可以，我的 ID 是...
usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ kěyǐ jiā nǐ de Line ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Dāngrán kěyǐ, wǒ de ID shì...
usefulSentences.en_q: Can I add you on Line?
usefulSentences.en_a: Of course, my ID is...

usefulSentences.q: 你可以分享位置給我嗎？
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ kěyǐ fēnxiǎng wèizhì gěi wǒ ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Méi wèntí, wǒ xiànzài chuán gěi nǐ.
usefulSentences.en_q: Can you share your location with me?
usefulSentences.en_a: No problem, I'll send it to you now.

usefulSentences.q: 你有收到我傳的照片嗎？
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ yǒu shōudào wǒ chuán de zhàopiàn ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Yǒu, yǐjīng shōudàole, xièxiè.
usefulSentences.en_q: Did you receive the photos I sent?
usefulSentences.en_a: Yes, I've received them, thanks.

usefulSentences.q: 這個貼圖要去哪裡下載？
usefulSentences.a: 在貼圖小舖就可以找到了。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhège tiētú yào qù nǎlǐ xiàzài?
usefulSentences.py_a: Zài tiētú xiǎopù jiù kěyǐ zhǎodàole.
usefulSentences.en_q: Where can I download this sticker?
usefulSentences.en_a: You can find it in the sticker shop.

usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ bǎ nǐ jiārù qúnzǔ luo!
usefulSentences.py_a: Hǎo de, xièxiè nǐ.
usefulSentences.en_q: I've added you to the group!
usefulSentences.en_a: Okay, thank you.

paragraphs.zh: 隨著科技的進步，通訊軟體已經成為現代人生活中不可或缺的一部分。無論是與親友聯繫，還是工作上的溝通，我們都習慣透過訊息、貼圖或是語音通話來達成目的。
paragraphs.py: Suízhe kējì de jìnbù, tōngxùn ruǎntǐ yǐjīng chéngwéi xiàndài rén shēnghuó zhōng bùkě huòquē de yībùfèn. Wúlùn shì yǔ qīnyǒu liánxì, háishì gōngzuò shàng de gōutōng, wǒmen dōu xíguàn tòuguò xùnxí, tiētú huòshì yǔyīn tōnghuà lái dáchéng mùdì.
paragraphs.en: With the advancement of technology, messaging apps have become an indispensable part of modern life. Whether it's staying in touch with relatives and friends or communicating at work, we are used to using messages, stickers, or voice calls to achieve our goals.

paragraphs.zh: 透過通訊軟體，我們可以隨時隨地分享照片、影片和連結。這讓資訊的傳遞變得非常快速且方便。此外，可愛的貼圖和表情符號也能讓對話變得更有趣，增進彼此的情感。
paragraphs.py: Tòuguò tōngxùn ruǎntǐ, wǒmen kěyǐ suíshí suídì fēnxiǎng zhàopiàn, yǐngpiàn hé liánjié. Zhè ràng zīxùn de chuándì biàndé fēicháng kuàisù qiě fāngbiàn. Cǐwài, kě'ài de tiētú hé biǎoqíng fúhào yě néng ràng duìhuà biàndé gèng yǒuqù, zēngjìn bǐcǐ de qínggǎn.
paragraphs.en: Through messaging apps, we can share photos, videos, and links anytime, anywhere. This makes the transmission of information very fast and convenient. In addition, cute stickers and emojis can also make conversations more interesting and enhance mutual feelings.

paragraphs.zh: 然而，在使用通訊軟體時，我們也應該注意網路禮儀。例如，不要在深夜傳送不重要的訊息，以及在加入群組前先徵求對方的同意。良好的通訊習慣能讓網路世界變得更美好。
paragraphs.py: Rán'ér, zài shǐyòng tōngxùn ruǎntǐ shí, wǒmen yě yīnggāi zhùyì wǎng lù lǐyí. Lìrú, bùyào zài shēnyè chuánsòng bù zhòngyào de xùnxí, yǐjí zài jiārù qúnzǔ qián xiān zhēngqiú duìfāng de tóngyì. Liánghǎo de tōngxùn xíguàn néng ràng wǎng lù shìjiè biàndé gèng měihǎo.
paragraphs.en: However, when using messaging apps, we should also pay attention to online etiquette. For example, don't send unimportant messages late at night, and seek the other party's consent before adding them to a group. Good communication habits can make the online world a better place.

comprehension.question: 通訊軟體在現代生活中的地位如何？
貼圖和表情符號有什麼作用？
哪一項是良好的網路禮儀？
options: 加入群組前先徵求同意

quiz.question: 當你想加別人的好友時，可以問：
options: 我可以加你的 Line 嗎？

quiz.question: 「分享連結」的目的是：
options: 讓對方看到特定的網頁或資訊

quiz.question: 哪一個動作可以讓對方收到照片？

scenarios.title: Phone Calls
scenarios.description: Making and receiving phone calls, and leaving voice messages.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 喂，你好。請問王經理在嗎？我找他有急事。
dialogue.py: Wéi, nǐ hǎo. Qǐngwèn Wáng jīnglǐ zài ma? Wǒ zhǎo tā yǒu jíshì.
dialogue.en: Hello. Is Manager Wang there, please? I have urgent business with him.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 你好。王經理現在正在開會，大約要一個小時後才結束。
dialogue.py: Nǐ hǎo. Wáng jīnglǐ xiànzài zhèngzài kāihuì, dàyuē yào yīgè xiǎoshí hòu cái jiéshù.
dialogue.en: Hello. Manager Wang is currently in a meeting; it should end in about an hour.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這樣啊。我是李大衛。請問他什麼時候方便接電話？
dialogue.py: Zhèyàng a. Wǒ shì Lǐ Dàwèi. Qǐngwèn tā shénme shíhòu fāngbiàn jiē diànhuà?
dialogue.en: I see. This is David Li. When would it be convenient for him to take a call?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 會議結束後他應該有空。需要幫您留言給他嗎？
dialogue.py: Huìyì jiéshù hòu tā yīnggāi yǒu kòng. Xūyào bāng nín liúyán gěi tā ma?
dialogue.en: He should be free after the meeting. Would you like me to leave a message for him?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好的，請轉告他，我已經把明天的合約草案寄到他的信箱了。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, qǐng zhuǎngào tā, wǒ yǐjīng bǎ míngtiān de héyuē cǎo'àn jì dào tā de xìnxiāng le.
dialogue.en: Yes, please tell him that I've sent tomorrow's draft contract to his inbox.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，我會把這件事寫在便利貼上，放在他的辦公桌上。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, wǒ huì bǎ zhè jiàn shì xiě zài biànlì tiē shàng, fàng zài tā de bàngōng zhuō shàng.
dialogue.en: No problem, I'll write this on a sticky note and leave it on his desk.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝妳的幫忙。另外，如果他有任何問題，請他隨時回電給我。
dialogue.py: Xièxiè nǐ de bāngmáng. Lìngwài, rúguǒ tā yǒu rènhé wèntí, qǐng tā suíshí huí diàn gěi wǒ.
dialogue.en: Thanks for your help. Also, if he has any questions, please ask him to call me back anytime.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，我會提醒他的。請問您的聯絡電話是？
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, wǒ huì tíxǐng tā de. Qǐngwèn nín de liánluò diànhuà shì?
dialogue.en: Okay, I'll remind him. May I have your contact number?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.py: Wǒ de shǒujī hàomǎ shì líng-jiǔ-yī-èr sān-sì-wǔ liù-qī-bā.
dialogue.en: My mobile number is 0912-345-678.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 記下來了。王經理一出會議室我就會告訴他。再見。
dialogue.py: Jì xiàláile. Wáng jīnglǐ yī chū huìyì shì wǒ jiù huì gàosù tā. Zàijiàn.
dialogue.en: Got it. I'll tell Manager Wang as soon as he comes out of the meeting room. Goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 喂，哪裡找？我現在正在外面。
dialogue.py: Wéi, nǎlǐ zhǎo? Wǒ xiànzài zhèngzài wàimiàn.
dialogue.en: Hello, who's calling? I'm currently out.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 你好，我是大順快遞。有一件您的國際包裹要簽收。
dialogue.py: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ shì Dàshùn kuàidì. Yǒu yī jiàn nín de guójì bāoguǒ yào qiānshōu.
dialogue.en: Hello, this is Dashun Express. I have an international package for you to sign for.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 喔，好。但我現在不在家，可以請你放在管理室嗎？
dialogue.py: Ō, hǎo. Dàn wǒ xiànzài bùzài jiā, kěyǐ qǐng nǐ fàng zài guǎnlǐ shì ma?
dialogue.en: Oh, okay. But I'm not home right now, could you please leave it at the management office?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不好意思，因為這是貴重物品，必須由本人親自簽收並出示身分證件。
dialogue.py: Bù hǎoyìsi, yīnwèi zhè shì guìzhòng wùpǐn, bìxū yóu běnrén qīnzì qiānshōu bìng chūshì shēnfèn zhèngjiàn.
dialogue.en: Sorry, because this is a valuable item, it must be signed for in person and an ID must be shown.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我了解了。那可以改到明天下午兩點左右送來嗎？那時候我也會在家。
dialogue.py: Wǒ liǎojiěle. Nà kěyǐ gǎi dào míngtiān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn zuǒyòu sòng lái ma? Nà shíhòu wǒ yě huì zài jiā.
dialogue.en: I understand. Then can we reschedule for delivery around 2:00 PM tomorrow? I'll be home then too.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，我幫您註記一下明天下午兩點送達。
dialogue.py: Wǒ bāng nín zhùjì yīxià míngtiān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn sòng dá.
dialogue.en: No problem, I'll make a note to deliver it at 2:00 PM tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝你的配合。對了，送達前可以先打電話給我嗎？
dialogue.py: Xièxiè nǐ de pèihé. Duìle, sòng dá qián kěyǐ xiān dǎ diànhuà gěi wǒ ma?
dialogue.en: Thanks for your cooperation. By the way, can you call me before you arrive?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 可以的，我到達前十分鐘會先跟您聯繫。
dialogue.py: Kěyǐ de, wǒ dàodá qián shí fēnzhōng huì xiān gēn nín liánxì.
dialogue.en: Yes, I'll contact you ten minutes before I arrive.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 太棒了，那就明天見。
dialogue.py: Tài bàngle, nà jiù míngtiān jiàn.
dialogue.en: Excellent, see you tomorrow then.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，祝您有愉快的一天。再見。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, zhù nín yǒu yúkuài de yītiān. Zàijiàn.
dialogue.en: Okay, have a pleasant day. Goodbye.

usefulSentences.py_q: Wéi, qǐngwèn Wáng xiānshēng zài ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ jiùshì, qǐngwèn nǎ wèi?
usefulSentences.en_q: Hello, is Mr. Wang there?
usefulSentences.en_a: This is he. Who's calling?

usefulSentences.q: 他的電話打不通，怎麼辦？
usefulSentences.a: 你可以先留語音訊息給他。
usefulSentences.py_q: Tā de diànhuà dǎ bù tōng, zěnme bàn?
usefulSentences.py_a: Nǐ kěyǐ xiān liú yǔyīn xùnxí gěi tā.
usefulSentences.en_q: I can't get through to his phone, what should I do?
usefulSentences.en_a: You can leave a voice message for him first.

usefulSentences.q: 抱歉，我剛才沒接到電話。
usefulSentences.a: 沒關係，我剛才是想問你...
usefulSentences.py_q: Bàoqiàn, wǒ gāngcái méi jiē dào diànhuà.
usefulSentences.py_a: Méiguānxì, wǒ gāngcái shì xiǎng wèn nǐ...
usefulSentences.en_q: Sorry, I missed your call just now.
usefulSentences.en_a: It's okay, I just wanted to ask you...

usefulSentences.a: 不用了，我晚點再打給他。
usefulSentences.py_q: Xūyào wǒ bāng nǐ liúyán ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Bùyòngle, wǒ wǎndiǎn zài dǎ gěi tā.
usefulSentences.en_q: Do you need me to take a message?
usefulSentences.en_a: No thanks, I'll call him back later.

usefulSentences.a: 對，這裡訊號很弱，我換個地方。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ de shōuxùn hǎoxiàng bù tài hǎo.
usefulSentences.py_a: Duì, zhèlǐ xùnhào hěn ruò, wǒ huàn gè dìfāng.
usefulSentences.en_q: Your reception seems a bit poor.
usefulSentences.en_a: Yes, the signal is weak here, I'll move to another spot.

paragraphs.zh: 雖然現在通訊軟體很發達，但在某些情況下，打電話仍然是最直接且有效的溝通方式。撥打電話時，第一句話通常是「喂，你好」，接著應該表明自己的身分並說明來意。
paragraphs.py: Suīrán xiànzài tōngxùn ruǎntǐ hěn fādá, dàn zài mǒu xiē qíngkuàng xià, dǎ diànhuà réngrán shì zuì zhíjiē qiě yǒuxiào de gōutōng fāngshì. Bōdǎ diànhuà shí, dì yī jù huà tōngcháng shì 『wéi, nǐ hǎo』, jiēzhe yīnggāi biǎomíng zìjǐ de shēnfèn bìng shuōmíng láiyì.
paragraphs.en: Although messaging apps are very developed now, in some situations, making a phone call is still the most direct and effective way to communicate. When making a call, the first sentence is usually 'Hello,' followed by identifying yourself and stating your purpose.

paragraphs.zh: 在撥打辦公室電話時，如果對方不在位子上，我們可以詢問對方何時方便接聽，或是請求代為留言。留言時應該簡潔明瞭，並留下自己的聯絡方式，以便對方回電。
paragraphs.py: Zài bōdǎ bàngōngshì diànhuà shí, rúguǒ duìfāng bùzài wèizi shàng, wǒmen kěyǐ xúnwèn duìfāng héshí fāngbiàn jiētīng, huòshì qǐngqiú dài wéi liúyán. Liúyán shí yīnggāi jiǎnjié míngliǎo, bìng liú xià zìjǐ de liánluò fāngshì, yǐbiàn duìfāng huí diàn.
paragraphs.en: When calling an office, if the other person is not at their desk, we can ask when it's convenient for them to take the call or request to leave a message. Messages should be concise and clear, and leave your contact information so the other party can call back.

paragraphs.zh: 此外，接聽電話時也要注意口氣和禮貌。如果正在忙碌，可以先告知對方，並約定稍後回電。在公共場合打電話時，應該降低音量，避免干擾到身邊的人。
paragraphs.py: Cǐwài, jiētīng diànhuà shí yě yào zhùyì kǒuqì hé lǐyí. Rúguǒ zhèngzài mánglù, kěyǐ xiān gàozhī duìfāng, bìng yuēdìng shāohòu huí diàn. Zài gōnggòng chǎnghé dǎ diànhuà shí, yīnggāi jiàngdī yīnliàng, bìmiǎn gānrǎo dào shēnbiān de rén.
paragraphs.en: In addition, when answering the phone, you should also pay attention to your tone and etiquette. If you are busy, you can inform the other party first and agree to call back later. When making a call in a public place, you should lower your volume to avoid disturbing the people around you.

如果對方不在，留言時應該注意什麼？
options: 簡潔明瞭並留聯絡方式

scenarios.title: Emails
scenarios.description: Writing formal and informal emails, and handling attachments.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你在寫什麼？你看起來已經坐在電腦前一個小時了。
dialogue.py: Nǐ zài xiě shénme? Nǐ kàn qǐlái yǐjīng zuò zài diànnǎo qián yīgè xiǎoshí le.
dialogue.en: What are you writing? You look like you've been sitting at the computer for an hour.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我在給一個重要客戶寫電子郵件，想跟他們確認下個月的專案會議。
dialogue.py: Wǒ zài gěi yīgè zhòngyào kèhù xiě diànzǐ yóujiàn, xiǎng gēn tāmen quèrèn xià gè yuè de zhuānyè huìyì.
dialogue.en: I'm writing an email to an important client to confirm next month's project meeting with them.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 寫這種正式郵件確實要很小心。你的郵件主旨寫好了嗎？
dialogue.py: Xiě zhèzhǒng zhèngshì yóujiàn quèshí yào hěn xiǎoxīn. Nǐ de yóujiàn zhǔzhǐ xiě hǎole ma?
dialogue.en: Writing this kind of formal email indeed requires caution. Is your email subject line ready?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 寫好了，主旨是「關於 11 月專案進度會議時間之確認與議程安排」。
dialogue.py: Xiě hǎole, zhǔzhǐ shì 『guānyú shí-yī-yuè zhuānyè jìndù huìyì shíjiān zhī quèrèn yǔ yìchéng ānpái』.
dialogue.en: Yes, the subject is 'Confirmation of November Project Progress Meeting Time and Agenda Arrangement'.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 聽起來很專業。你有在郵件裡附上這次會議要討論的議程表嗎？
dialogue.py: Tīng qǐlái hěn zhuānyè. Nǐ yǒu zài yóujiàn lǐ fù shàng zhè cì huìyì yào tǎolùn de yìchéngbiǎo ma?
dialogue.en: Sounds professional. Did you attach the agenda table to be discussed in this meeting?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 啊，幸好你提醒我，我差點忘了！我現在就把附件補上去。
dialogue.py: A, xìnghǎo nǐ tíxǐng wǒ, wǒ chàdiǎn wàngle! Wǒ xiànzài jiù bǎ fùjiàn bǔ shàngqù.
dialogue.en: Ah, lucky you reminded me, I almost forgot! I'll add the attachment now.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒關係，寄出前再檢查一遍。對了，你有 CC 給專案經理嗎？
dialogue.py: Méiguānxì, jì chū qián zài jiǎnchá yībiàn. Duìle, nǐ yǒu CC gěi zhuānyè jīnglǐ ma?
dialogue.en: It's okay, check it once more before sending. By the way, did you CC the project manager?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 有，我已經把他加入副本收件人了。還有其他要注意的嗎？
dialogue.py: Yǒu, wǒ yǐjīng bǎ tā jiārù fùběn shōujiàn rén le. Hái yǒu qítā yào zhùyì de ma?
dialogue.en: Yes, I've already added him as a CC recipient. Is there anything else to note?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 檢查一下結尾的署名和聯絡方式是否正確。這能顯示你的細心。
dialogue.py: Jiǎnchá yīxià jiéwěi de shǔmíng hé liánluò fāngshì shìfǒu zhèngquè. Zhè néng xiǎnshì nǐ de xìxīn.
dialogue.en: Check if the signature and contact information at the end are correct. This shows your attention to detail.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，全部都檢查過了。我要按下「傳送」鍵囉！
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, quánbù dōu jiǎncháguòle. Wǒ yào àn xià 『chuánsòng』 jiàn luo!
dialogue.en: Okay, everything has been checked. I'm going to press the 'send' button!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我剛剛寄了一封關於週末旅遊規劃的信給你，你有空收一下。
dialogue.py: Wǒ gānggāng jìle yī fēng guānyú zhōumò lǚyóu guīhuà de xìn gěi nǐ, nǐ yǒu kòng shōu yīxià.
dialogue.en: I just sent you an email about the weekend trip planning; check it when you have time.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 等一下喔，我正在清理我的電子信箱，裡面全是廣告垃圾郵件。
dialogue.py: Děng yīxià ō, wǒ zhèngzài qīnglǐ wǒ de diànzǐ xìnxiāng, lǐmiàn quán shì guǎnggào lājī yóujiàn.
dialogue.en: Wait a second, I'm cleaning out my email; it's full of advertising spam.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 真討厭。你沒有設定垃圾郵件過濾器嗎？
dialogue.py: Zhēn tǎoyàn. Nǐ méiyǒu shèdìng lājī yóujiàn guòlǜ qì ma?
dialogue.en: How annoying. Don't you have a spam filter set up?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 有啊，但最近這些垃圾郵件越來越聰明了，還是有很多會跑進收件匣。
dialogue.py: Yǒu a, dàn zuìjìn zhèxiē lājī yóujiàn yuè lái yuè cōngmíng le, háishì yǒu hěnduō huì pǎo jìn shōujiàn xiá.
dialogue.en: Yes, but recently this spam has become smarter, and many still end up in the inbox.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我看到了，你剛剛應該收到了一封主旨是「週末宜蘭行程」的信。
dialogue.py: Wǒ kàndàole, nǐ gānggāng yīnggāi shōudàole yī fēng zhǔzhǐ shì 『zhōumò Yílán xíngchéng』 de xìn.
dialogue.en: I see; you should have just received an email with the subject 'Weekend Yilan Itinerary'.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 喔，看到了！就在那一堆減肥廣告下面。這標題很清楚。
dialogue.py: Ō, kàndàole! Jiù zài nà yī duī jiǎnféi guǎnggào xiàmiàn. Zhè biāotí hěn傾chǔ.
dialogue.en: Oh, I see it! Right under a bunch of weight loss ads. This title is very clear.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 信裡面我有附上地圖和幾家餐廳的連結，你幫我看看哪家好。
dialogue.py: Xìn lǐmiàn wǒ yǒu fù shàng dìtú hé jǐ jiā cāntǐng de liánjié, nǐ bāng wǒ kàn kàn nǎ jiā hǎo.
dialogue.en: I've attached maps and links to several restaurants in the email; help me see which one is good.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題。我要下載附件來看嗎？還是直接點連結就可以了？
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí. Wǒ yào xiàzài fùjiàn lái kàn ma? Háishì zhíjiē diǎn liánjié jiù kěyǐ le?
dialogue.en: No problem. Should I download the attachment to look at it, or just click the links?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 都可以。你看完再回信告訴我你的想法，我再跟其他人說。
dialogue.py: Dōu kěyǐ. Nǐ kàn wán zài huíxìn gàosù wǒ nǐ de xiǎngfǎ, wǒ zài gēn qítā rén shuō.
dialogue.en: Either is fine. Email me back with your thoughts after you've looked, and I'll tell the others.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好，我十分鐘後就會回覆你. 謝謝你的規劃！
dialogue.py: Hǎo, wǒ shí fēnzhōng hòu jiù huì huífù nǐ. Xièè nǐ de guīhuà!
dialogue.en: Okay, I'll reply to you in ten minutes. Thanks for the planning!

usefulSentences.en_q: Please remember to reply to me before tomorrow.
usefulSentences.en_a: No problem, I'll handle it this afternoon.

reading.title: 如何寫一封好的電子郵件

paragraphs.zh: 在工作場合，電子郵件是最正式的通訊工具之一. 一封好的電子郵件應該具備清晰的主旨，讓收件人一眼就能知道郵件的內容。主旨應該簡潔且具有描述性。
paragraphs.py: Zài gōngzuò chǎnghé, diànzǐ yóujiàn shì zuì zhèngshì de tōngxùn gōngjù zhī yī. Yī fēng hǎo de diànzǐ yóujiàn yīnggāi jùbèi qīngxī de zhǔzhǐ, ràng shōujiàn rén yīyǎn jiù néng zhīdào yóujiàn de nèiróng. Zhǔzhǐ yīnggāi jiǎnjié qiě jùyǒu miáoshù xìng.
paragraphs.en: In professional settings, email is one of the most formal communication tools. A good email should have a clear subject line so the recipient knows the content at a glance. The subject line should be concise and descriptive.

paragraphs.zh: 郵件的內文應包含稱呼、正文和結尾. 如果是寫給不認識的人，稱呼應該要正式。正文部分要條理分明，避免過於冗長的句子。如果有附件，最好在內文中提醒收件人查看。
paragraphs.py: Yóujiàn de nèiwén yīng bāohán chēnghu, zhèngwén hé jiéwěi. Rúguǒ shì xiě gěi bù rènshì de rén, chēnghu yīnggāi yào zhèngshì. Zhèngwén bùfèn yào tiáolǐ fēnmíng, bìmiǎn guòyú rǒngcháng de jùzi. Rúguǒ yǒu fùjiàn, zuì hǎo zài nèiwén zhōng tíxǐng shōujiàn rén chákàn.
paragraphs.en: The body of the email should include a salutation, the body text, and a closing. If writing to someone you don't know, the salutation should be formal. The body should be well-organized, avoiding overly long sentences. If there's an attachment, it's best to remind the recipient to check it in the body.

paragraphs.zh: 最後，寄出郵件前一定要檢查是否有拼字錯誤，以及是否附上了正確的檔案. 此外，及時回覆郵件也是基本的職業禮貌，這顯示了你對工作的專業與負責任的態度。
paragraphs.py: Zuìhòu, jì chū yóujiàn qián yīdìng yào jiǎnchá shìfǒu yǒu pīnzì cuòwù, yǐjí shìfǒu fù shàngle zhèngquè de dàng'àn. Cǐwài, jíshí huífù yóujiàn yěshì jīběn de zhíyè lǐyí, zhè xiǎnshìle nǐ duì gōngzuò de zhuānyè yǔ fù zérèn de tàidù.
paragraphs.en: Finally, before sending an email, be sure to check for spelling errors and that the correct files are attached. In addition, replying to emails promptly is basic professional etiquette, which shows your professionalism and responsible attitude toward work.
