scenarios.title: Social Media
scenarios.description: Using platforms, posting updates, and interacting with content.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你剛才在拍什麼？你看起來笑得很燦爛。
dialogue.py: Nǐ gāngcái zài pāi shénme? Nǐ kàn qǐlái xiào dé hěn cànlàn.
dialogue.en: What were you just filming? You look like you have a brilliant smile.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我在拍我們剛剛點的草莓鬆餅，準備上傳到 Instagram 上分享。
dialogue.py: Wǒ zài pāi wǒmen gānggāng diǎn de cǎoméi sōngbǐng, zhǔnbèi shàngchuán dào Instagram shàng fēnxiǎng.
dialogue.en: I'm filming the strawberry pancakes we just ordered, getting ready to upload and share on Instagram.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這家店的採光很好，拍出來的照片一定很漂亮。你要發限時動態還是貼文？
dialogue.py: Zhè jiā diàn de cǎiguāng hěn hǎo, pāi chūlái de zhàopiàn yīdìng hěn piàoliang. Nǐ yào fā xiànshí dòngtài háishì tiēwén?
dialogue.en: The lighting in this shop is great; the photos will definitely be beautiful. Are you posting a story or a post?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我先發一個限時動態，晚點回家後再慢慢整理這幾張照片發貼文。
dialogue.py: Wǒ xiān fā yīgè xiànshí dòngtài, wǎndiǎn huíjiā hòu zài mànmàn zhěnglǐ zhè jǐ zhāng zhàopiàn fā tiēwén.
dialogue.en: I'll post a story first, then organize these photos and make a post later after I get home.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好喔，記得在限時動態裡標記我！我也想要把這張美食照轉發到我的版面上。
dialogue.py: Hǎo ō, jìdé zài xiànshí dòngtài lǐ biāojì wǒ! Wǒ yě xiǎng yào bǎ zhè zhāng měishí zhào zhuǎnfā dào wǒ de bǎnmiàn shàng.
dialogue.en: Okay, remember to tag me in the story! I want to repost this food photo on my profile too.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，我已經標記你了. 你的粉絲一定會很羨慕我們今天吃這麼好。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, wǒ yǐjīng biāojì nǐle. Nǐ de fěnsī yīdìng huì hěn xiànmù wǒmen jīntiān chī zhème hǎo.
dialogue.en: No problem, I've already tagged you. Your followers will definitely be envious of how well we're eating today.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 對了，你有加這家店的濾鏡嗎？我覺得顏色看起來很自然。
dialogue.py: Duìle, nǐ yǒu jiā zhè jiā diàn de lǜjìng ma? Wǒ juédé yánsè kàn qǐlái hěn zìrán.
dialogue.en: By the way, did you add this shop's filter? I think the colors look very natural.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 有啊，我稍微調了一下亮度和對比度. 妳看，這樣是不是更有質感？
dialogue.py: Yǒu a, wǒ shāowéi tiáole yīxià liàngdù hé duìbǐdù. Nǐ kàn, zhèyàng shì bùshì gèng yǒu zhìgǎn?
dialogue.en: Yes, I adjusted the brightness and contrast slightly. Look, doesn't it have more texture this way?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 真的耶！妳真的很會攝影. 這張貼文一定會有很多讚。
dialogue.py: Zhēnde yé! Nǐ zhēnde hěn huì shèyǐng. Zhè zhāng tiēwén yīdìng huì yǒu hěnduō zàn.
dialogue.en: Truly! You're really good at photography. This post will definitely get many likes.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 希望囉！我發出去之後再傳連結給妳。
dialogue.py: Xīwàng luo! Wǒ fā chūqù zhīhòu zài chuán liánjié gěi nǐ.
dialogue.en: I hope so! I'll send you the link after I post it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你看，這部短影音超好笑的，觀看次數已經突破兩百萬了。
dialogue.py: Nǐ kàn, zhè bù duǎn yǐngyīn chāo hǎoxiào de, guānkàn cìshù yǐjīng tūpò liǎng bǎiwàn le.
dialogue.en: Look, this short video is hilarious; views have already exceeded two million.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 真的耶！我也要給它按個讚，還要分享給我的朋友圈看。
dialogue.py: Zhēnde yé! Wǒ yě yào gěi tā àn gè zàn, hái yào fēnxiǎng gěi wǒ de péngyǒuquān kàn.
dialogue.en: Truly! I'm going to give it a like and share it with my circle of friends.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 下面還有很多有趣的留言，大家都在討論那個出人意料的結局。
dialogue.py: Xiàmiàn hái yǒu hěnduō yǒuqù de liúyán, dàjiā dōu zài tǎolùn nàge chūrényìliào de jiéjú.
dialogue.en: There are many interesting comments below; everyone is discussing that unexpected ending.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我也要去留言區湊個熱鬧. 對了，這部影片的創作者是誰？我想追蹤他。
dialogue.py: Wǒ yě yào qù liúyán qū còu gè rènào. Duìle, zhè bù yǐngpiàn de chuàngzuò zhě shì shéi? Wǒ xiǎng zhuīzōng tā.
dialogue.en: I'm going to join the fun in the comments section too. By the way, who is the creator of this video? I want to follow them.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 就是那個很有名的旅遊插畫家啊，妳點擊大頭像就可以進入他的個人首頁了。
dialogue.py: Jiùshì nàge hěn yǒumíng de lǚyóu chāhuà jiā a, nǐ diǎnjī dàtóuzhào jiù kěyǐ jìnrù tā de gèrén shǒuyè le.
dialogue.en: It's that famous travel illustrator; you can click the avatar to go to their profile home page.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 看到了，我已經訂閱他的頻道，並且開啟小鈴鐺通知了。
dialogue.py: Kàndàole, wǒ yǐjīng dìngyuè tā de píndào, bìngqiě kāiqǐ xiǎo língdāng tōngzhī le.
dialogue.en: I see it; I've already subscribed to his channel and turned on the bell notifications.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我也很喜歡他的風格. 他偶爾還會舉辦線上抽獎活動呢。
dialogue.py: Wǒ yě hěn xǐhuān tā de fēnggé. Tā ǒu'ěr hái huì jǔbàn xiànshàng chōujiǎng huódòng ne.
dialogue.en: I like his style too. He occasionally hosts online giveaway events.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 真的嗎？那我要趕快去看看他之前的貼文，看看有沒有漏掉什麼好康。
dialogue.py: Zhēnde ma? Nà wǒ yào gǎnkuài qù kàn kàn tā zhīqián de tiēwén, kàn kàn yǒu méiyǒu lòu diào shénme hǎokāng.
dialogue.en: Really? Then I'd better hurry and check his previous posts to see if I missed any good deals.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 妳可以看看他精選動態裡的紀錄，裡面有很多旅行小技巧。
dialogue.py: Nǐ kěyǐ kàn kàn tā jīngxuǎn dòngtài lǐ de jìlù, lǐmiàn yǒu hěnduō lǚxíng xiǎo jìqiǎo.
dialogue.en: You can check the records in his featured highlights; there are many travel tips.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 太有幫助了！謝謝妳跟我分享這麼有趣的創作者。
dialogue.py: Tài yǒu bāngzhùle! Xièxiè nǐ gēn wǒ fēnxiǎng zhème yǒuqù de chuàngzuò zhě.
dialogue.en: So helpful! Thanks for sharing such an interesting creator with me.

usefulSentences.q: 這張照片拍得很好，你要發貼文嗎？
usefulSentences.a: 我想發在限時動態就好。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhè zhāng zhàopiàn pāi dé hěn hǎo, nǐ yào fā tiēwén ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ xiǎng fā zài xiànshí dòngtài jiù hǎo.
usefulSentences.en_q: This photo is great, are you going to make a post?
usefulSentences.en_a: I think I'll just post it on my story.

usefulSentences.q: 你可以幫我的照片按讚嗎？
usefulSentences.a: 沒問題，我已經按讚並留言了。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ kěyǐ bāng wǒ de zhàopiàn àn zàn ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Méi wèntí, wǒ yǐjīng àn zàn bìng liúyán le.
usefulSentences.en_q: Can you like my photo?
usefulSentences.en_a: No problem, I've already liked and commented.

usefulSentences.a: 有啊，他的影片都很有趣。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ yǒu zhuīzōng zhège wǎng hóng ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Yǒu a, tā de yǐngpiàn dōu hěn yǒuqù.
usefulSentences.en_q: Do you follow this influencer?
usefulSentences.en_a: Yes, their videos are all very interesting.

usefulSentences.a: 點擊飛機圖示就可以分享到你的動態了。
usefulSentences.py_q: Rúhé zhuǎnfā biérén de tiēwén?
usefulSentences.py_a: Diǎnjī fēijī túshì jiù kěyǐ fēnxiǎng dào nǐ de dòngtài le.
usefulSentences.en_q: How do I repost someone else's post?
usefulSentences.en_a: Click the airplane icon to share it to your story.

usefulSentences.q: 這部影片的觀看次數好多喔！
usefulSentences.a: 因為它已經在網路上瘋傳了。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhè bù yǐngpiàn de guānkàn cìshù hǎoduō ō!
usefulSentences.py_a: Yīnwèi tā yǐjīng zài wǎng lù shàng fēng chuán le.
usefulSentences.en_q: This video has so many views!
usefulSentences.en_a: Because it has already gone viral online.

paragraphs.zh: 社群媒體已經徹底改變了人們分享資訊和彼此聯繫的方式. 透過像是 Facebook、Instagram 或 TikTok 這樣的平台，我們可以隨時了解親友的近況，也能關注全球各地的時事與流行趨勢。
paragraphs.py: Shèqún méitǐ yǐjīng chèdǐ gǎibiànle rénmen fēnxiǎng zīxùn hé bǐcǐ liánxì de fāngshì. Tòuguò xiàng shì Facebook, Instagram huò TikTok zhèyàng de píngtái, wǒmen kěyǐ suíshí liǎojiě qīnyǒu de jìnkuàng, yě néng guānzhù quánqiú gèdì de shíshì yǔ liúxíng qūshì.
paragraphs.en: Social media has completely changed the way people share information and connect with each other. Through platforms like Facebook, Instagram, or TikTok, we can stay updated on the lives of relatives and friends, and also follow current events and popular trends from around the world.

paragraphs.zh: 在這些平台上，使用者可以透過按讚、留言和分享來進行互動. 這不僅讓資訊傳播得更快，也讓許多有才華的創作者能夠展現自我，累積自己的粉絲。然而，這也帶來了像是隱私保護與資訊真偽的問題。
paragraphs.py: Zài zhèxiē píngtái shàng, shǐyòng zhě kěyǐ tòuguò àn zàn, liúyán hé fēnxiǎng lái jìnxíng hùdòng. Zhè bùjǐn ràng zīxùn chuánbò dé gèng kuài, yě ràng xǔduō yǒu cáihuá de chuàngzuò zhě nénggòu zhǎnxiàn zìwǒ, lěijī zìjǐ de fěnsī. Rán'ér, zhè yě dàiláile xiàng shì yǐnsī bǎohù yǔ zīxùn zhēnwěi de wèntí.
paragraphs.en: On these platforms, users can interact by liking, commenting, and sharing. This not only makes information spread faster but also allows many talented creators to showcase themselves and build their following. However, it also brings issues such as privacy protection and the authenticity of information.

paragraphs.zh: 因此，在使用社群媒體時，我們應該保持理性的態度. 除了享受社交的樂趣，也要注意保護自己的個人隱私，並學會辨識網路上的資訊。健康的社群媒體使用習慣，能讓我們的數位生活更加充實。
paragraphs.py: Yīncǐ, zài shǐyòng shèqún méitǐ shí, wǒmen yīnggāi bǎochí lǐxìng de tàidù. Chúle xiǎngshòu shèjiāo de lèqù, yě yào zhùyì bǎohù zìjǐ de gèrén yǐnsī, bìng xuéhuì biànshí wǎng lù shàng de zīxùn. Jiànkāng de shèqún méitǐ shǐyòng xíguàn, néng ràng wǒmen de shùwèi shēnghuó gèngjiā chōngshí.
paragraphs.en: Therefore, when using social media, we should maintain a rational attitude. Besides enjoying the fun of socializing, we should also pay attention to protecting our personal privacy and learn to identify information online. Healthy social media usage habits can make our digital lives more fulfilling.

comprehension.question: 社群媒體的主要功能是什麼？
使用者可以透過什麼方式進行互動？
在使用社群媒體時，哪一項是很重要的？

quiz.question: 「上傳」照片到網路上的動作是：
當你喜歡某篇貼文時，你會：

scenarios.title: Digital Etiquette & Privacy
scenarios.description: Rules for group chats, managing notifications, and privacy settings.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 嘿，小美，我剛剛發現你退出了那個聚餐規畫群組，發生什麼事了？
dialogue.py: Hēi, Xiǎoměi, wǒ gānggāng fāxiàn nǐ tuìchūle nàge jùcān guīhuà qúnzǔ, fāshēng shénme shìle?
dialogue.en: Hey, Xiaomei, I just noticed you left that dinner planning group; what happened?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 喔，因為裡面的人一直傳無關的長輩圖和廣告，手機通知響個不停，很困擾。
dialogue.py: Ō, yīnwèi lǐmiàn de rén yīzhí chuán wúguān de zhǎngbèi tú hé guǎnggào, shǒujī tōngzhī xiǎng gè bù tíng, hěn kùnrǎo.
dialogue.en: Oh, because people in there kept sending irrelevant elders' memes and ads, and the phone notifications wouldn't stop ringing; it was very annoying.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我也覺得那些訊息很煩. 但你可以把群組設成靜音啊，這樣就不會一直被吵到了。
dialogue.py: Wǒ yě juédé nàxiē xùnxí hěn fán. Dàn nǐ kěyǐ bǎ qúnzǔ shè chéng jìngyīn a, zhèyàng jiù bù huì yīzhí bèi chǎo dàole.
dialogue.en: I find those messages annoying too. But you could have muted the group, so you wouldn't be constantly disturbed.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 也是啦. 但我覺得即便靜音，那些訊息還是很佔手機空間. 在群組裡傳太多無關的訊息真的很沒禮儀。
dialogue.py: Yěshì la. Dàn wǒ juédé jíbiàn jìngyīn, nàxiē xùnxí háishì hěn zhàn shǒujī kōngjiān. Zài qúnzǔ lǐ chuán tài duō wúguān de xùnxí zhēnde hěn méi lǐyí.
dialogue.en: True. But I feel that even if muted, those messages still take up phone space. Sending too many irrelevant messages in a group is really bad etiquette.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我完全同意. 如果每個人都這樣隨便亂傳，群組就失去原本溝通的功能了。
dialogue.py: Wǒ wánquán tóngyì. Rúguǒ měi gèrén dōu zhèyàng suíbiàn luàn chuán, qúnzǔ jiù shīqù yuánběn gōutōng de gōngnéngle.
dialogue.en: I completely agree. If everyone sends things randomly like that, the group loses its original communication function.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 所以以後加入新群組前，我會先問清楚群組的主旨，並且確認裡面的成員。
dialogue.py: Suǒyǐ yǐhòu jiārù xīn qúnzǔ qián, wǒ huì xiān wèn qīngchǔ qúnzǔ de zhǔzhǐ, bìngqiě quèrèn lǐmiàn de chéngyuán.
dialogue.en: So in the future, before joining a new group, I'll ask about its purpose and check the members.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 對了，那如果有人私訊問妳沒興趣的事，妳會怎麼回？
dialogue.py: Duìle, nà rúguǒ yǒurén sīxùn wèn nǐ méi xìngqù de shì, nǐ huì zěnme huí?
dialogue.en: By the way, if someone private messages you about something you're not interested in, how do you reply?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我會客氣地回覆說我目前沒需求. 直接已讀不回好像也有點不太禮貌。
dialogue.py: Wǒ huì kèqì dì huífù shuō wǒ mùqián méi xūqiú. Zhíjiē yǐ dú bù huí hǎoxiàng yě yǒudiǎn bù tài lǐmào.
dialogue.en: I'll reply politely saying I have no need for it right now. Leaving them on read seems a bit impolite.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 妳考慮得真周到. 網路上的互動確實也需要一些技巧。
dialogue.py: Nǐ kǎolǜ dé zhēn zhōudào. Wǎng lù shàng de hùdòng quèshí yě xūyào yīxiē jìqiǎo.
dialogue.en: You're very thoughtful. Online interactions indeed require some skills.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒錯，保持基本的尊重是最重要的. 這樣大家才能在數位世界裡愉快相處。
dialogue.py: Méicuò, bǎochí jīběn de zūnzhòng shì zuì zhòngyào de. Zhèyàng dàjiā cáinéng zài shùwèi shìjiè lǐ yúkuài xiāngchǔ.
dialogue.en: Exactly, maintaining basic respect is most important. That way, everyone can get along happily in the digital world.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 嘿，大衛，剛才有人在臉書的一張照片上標記了你，你有看到通知嗎？
dialogue.py: Hēi, Dàwèi, gāngcái yǒurén zài Liǎanshū de yī zhāng zhàopiàn shàng biāojìle nǐ, nǐ yǒu kàn dào tōngzhī ma?
dialogue.en: Hey, David, someone just tagged you in a photo on Facebook; did you see the notification?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我還沒看到耶，因為我的隱私設定設為「所有標記都必須經過我審核同意」。
dialogue.py: Wǒ hái méi kàndào yé, yīnwèi wǒ de yǐnsī shèdìng shè wéi 『suǒyǒu biāojì dōu bìxū jīngguò wǒ shěnhé tóngyì』.
dialogue.en: I haven't seen it yet because my privacy settings are set to 'All tags must be reviewed and approved by me'.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 哇，妳的防範意識很強喔. 不過這樣確實比較安全，可以避免一些尷尬的照片被公開。
dialogue.py: Wa, nǐ de fángfàn yìshí hěn qiáng ō. Bùguò zhèyàng quèshí bǐjiào ānquán, kěyǐ bìmiǎn yīxiē gāngà de zhàopiàn bèi gōngkāi.
dialogue.en: Wow, your awareness of prevention is very strong. But that is indeed safer and can prevent some embarrassing photos from being made public.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 對啊，現在網路上有很多不認識的人會亂標記，甚至是傳送詐騙或騷擾訊息。
dialogue.py: Duì a, xiànzài wǎng lù shàng yǒu hěnduō bù rènshì de rén huì luàn biāojì, shènzhì shì chuánsòng zhàpiàn huò sāorǎo xùnxí.
dialogue.en: Yes, there are many strangers online who tag randomly, or even send scams or harassing messages.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 妳說得對. 那我應該也要去檢查一下我的帳號設定. 除了標記，還有什麼要注意的？
dialogue.py: Nǐ shuō dé duì. Nà wǒ yīnggāi yě yào qù jiǎnchá yīxià wǒ de zhànghào shèdìng. Chúle biāojì, hái yǒu shé me yào zhùyì de?
dialogue.en: You're right. I should probably go check my account settings too. Besides tagging, what else should I watch out for?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我建議關閉「位置分享」功能，並把個人資料設為只有好友才能看見。
dialogue.py: Wǒ jiànyì guānbì 『wèizhì fēnxiǎng』 gōngnéng, bìng bǎ gèrén zīliào shè wéi zhǐyǒu hǎoyǒu cáinéng kànjiàn.
dialogue.en: I suggest turning off the 'location sharing' function and setting your personal information so only friends can see it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這些我都沒設過. 我一直以為預設的設定就很安全了。
dialogue.py: Zhèxiē wǒ dōu méi shèguò. Wǒ yīzhí yǐwéi yùshè de shèdìng jiù hěn ānquán le.
dialogue.en: I've never set any of those. I always thought the default settings were safe enough.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 千萬別大意. 現在個人資料外洩的案例非常多. 如果收到不明連結，也千萬不要點開。
dialogue.py: Qiān wàn bié dàyì. Xiànzài gèrén zīliào wàixiè de ànlì fēicháng duō. Rúguǒ shōudào bùmíng liánjié, yě qiān wàn bùyào diǎn kāi.
dialogue.en: Don't be careless. There are many cases of personal data leakage now. If you receive an unknown link, whatever you do, don't click it open.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我記住了. 保護自己的數位隱私真的很重要. 謝謝妳的建議！
dialogue.py: Wǒ jì zhùle. Bǎohù zìjǐ de shùwèi yǐnsī zhēnde hěn zhòngyào. Xièxiè nǐ de jiànyì!
dialogue.en: I've got it. Protecting one's digital privacy is really important. Thanks for your advice!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不客氣. 防人之心不可無，我們在網路上還是要謹慎一點比較好。
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì. Fáng rén zhī xīn bùkě wú, wǒmen zài wǎng lù shàng háishì yào jǐnshèn yīdiǎn bǐjiào hǎo.
dialogue.en: You're welcome. One should always be on guard; it's better for us to be a bit cautious online.

usefulSentences.q: 我可以把你加入群組嗎？
usefulSentences.a: 請先告訴我這個群組的目的。
usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ kěyǐ bǎ nǐ jiārù qúnzǔ ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Qǐng xiān gàosù wǒ zhège qúnzǔ de mùdì.
usefulSentences.en_q: Can I add you to the group?
usefulSentences.en_a: Please tell me the purpose of this group first.

usefulSentences.q: 你的隱私設定是怎麼設的？
usefulSentences.a: 我設成只有好友可以看到我的貼文。
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ de yǐnsī shèdìng shì zěnme shè de?
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ shè chéng zhǐyǒu hǎoyǒu kěyǐ kàndào wǒ de tiēwén.
usefulSentences.en_q: How are your privacy settings configured?
usefulSentences.en_a: I set it so only friends can see my posts.

usefulSentences.q: 我不喜歡被標記在照片裡。
usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ bù xǐhuān bèi biāojì zài zhàopiàn lǐ.
usefulSentences.py_a: Bàoqiàn, wǒ xià cì huì xiān wèn nǐ.
usefulSentences.en_q: I don't like being tagged in photos.
usefulSentences.en_a: Sorry, I'll ask you first next time.

usefulSentences.a: 點擊對方的頭像，然後選擇「封鎖」。
usefulSentences.py_q: Rúhé fēngsuǒ bù rènshì de rén?
usefulSentences.py_a: Diǎnjī duìfāng de tóuxiàng, ránhòu xuǎnzé 『fēngsuǒ』.
usefulSentences.en_q: How do I block someone I don't know?
usefulSentences.en_a: Click on their avatar, then select 'Block'.

usefulSentences.a: 看起來很可疑，千萬不要點連結。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhè zé xùnxí shì zhàpiàn ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Kàn qǐlái hěn kěyí, qiān wàn bùyào diǎn liánjié.
usefulSentences.en_q: Is this message a scam?
usefulSentences.en_a: It looks suspicious, whatever you do, don't click the link.

paragraphs.zh: 在數位時代，保護個人隱私變得前所未有的重要. 我們的個人資料，如電話、住址甚至是位置，都可能在不經意間洩漏。因此，定期檢查社群平台的隱私設定是必要的。
paragraphs.py: Zài shùwèi shídài, bǎohù gèrén yǐnsī biàndé qiánsuǒwèiyǒu de zhòngyào. Wǒmen de gèrén zīliào, rú diànhuà, zhùzhǐ shènzhì shì wèizhì, dōu kěnéng zài bùjīngyì jiān xièlòu. Yīncǐ, dìngqí jiǎnchá shèqún píngtái de yǐnsī shèdìng shì bìyào de.
paragraphs.en: In the digital age, protecting personal privacy has become more important than ever. Our personal data, such as phone numbers, addresses, and even locations, can be leaked inadvertently. Therefore, it's necessary to regularly check the privacy settings of social platforms.

paragraphs.zh: 除了隱私設定，網路禮儀也是健康數位生活的一部分. 在群組聊天時，應避免傳送過多無意義的訊息，並尊重他人的時間。在轉發任何資訊前，應先確認其真實性，避免散布假新聞。
paragraphs.py: Chúle yǐnsī shèdìng, wǎng lù lǐyí yěshì jiànkāng shùwèi shēnghuó de yībùfèn. Zài qúnzǔ liáotiān shí, yīng bìmiǎn chuánsòng guòduō wú yìyì de xùnxí, bìng zūnzhòng tārén de shíjiān. Zài zhuǎnfā rènhé zīxùn qián, yīng xiān quèrèn qí zhēnshí xìng, bìmiǎn sànbù jiǎ xīnwén.
paragraphs.en: In addition to privacy settings, online etiquette is also part of a healthy digital life. When chatting in groups, you should avoid sending too many meaningless messages and respect other people's time. Before forwarding any information, you should confirm its authenticity to avoid spreading fake news.

paragraphs.zh: 最後，要警惕各種網路詐騙. 不要輕易點擊不明來源的連結，也不要隨便提供驗證碼給他人。提高警覺性並建立良好的數位素養，才能讓我們在網路世界中安全地享受便利。
paragraphs.py: Zuìhòu, yào jǐngtì gèzhǒng wǎng lù zhàpiàn. Bùyào qīngyì diǎnjī bùmíng láiyuán de liánjié, yě bùyào suíbiàn tígōng yànzhèngmǎ gěi tārén. Tígāo jǐngjué xìng bìng jiànlì liánghǎo de shùwèi sùyǎng, cáinéng ràng wǒmen zài wǎng lù shìjiè zhōng ānquán de xiǎngshòu biànlì.
paragraphs.en: Finally, be alert to various online scams. Don't easily click on links from unknown sources, and don't provide verification codes to others casually. Increasing alertness and building good digital literacy can allow us to enjoy convenience safely in the online world.

comprehension.question: 為什麼要定期檢查隱私設定？
options: 為了防止個人資料洩漏

comprehension.question: 在群組聊天時應注意什麼？
options: 避免無意義訊息並尊重他人時間

comprehension.question: 看到不明連結應該：

quiz.question: 當你被「標記」時，通常是指：
options: 有人在貼文或照片中提到你 (Tag)

title: Conversation Management
description: Managing the flow of conversation, clarifying points, and handling interruptions.

sentence.zh: 我想澄清一下剛才說的話。
sentence.py: Wǒ xiǎng chéngqīng yīxià gāngcái shuō de huà.
sentence.en: I want to clarify what I just said.

sentence.zh: 你能解釋一下這個詞的意思嗎？
sentence.py: Nǐ néng jiěshì yīxià zhège cí de yìsi ma?
sentence.en: Can you explain the meaning of this word?

sentence.zh: 你能說得具體一點嗎？
sentence.py: Nǐ néng shuō dé jùtǐ yīdiǎn ma?
sentence.en: Can you be more specific?

sentence.zh: 舉例來說，你可以用這個詞來形容天氣。
sentence.py: Jǔlì lái shuō, nǐ kěyǐ yòng zhège cí lái xíngróng tiānqì.
sentence.en: For example, you can use this word to describe the weather.

sentence.zh: 換句話說，我們必須重新開始。
sentence.py: Huàn jù huà shuō, wǒmen bìxū chóngxīn kāishǐ.
sentence.en: In other words, we have to start over.

sentence.zh: 簡單來說，這是一個誤會。
sentence.py: Jiǎndān lái shuō, zhè shì yīgè wùhuì.
sentence.en: To put it simply, this is a misunderstanding.

sentence.zh: 不好意思，這是一個誤會。
sentence.py: Bù hǎoyìsi, zhè shì yīgè wùhuì.
sentence.en: Sorry, this is a misunderstanding.

sentence.zh: 這段對話的重點是什麼？
sentence.py: Zhè duàn duìhuà de zhòngdiǎn shì shénme?
sentence.en: What is the key point of this conversation?

sentence.zh: 他在說話時經常有短暫的停頓。
sentence.py: Tā zài shuōhuà shí jīngcháng yǒu duǎnzàn de tíngdùn.
sentence.en: He often has brief pauses when speaking.

sentence.zh: 盡量減少在演講中使用贅字。
sentence.py: Jìnliàng jiǎnshǎo zài yǎnjiǎng zhōng shǐyòng zhuìzì.
sentence.en: Try to reduce the use of filler words in speeches.

sentence.zh: 他猶豫了一下才回答我的問題。
sentence.py: Tā yóuyùle yīxià cái huídá wǒ de wèní.
sentence.en: He hesitated for a moment before answering my question.

sentence.zh: 我想要那個... 叫什麼來著？
sentence.py: Wǒ xiǎng yào nàge... jiào shénme láizhe?
sentence.en: I want that... what was it called?

vocab.definition: that is to say / I mean

sentence.zh: 我的意思就是說，我們需要更多時間。
sentence.py: Wǒ de yìsi jiùshì shuō, wǒmen xūyào gèng duō shíjiān.
sentence.en: What I mean is, we need more time.

sentence.zh: 我先去超市，然後... 去圖書館。
sentence.py: Wǒ xiān qù chāoshì, ránhòu... qù túshūguǎn.
sentence.en: I'll go to the supermarket first, and then... the library.

sentence.zh: 其實，我也不太清楚具體情況。
sentence.py: Qíshí, wǒ yě bù tài qīngchǔ jùtǐ qíngkuàng.
sentence.en: Actually, I'm not quite sure of the specific situation either.

sentence.zh: 我們基本上已經達成共識了。
sentence.py: Wǒmen jīběn shàng yǐjīng dáchéng gòngshì le.
sentence.en: We have basically reached a consensus.

sentence.zh: 我對這個結果還不太確定。
sentence.py: Wǒ duì zhège jiéguǒ hái bù tài quèdìng.
sentence.en: I'm still a bit uncertain about this result.

sentence.zh: 明天可能會下雨。
sentence.py: Míngtiān kěnéng huì xià yǔ.
sentence.en: It might rain tomorrow.

sentence.zh: 他大概下午三點會到。
sentence.py: Tā dàgài xiàwǔ sān diǎn huì dào.
sentence.en: He will probably arrive around 3:00 PM.

sentence.zh: 也許我們應該換個方式試試。
sentence.py: Yěxǔ wǒmen yīnggāi huàn gè fāngshì shì shì.
sentence.en: Perhaps we should try a different way.

sentence.zh: 說不定他已經知道這件事了。
sentence.py: Shuōbudìng tā yǐjīng zhīdào zhè jiàn shì le.
sentence.en: Maybe he already knows about this.

vocab.definition: to hear of / rumor has it

sentence.zh: 我聽說這家餐廳很好吃。
sentence.py: Wǒ tīngshuō zhè jiā cāntīng hěn hǎochī.
sentence.en: I heard this restaurant is delicious.

sentence.zh: 他好像有點不舒服。
sentence.py: Tā hǎoxiàng yǒudiǎn bù shūfú.
sentence.en: He seems a bit unwell.

sentence.zh: 這個問題有點難，讓我想想。
sentence.py: Zhège wèntí yǒudiǎn nán, ràng wǒ xiǎng xiǎng.
sentence.en: This question is a bit hard, let me think.

vocab.definition: I'm not clear / I don't know

sentence.zh: 抱歉，關於細節我不清楚。
sentence.py: Bàoqiàn, guānyú xìjié wǒ bù qīngchǔ.
sentence.en: Sorry, I'm not clear about the details.

sentence.zh: 你能重複一遍剛才的問題嗎？
sentence.py: Nǐ néng chóngfù yībiàn gāngcái de wèntí ma?
sentence.en: Can you repeat the question just now?

sentence.zh: 我想確認一下明天的會議時間。
sentence.py: Wǒ xiǎng quèrèn yīxià míngtiān de huìyì shíjiān.
sentence.en: I want to confirm the meeting time for tomorrow.

sentence.zh: 請說得慢一點，我聽不太懂。
sentence.py: Qǐng shuō dé màn yīdiǎn, wǒ tīng bù tài dǒng.
sentence.en: Please speak slower, I don't quite understand.

sentence.zh: 不好意思，請再說一遍。
sentence.py: Bù hǎoyìsi, qǐng zài shuō yībiàn.
sentence.en: Sorry, please say it again.

sentence.zh: 你是說我們明天不用上班嗎？
sentence.py: Nǐ shì shuō wǒmen míngtiān bùyòng shàngbān ma?
sentence.en: Do you mean we don't have to work tomorrow?

sentence.zh: 原來如此，現在我懂了。
sentence.py: Yuánlái rúcǐ, xiànzài wǒ dǒngle.
sentence.en: I see, now I understand.

sentence.zh: 我們換個話題聊聊吧。
sentence.py: Wǒmen huàn gè huàtí liáo liáo ba.
sentence.en: Let's change the topic and chat.

sentence.zh: 對了，你有看到我的手機嗎？
sentence.py: Duìle, nǐ yǒu kàndào wǒ de shǒujī ma?
sentence.en: By the way, have you seen my phone?

sentence.zh: 說到這個，我正好想問你一件事。
sentence.py: Shuō dào zhège, wǒ zhènghǎo xiǎng wèn nǐ yī jiàn shì.
sentence.en: Speaking of which, I happen to want to ask you something.

sentence.zh: 話說回來，這也不是你的錯。
sentence.py: Huàshuō huílái, zhè yě bùshì nǐ de cuò.
sentence.en: Anyway, it's not your fault either.

sentence.zh: 他很快地切換了話題。
sentence.py: Tā hěn kuài de qiēhuànle huàtí.
sentence.en: He switched the topic very quickly.

sentence.zh: 這個故事的轉折非常出人意料。
sentence.py: Zhège gùshì de zhuǎnzhé fēicháng chūrényìliào.
sentence.en: The turn in this story is very unexpected.

sentence.zh: 總之，我們必須準時到達。
sentence.py: Zǒngzhī, wǒmen bìxū zhǔnshí dàodá.
sentence.en: In short, we must arrive on time.

sentence.zh: 剛才說到哪裡了？喔，對了。
sentence.py: Gāngcái shuō dào nǎlǐ le? Ō, duìle.
sentence.en: Where was I? Oh, right.

sentence.zh: 至於其他的細節，晚點再討論。
sentence.py: Zhìyú qítā de xìjié, wǎndiǎn zài tǎolùn.
sentence.en: As for the other details, we'll discuss them later.

sentence.zh: 這是一本關於溝通技巧的書。
sentence.py: Zhè shì yī běn guānyú gōutōng jìqiǎo de shū.
sentence.en: This is a book about communication skills.

sentence.zh: 我完全理解你的感受。
sentence.py: Wǒ wánquán lǐjiě nǐ de gǎnshòu.
sentence.en: I completely understand how you feel.

sentence.zh: 他的反應非常快。
sentence.py: Tā de fǎnyìng fēicháng kuài.
sentence.en: His reaction was very fast.

sentence.zh: 語言是文化交流的工具。
sentence.py: Yǔyán shì wénhuà jiāoliú de gōngjù.
sentence.en: Language is a tool for cultural exchange.

sentence.zh: 掌握一些對話技巧很有幫助。
sentence.py: Zhǎngwò yīxiē duìhuà jìqiǎo hěn yǒu bāngzhù.
sentence.en: Mastering some conversation skills is very helpful.

sentence.zh: 良好的溝通是成功的關鍵。
sentence.py: Liánghǎo de gōutōng shì chénggōng de guānjiàn.
sentence.en: Good communication is the key to success.

sentence.zh: 課堂上老師與學生的互動很多。
sentence.py: Kètáng shàng lǎoshī yǔ xuéshēng de hùdòng hěnduō.
sentence.en: There is a lot of interaction between teachers and students in class.

sentence.zh: 謝謝你提供的寶貴回饋。
sentence.py: Xièxiè nǐ tígōng de bǎoguì huíkuì.
sentence.en: Thank you for providing valuable feedback.

sentence.zh: 他的中文說得很流利。
sentence.py: Tā de zhōngwén shuō dé hěn liúlì.
sentence.en: He speaks Chinese fluently.

sentence.zh: 你的聽力進步了很多。
sentence.py: Nǐ de tīnglì jìnbùle hěnduō.
sentence.en: Your listening has improved a lot.

scenarios.title: Clarification
scenarios.description: How to ask for and provide clarification when meanings are unclear.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 抱歉，我剛才沒聽清楚，你說的那個詞是什麼意思？
dialogue.py: Bàoqiàn, wǒ gāngcái méi tīng qīngchǔ, nǐ shuō de nàge cí shì shénme yìsi?
dialogue.en: Sorry, I didn't hear clearly just now. What does that word you said mean?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 喔，你是說「隨便」嗎？在這裡它的意思是「都可以」，沒有特定的偏好。
dialogue.py: Ō, nǐ shì shuō 『suíbiàn』 ma? Zài zhèlǐ tā de yìsi shì 『dōu kěyǐ』, méiyǒu tèdìng de piānhào.
dialogue.en: Oh, do you mean 'suíbiàn'? Here it means 'anything is fine,' with no specific preference.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 原來如此。那如果我說「隨便你」，會不會很不禮貌？
dialogue.py: Yuánlái rúcǐ. Nà rúguǒ wǒ shuō 『suíbiàn nǐ』, huì bù huì hěn bù lǐmào?
dialogue.en: I see. Then if I say 'suíbiàn nǐ' (up to you), would it be very impolite?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 這取決於你的語氣。如果語氣很生硬，聽起來確實會像在敷衍。
dialogue.py: Zhè qǔjué yú nǐ de yǔqì. Rúguǒ yǔqì hěn shēngyìng, tīng qǐlái quèshí huì xiàng zài fūyǎn.
dialogue.en: It depends on your tone. If the tone is stiff, it indeed sounds like you're being dismissive.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我懂了。具體來說，在什麼場合使用比較安全呢？
dialogue.py: Wǒ dǒngle. Jùtǐ lái shuō, zài shénme chǎnghé shǐyòng bǐjiào ānquán ne?
dialogue.en: I understand. Specifically, in what situations is it safer to use?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 跟熟識的朋友一起決定午餐吃什麼時，用「我都隨便」就很自然。
dialogue.py: Gēn shúshì de péngyǒu yīqǐ juédìng wǔcān chī shénme shí, yòng 『wǒ dōu suíbiàn』 jiù hěn zìrán.
dialogue.en: When deciding what to have for lunch with close friends, using 'I'm fine with anything' is very natural.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝你的解釋。我剛才還以為「隨便」總是有負面的意思。
dialogue.py: Xièxiè nǐ de jiěshì. Wǒ gāngcái hái yǐwéi 『suíbiàn』 zǒng shì yǒu fùmiàn de yìsi.
dialogue.en: Thanks for your explanation. I thought 'suíbiàn' always had a negative meaning just now.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不會啦，這就是語言有趣的地方。換句話說，上下文非常重要。
dialogue.py: Bù huì la, zhè jiùshì yǔyán yǒuqù de dìfāng. Huàn jù huà shuō, shàngxiàwén fēicháng zhòngyào.
dialogue.en: Not at all, that's the interesting part of language. In other words, context is very important.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒錯，上下文確實決定了詞義的微小差別。
dialogue.py: Méicuò, shàngxiàwén quèshí juédìngle cíyì de wéixiǎo chābié.
dialogue.en: Exactly, context indeed determines the slight differences in word meaning.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 以後有任何不確定的地方，儘管問我就對了。
dialogue.py: Yǐhòu yǒu rènhé bù quèdìng de dìfāng, jǐnguǎn wèn wǒ jiù duìle.
dialogue.en: In the future, if there's anything you're uncertain about, just ask me.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你剛才提到的「放鴿子」是什麼意思？是指把鴿子放走嗎？
dialogue.py: Nǐ gāngcái tídào de 『fàng gēzi』 shì shénme yìsi? Shì zhǐ bǎ gēzi fàng zǒu ma?
dialogue.en: What does the 'fàng gēzi' (stand someone up) you just mentioned mean? Does it mean letting pigeons go?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 哈哈，不是啦。簡單來說，它的意思是「約好了卻沒出現」。
dialogue.py: Hāhā, bùshì la. Jiǎndān lái shuō, tā de yìsi shì 『yuē hǎole què méi chūxiàn』.
dialogue.en: Haha, no. To put it simply, it means 'making an appointment but not showing up'.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 喔！所以如果我約你，但我沒去，我就是「放你鴿子」嗎？
dialogue.py: Ō! Suǒyǐ rúguǒ wǒ yuē nǐ, dàn wǒ méi qù, wǒ jiùshì 『fàng nǐ gēzi』 ma?
dialogue.en: Oh! So if I make an appointment with you but don't go, I am 'standing you up'?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒錯。我再舉個例子，如果醫生臨時取消預約，也可以說醫生放我鴿子。
dialogue.py: Méicuò. Wǒ zài jǔ gè lìzi, rúguǒ yīshēng línshí qǔxiāo yùyuē, yě kěyǐ shuō yīshēng fàng wǒ gēzi.
dialogue.en: Exactly. Let me give another example: if the doctor cancels the appointment last minute, you can also say the doctor stood me up.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 原來如此。這是一個很生動的說法。
dialogue.py: Yuánlái rúcǐ. Zhè shì yīgè hěn shēngdòng de shuōfǎ.
dialogue.en: I see. This is a very vivid expression.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 對啊，中文裡有很多這類的慣用語。我想澄清一下，這通常是用在非正式場合。
dialogue.py: Duì a, Zhōngwén lǐ yǒu hěnduō zhè lèi de guànyòngyǔ. Wǒ xiǎng chéngqīng yīxià, zhè tōngcháng shì yòng zài fēi zhèngshì chǎnghé.
dialogue.en: Yes, there are many idioms like this in Chinese. I want to clarify that this is usually used in informal situations.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那在正式場合，應該怎麼說比較好？
dialogue.py: Nà zài zhèngshì chǎnghé, yīnggāi zěnme shuō bǐjiào hǎo?
dialogue.en: Then in formal situations, how should I say it better?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 你可以說「失約」或者是「未如期赴約」。
dialogue.py: Nǐ kěyǐ shuō 『shīyuē』 huòzhě shì 『wèi rúqí fùyuē』.
dialogue.en: You can say 'shīyuē' (break an appointment) or 'failed to show up as scheduled'.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 聽起來正式多了。謝謝你的補充。
dialogue.py: Tīng qǐlái zhèngshì duōle. Xièxiè nǐ de bǔchōng.
dialogue.en: That sounds much more formal. Thanks for the supplement.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不客氣，希望這些解釋對你有幫助。
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì, xīwàng zhèxiē jiěshì duì nǐ yǒu bāngzhù.
dialogue.en: You're welcome, I hope these explanations are helpful to you.

usefulSentences.py_q: 『...』 shì shénme yìsi?
usefulSentences.py_a: Tā de yìsi shì...
usefulSentences.en_q: What does '...' mean?
usefulSentences.en_a: It means...

usefulSentences.q: 你能再解釋清楚一點嗎？
usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ néng zài jiěshì qīngchǔ yīdiǎn ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Méi wèntí, wǒ de yìsi shì...
usefulSentences.en_q: Can you explain a bit more clearly?
usefulSentences.en_a: No problem, what I mean is...

usefulSentences.py_q: Bàoqiàn, zhè shì yīgè wùhuì.
usefulSentences.py_a: Méiguānxì, wǒ lǐjiěle.
usefulSentences.en_q: Sorry, this is a misunderstanding.
usefulSentences.en_a: It's okay, I understand now.

usefulSentences.py_q: Jǔlì lái shuō, nǐ kěyǐ shuō...
usefulSentences.py_a: Ō, yuánlái kěyǐ zhèyàng yòng.
usefulSentences.en_q: For example, you can say...
usefulSentences.en_a: Oh, so it can be used like that.

usefulSentences.q: 換句話說，我們不用去了嗎？
usefulSentences.py_q: Huàn jù huà shuō, wǒmen bùyòng qùle ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Duì, huódòng qǔxiāole.
usefulSentences.en_q: In other words, we don't have to go?
usefulSentences.en_a: Correct, the activity is cancelled.

paragraphs.zh: 在學習新語言的過程中，難免會遇到聽不懂或理解錯誤的時候。這時，「澄清」就成了一項非常重要的社交技巧。主動詢問對方「這是什麼意思？」或是要求對方「能再解釋一下嗎？」不僅能避免誤會，也能展現你對對話的積極態度。
paragraphs.py: Zài xuéxí xīn yǔyán de guòchéng zhōng, nánmiǎn huì yù dào tīng bù dǒng huò lǐjiě cuòwù de shíhòu. Zhè shí, 『chéngqīng』 jiù chéngle yī xiàng fēicháng zhòngyào de shèjiāo jìqiǎo. Zhǔdòng xúnwèn duìfāng 『zhè shì shénme yìsi?』 huòshì yāoqiú duìfāng 『néng zài jiěshì yīxià ma?』 bùjǐn néng bìmiǎn wùhuì, yě néng zhǎnxiàn nǐ duì duìhuà de jījí tàidù.
paragraphs.en: In the process of learning a new language, it's inevitable to encounter moments when you don't understand or misunderstand. At these times, 'clarification' becomes a very important social skill. Taking the initiative to ask 'What does this mean?' or requesting 'Can you explain again?' not only avoids misunderstandings but also demonstrates your active attitude toward the conversation.

paragraphs.zh: 除了提問，提供澄清也是溝通的一部分。當你發現對方面露難色或猶豫不決時，可以試著用更簡單的詞彙或舉例來進行說明。例如，使用「簡單來說」或「換句話說」作為開頭，能幫助聽者快速掌握重點，讓對話更加順暢。
paragraphs.py: Chúle tíwèn, tígōng chéngqīng yěshì gōutōng de yībùfèn. Dāng nǐ fāxiàn duìfāng miàn lù nánsè huò yóuyù bùjué shí, kěyǐ shìzhe yòng gèng jiǎndān de cíhuì huò jǔlì lái jìnxíng shuōmíng. Lìrú, shǐyòng 『jiǎndān lái shuō』 huò 『huàn jù huà shuō』 zuòwéi kāitóu, néng bāngzhù tīngzhě kuàisù zhǎngwò zhòngdiǎn, ràng duìhuà gèngjiā shùnchàng.
paragraphs.en: In addition to asking questions, providing clarification is also part of communication. When you find the other person looks troubled or hesitant, you can try using simpler vocabulary or examples for explanation. For instance, using 'simply put' or 'in other words' as an opening can help the listener quickly grasp the key points and make the conversation smoother.

paragraphs.zh: 記住，有效的溝通不在於詞彙量的大小，而在於雙方是否真正理解彼此的意圖。不要害怕承認自己不懂，因為每一次的澄清都是一次學習的機會。透過不斷的互動與修正，你的語言能力將會不斷進步。
paragraphs.py: Jìzhù, yǒuxiào de gōutōng bù zàiyú cíhuì liàng de dàxiǎo, ér zàiyú shuāngfāng shìfǒu zhēnzhèng lǐjiě bǐcǐ de yìtú. Bùyào hàipà chéngrèn zìjǐ bù dǒng, yīnwèi měi yīcì de chéngqīng dōu shì yīcì xuéxí de jīhuì. Tòuguò bùduàn de hùdòng yǔ xiūzhèng, nǐ de yǔyán nénglì jiāng huì bùduàn jìnbù.
paragraphs.en: Remember, effective communication is not about the size of your vocabulary, but about whether both parties truly understand each other's intentions. Don't be afraid to admit you don't understand, because every clarification is a learning opportunity. Through constant interaction and correction, your language ability will continue to improve.

comprehension.question: 當聽不懂時，應該怎麼做？
提供澄清時可以使用哪些詞彙？
有效溝通的關鍵是什麼？
options: 雙方真正理解彼此意圖

quiz.question: 當你想請別人說得更具體時，可以說：
「換句話說」通常用於：
options: 用不同的方式再解釋一次

scenarios.title: Using Fillers
scenarios.description: Using common filler words to gain thinking time during a conversation.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你對明年的計畫有什麼想法？
dialogue.py: Nǐ duì míngnián de jìhuà yǒu shéme xiǎngfǎ?
dialogue.en: What are your thoughts on next year's plan?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 這個嘛... 讓我想想，我還沒考慮得很清楚。
dialogue.py: Zhège ma... ràng wǒ xiǎng xiǎng, wǒ hái méi kǎolǜ dé hěn qīngchǔ.
dialogue.en: Well... let me think, I haven't considered it very clearly yet.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒關係，不用急著回答。
dialogue.py: Méiguānxì, bùyòng jízhe huídá.
dialogue.en: It's okay, no need to rush to answer.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 就是說，明年的情況可能會有很多變數，然後... 我想先看看市場的反應。
dialogue.py: Jiùshì shuō, míngnián de qíngkuàng kěnéng huì yǒu hěnduō biànshù, ránhòu... wǒ xiǎng xiān kàn kàn shìchǎng de fǎnyìng.
dialogue.en: I mean, there might be many variables next year, and then... I want to see the market's reaction first.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 聽起來很有道理。你最擔心的部分是那個... 資金嗎？
dialogue.py: Tīng qǐlái hěn yǒu dàolǐ. Nǐ zuì dānxīn de bùfèn shì nàge... zījīn ma?
dialogue.en: Sounds very reasonable. Is the part you're most worried about that... capital?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 那個... 對，資金確實是一個大問題。其實，我們還在尋找新的投資者。
dialogue.py: Nàge... duì, zījīn quèshí shì yīgè dà wèntí. Qíshí, wǒmen hái zài xúnzhǎo xīn de tóuzī zhě.
dialogue.en: Um... yes, capital is indeed a big problem. Actually, we're still looking for new investors.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我懂了。如果是這樣，可能需要重新評估一下進度。
dialogue.py: Wǒ dǒngle. Rúguǒ shì zhèyàng, kěnéng xūyào chóngxīn pínggū yīxià jìndù.
dialogue.en: I understand. If that's the case, we might need to re-evaluate the progress.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 基本上是這樣沒錯。我正在準備相關的報告。
dialogue.py: Jīběn shàng shì zhèyàng méicuò. Wǒ zhèngzài zhǔnbèi xiāngguān de bàogào.
dialogue.en: Basically, that's correct. I'm preparing the relevant report.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 加油！如果有需要幫忙的地方再跟我說。
dialogue.py: Jiāyóu! Rúguǒ yǒu xūyào bāngmáng de dìfāng zài gēn wǒ shuō.
dialogue.en: Good luck! Let me know if you need any help.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，謝謝妳。那個... 真的非常感謝妳的體諒。
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, xièxiè nǐ. Nàge... zhēnde fēicháng gǎnxiè nǐ de tǐliàng.
dialogue.en: Okay, thank you. Um... I really appreciate your understanding.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你覺得這部電影怎麼樣？
dialogue.py: Nǐ juédé zhè bù diànyǐng zěnmeyàng?
dialogue.en: What did you think of this movie?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 嗯... 其實我覺得劇情有點普通，但特效真的很棒。
dialogue.py: En... qíshí wǒ juédé jùqíng yǒudiǎn pǔtōng, dàn tèxiào zhēnde hěn bàng.
dialogue.en: Hmm... actually I thought the plot was a bit ordinary, but the special effects were really great.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我也覺得特效很壯觀。然後... 演員的表現也不錯。
dialogue.py: Wǒ yě juédé tèxiào hěn zhuàngguān. Ránhòu... yǎnyuán de biǎoxiàn yě bùcuò.
dialogue.en: I also thought the effects were spectacular. And then... the actors' performances were good too.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 就是說啊，特別是主角，演得很自然。那個... 他以前是不是演過其他的動作片？
dialogue.py: Jiùshì shuō a, tèbié shì zhǔjiǎo, yǎn dé hěn zìrán. Nàge... tā yǐqián shì bùshì yǎnguò qítā de dòngzuò piàn?
dialogue.en: Exactly, especially the lead; the acting was very natural. Um... has he acted in other action movies before?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 對，他好像演過《玩命快遞》。然後，他的身手一直都很好。
dialogue.py: Duì, tā hǎoxiàng yǎnguò 『Wánmìng Kuàidì』. Ránhòu, tā de shēnshǒu yīzhí dōu hěn hǎo.
dialogue.en: Yes, he seems to have acted in 'The Transporter.' And, his skills have always been good.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 原來如此。那個... 我們等一下要不要去吃那家新開的拉麵？
dialogue.py: Yuánlái rúcǐ. Nàge... wǒmen děng yīxià yào bùyào qù chī nà jiā xīn kāi de lāmiàn?
dialogue.en: I see. Um... should we go eat at that newly opened ramen shop in a bit?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這個嘛... 我今天可能不行，因為晚上還有事。
dialogue.py: Zhège ma... wǒ jīntiān kěnéng bùxíng, yīnwèi wǎnshàng hái yǒushì.
dialogue.en: Well... I might not be able to today because I still have things to do in the evening.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 喔，沒關係，那我們改天再去吧。
dialogue.py: Ō, méiguānxì, nà wǒmen gǎitiān zài qù ba.
dialogue.en: Oh, no problem, let's go another day then.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好啊，下次再約。對了，那家店聽說排隊要排很久。
dialogue.py: Hǎo a, xià cì zài yuē. Duìle, nà jiā diàn tīngshuō páiduì yào pái hěnjiǔ.
dialogue.en: Sure, let's reschedule for next time. By the way, I heard the queue for that shop is very long.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 真的嗎？那可能要早一點去。總之，我們再聯絡囉。
dialogue.py: Zhēnde ma? Nà kěnéng yào zǎo yīdiǎn qù. Zǒngzhī, wǒmen zài liánluò luo.
dialogue.en: Really? Then we might need to go earlier. Anyway, let's keep in touch.

usefulSentences.py_q: Zhège ma...
usefulSentences.py_a: Ràng wǒ xiǎng xiǎng gāi zěnme shuō.
usefulSentences.en_q: Well...
usefulSentences.en_a: Let me think how to put it.

usefulSentences.a: 我的意思是，這件事很難辦。
usefulSentences.py_q: Jiùshì shuō...
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ de yìsi shì, zhè jiàn shì hěn nán bàn.
usefulSentences.en_q: I mean...
usefulSentences.en_a: I mean, this matter is difficult to handle.

usefulSentences.py_q: Nàge...
usefulSentences.py_a: Qǐngwèn cèsuǒ zài nǎlǐ?
usefulSentences.en_q: Um...
usefulSentences.en_a: Excuse me, where is the toilet?

usefulSentences.py_q: Ránhòu...
usefulSentences.py_a: Ránhòu wǒmen jiù huíjiā le.
usefulSentences.en_q: And then...
usefulSentences.en_a: And then we went home.

usefulSentences.py_q: Qíshí...
usefulSentences.py_a: Qíshí wǒ yě méi qùguò nàlǐ.
usefulSentences.en_q: Actually...
usefulSentences.en_a: Actually, I haven't been there either.

paragraphs.zh: 在流利的對話中，適時地使用「贅字」或「發助詞」其實非常有幫助。雖然在正式的演講中建議減少使用，但在日常生活中，像是「那個」、「這個嘛」、「然後」等詞彙，能為講者爭取寶貴的思考時間。
paragraphs.py: Zài liúlì de duìhuà zhōng, shìshí de shǐyòng 『zhuìzì』 huò 『fā zhùcí』 qíshí fēicháng yǒu bāngzhù. Suīrán zài zhèngshì de yǎnjiǎng zhōng jiànyì jiǎnshǎo shǐyòng, dàn zài rìcháng shēnghuó zhōng, xiàng shì 『nàge』, 『zhège ma』, 『ránhòu』 děng cíhuì, néng wèi jiǎngzhě zhēngqǔ bǎoguì de sīkǎo shíjiān.
paragraphs.en: In fluent conversation, timely use of 'fillers' or 'particles' is actually very helpful. Although it's recommended to reduce their use in formal speeches, in daily life, words like 'nàge,' 'zhège ma,' and 'ránhòu' can gain precious thinking time for the speaker.

paragraphs.zh: 當你被問到一個沒預料到的問題時，與其陷入尷尬的沉默，不如先用「讓我想想」或「這個問題很有趣」來開頭。這些贅字就像是語言的潤滑劑，讓對話的節奏顯得更自然、不生硬。
paragraphs.py: Dāng nǐ bèi wèn dào yīgè méi yùliào dào de wèntí shí, yǔqí xiànrù gāngà de chénmò, bùrú xiān yòng 『ràng wǒ xiǎng xiǎng』 huò 『zhège wèntí hěn yǒuqù』 lái kāitóu. Zhèxiē zhuìzì jiù xiàng shì yǔyán de rùnhuájì, ràng duìhuà de jiézòu xiǎndé gèng zìrán, bù shēngyìng.
paragraphs.en: When asked an unexpected question, rather than falling into an awkward silence, it's better to start with 'let me think' or 'that's an interesting question.' These fillers are like linguistic lubricants, making the rhythm of the conversation seem more natural and not stiff.

paragraphs.zh: 然而，過度使用贅字也會讓聽者感到不耐煩，甚至顯得講者不夠自信。最好的方式是將它們視為過渡工具，在組織好語言後就迅速轉入正題。透過練習，你可以學會如何平衡停頓與贅字的使用，讓你的中文表達更加道地。
paragraphs.py: Rán'ér, guòdù shǐyòng zhuìzì yě huì ràng tīngzhě gǎndào bù nàifán, shènzhì xiǎndé jiǎngzhě bùgòu zìxìn. Zuì hǎo de fāngshì shì jiāng tāmen shì wéi guòdù gōngjù, zài zǔzhī hǎo yǔyán hòu jiù xùnsù zhuǎnrù zhèngtí. Tòuguò liànxí, nǐ kěyǐ xuéhuì rúhé pínghéng tíngdùn yǔ zhuìzì de shǐyòng, ràng nǐ de Zhōngwén biǎodá gèngjiā dàodì.
paragraphs.en: However, excessive use of fillers can also make the listener feel impatient or even make the speaker seem unconfident. The best way is to treat them as transitional tools and quickly move to the main topic after organizing your language. Through practice, you can learn how to balance pauses and the use of fillers, making your Chinese expression more authentic.

comprehension.question: 在日常對話中使用贅字有什麼好處？
文章中提到了哪些常見的贅字？
如果過度使用贅字會造成什麼影響？

quiz.question: 哪一個詞可以用來補充剛才沒說完的話？
當你想表示「基本上」時，你可以用：

scenarios.title: Expressing Uncertainty
scenarios.description: How to talk about things you are not 100% sure about without stopping the conversation.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你記得王老師的電話號碼嗎？
dialogue.py: Nǐ jìdé Wáng lǎoshī de diànhuà hàomǎ ma?
dialogue.en: Do you remember Teacher Wang's phone number?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我不太確定，好像是 0933 開頭的。
dialogue.py: Wǒ bù tài quèdìng, hǎoxiàng shì líng-jiǔ-sān-sān kāitóu de.
dialogue.en: I'm not quite sure; it seems to start with 0933.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那後面的數字呢？你有印象嗎？
dialogue.py: Nà hòumiàn de shùzì ne? Nǐ yǒu yìxiàng ma?
dialogue.en: What about the digits after that? Do you have any impression?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 讓我想想... 大概是 123456 吧，但我不清楚有沒有記錯。
dialogue.py: Ràng wǒ xiǎng xiǎng... dàgài shì yī-èr-sān-sì-wǔ-liù ba, dàn wǒ bù qīngchǔ yǒu méiyǒu jì cuò.
dialogue.en: Let me think... it's probably 123456, but I'm not clear if I remembered it wrong.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒關係，我等一下去辦公室確認一下。
dialogue.py: Méiguānxì, wǒ děng yīxià qù bàngōngshì quèrèn yīxià.
dialogue.en: It's okay, I'll go to the office to confirm in a bit.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 也許小明知道，他剛才好像有打給王老師。
dialogue.py: Yěxǔ Xiǎomíng zhīdào, tā gāngcái hǎoxiàng yǒu dǎ gěi Wáng lǎoshī.
dialogue.en: Perhaps Xiao Ming knows; he seemed to have called Teacher Wang just now.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 喔，對喔！說不定他已經把號碼存在手機裡了。
dialogue.py: Ō, duì ō! Shuōbudìng tā yǐjīng bǎ hàomǎ cún zài shǒujī lǐ le.
dialogue.en: Oh, right! Maybe he already saved the number in his phone.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 可能吧。妳可以去問問看。聽說王老師今天下午不在位子上。
dialogue.py: Kěnéng ba. Nǐ kěyǐ qù wèn wèn kàn. Tīngshuō Wáng lǎoshī jīntiān xiàwǔ bùzài wèizi shàng.
dialogue.en: Maybe. You can go ask. I heard Teacher Wang is not at his desk this afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那我也許明天再找他比較好。謝謝你的資訊。
dialogue.py: Nà wǒ yěxǔ míngtiān zài zhǎo tā bǐjiào hǎo. Xièxiè nǐ de zīxùn.
dialogue.en: Then perhaps it's better if I find him tomorrow. Thanks for the info.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 不客氣。希望你能順利找到他。
dialogue.py: Bù kèqì. Xīwàng nǐ néng shùnlì zhǎodào tā.
dialogue.en: You're welcome. I hope you can find him smoothly.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你覺得明天的聚會，大家都會到嗎？
dialogue.py: Nǐ juédé míngtiān de jùhuì, dàjiā dōu huì dào ma?
dialogue.en: Do you think everyone will show up for tomorrow's gathering?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 這很難說。看天氣預報好像會下大雨。
dialogue.py: Zhè hěn nán shuō. Kàn tiānqì yùbào hǎoxiàng huì xià dàyǔ.
dialogue.en: It's hard to say. Looking at the weather forecast, it seems like it will rain heavily.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 如果下雨，可能有些人就不想出門了。
dialogue.py: Rúguǒ xià yǔ, kěnéng yǒuxiē rén jiù bùxiǎng chūmén le.
dialogue.en: If it rains, maybe some people won't want to go out.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 對啊。尤其是住得比較遠的朋友，也許會臨時取消。
dialogue.py: Duì a. Yóuqí shì zhù dé bǐjiào yuǎn de péngyǒu, yěxǔ huì línshí qǔxiāo.
dialogue.en: Exactly. Especially friends who live further away; perhaps they'll cancel last minute.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 妳有收到大衛的回覆嗎？他要來嗎？
dialogue.py: Nǐ yǒu shōudào Dàwèi de huífù ma? Tā yào lái ma?
dialogue.en: Did you receive a reply from David? Is he coming?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 他不確定，他說公司明天可能要加班。說不定他要很晚才能到。
dialogue.py: Tā bù quèdìng, tā shuō gōngsī míngtiān kěnéng yào jiābān. Shuōbudìng tā yào hěn wǎn cáinéng dào.
dialogue.en: He's not sure; he said the company might require overtime tomorrow. Maybe he'll only arrive very late.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 聽起來明天的聚會變數很多。
dialogue.py: Tīng qǐlái míngtiān de jùhuì biànshù hěnduō.
dialogue.en: It sounds like there are many variables for tomorrow's gathering.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒錯。大概只有一半的人確定會到吧。
dialogue.py: Méicuò. Dàgài zhǐyǒu yībàn de rén quèdìng huì dào ba.
dialogue.en: Correct. Probably only half the people are confirmed to show up.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那我們要不要把餐廳預約的時間往後延？
dialogue.py: Nà wǒmen yào bùyào bǎ cāntǐng yùyuē de shíjiān wǎng hòu yán?
dialogue.en: Then should we postpone the restaurant reservation time?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 讓我想想... 暫時不用，我們先等今天晚上的最終確認。
dialogue.py: Ràng wǒ xiǎng xiǎng... zhànshí bùyòng, wǒmen xiān děng jīntiān wǎnshàng de zuìzhōng quèrèn.
dialogue.en: Let me think... not for now; let's wait for the final confirmation tonight first.

usefulSentences.a: 我幫你查一下再告訴你。
usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ bù tài quèdìng...
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ bāng nǐ chá yīxià zài gàosù nǐ.
usefulSentences.en_q: I'm not quite sure...
usefulSentences.en_a: Let me check for you and then tell you.

usefulSentences.a: 好像是這家店，但我也記不清楚了。
usefulSentences.py_q: Hǎoxiàng shì...
usefulSentences.py_a: Hǎoxiàng shì zhè jiā diàn, dàn wǒ yě jì bù qīngchǔ le.
usefulSentences.en_q: It seems to be...
usefulSentences.en_a: It seems to be this shop, but I don't remember clearly either.

usefulSentences.a: 大概要花兩小時才能完成。
usefulSentences.py_q: Dàgài...
usefulSentences.py_a: Dàgài yào huā liǎng xiǎoshí cáinéng wánchéng.
usefulSentences.en_q: Probably / Approximately...
usefulSentences.en_a: It probably takes two hours to complete.

usefulSentences.a: 希望如此，我覺得這很難。
usefulSentences.py_q: Yěxǔ duō kàn jǐ cì jiù dǒngle.
usefulSentences.py_a: Xīwàng rúcǐ, wǒ juédé zhè hěn nán.
usefulSentences.en_q: Perhaps you'll understand after watching it a few more times.
usefulSentences.en_a: I hope so; I think this is hard.

usefulSentences.a: 那我們趕快打電話問他。
usefulSentences.py_q: Shuōbudìng tā yǐjīng zǒule.
usefulSentences.py_a: Nà wǒmen gǎnkuài dǎ diànhuà wèn tā.
usefulSentences.en_q: Maybe he has already left.
usefulSentences.en_a: Then let's hurry and call to ask him.

reading.title: 如何得體地表達不確定

paragraphs.zh: 在對話中，我們不可能對所有事情都百分之百確定。學會如何表達「不確定性」，不僅能讓你的話聽起來更有餘地，也能避免因提供錯誤資訊而造成的尷尬。這在中文裡通常透過一些程度副詞或助動詞來達成。
paragraphs.py: Zài duìhuà zhōng, wǒmen bù kěnéng duì suǒyǒu shìqíng dōu bǎifēnzhībǎi quèdìng. Xuéhuì rúhé biǎodá 『bù quèdìng xìng』, bùjǐn néng ràng nǐ de huà tīng qǐlái gèng yǒu yúdì, yě néng bìmiǎn yīn tígōng cuòwù zīxùn ér zàochéng de gāngà. Zhè zài Zhōngwén lǐ tōngcháng tòuguò yīxiē chéngdù fùcí huò zhùdòngcí lái dáchéng.
paragraphs.en: In conversation, it's impossible for us to be 100% sure about everything. Learning how to express 'uncertainty' not only makes your words sound more flexible but also avoids the embarrassment caused by providing incorrect information. This is usually achieved in Chinese through some degree adverbs or auxiliary verbs.

paragraphs.zh: 常用的詞彙包括「好像」、「大概」、「也許」和「說不定」。例如，當你不確定某人的行蹤時，可以說「他好像去圖書館了」。這樣的表達方式既傳達了你的猜測，也清楚地表明了這並非絕對的事實。
paragraphs.py: Chángyòng de cíhuì bāokuò 『hǎoxiàng』, 『dàgài』, 『yěxǔ』 hé 『shuōbudìng』. Lìrú, dāng nǐ bù quèdìng mǒu rén de xíngzōng shí, kěyǐ shuō 『tā hǎoxiàng qù túshūguǎn le』. Zhèyàng de biǎodá fāngshì jì chuándále nǐ de cāicè, yě qīngchǔ dì biǎomíngle zhè bìngfēi juéduì de shìshí.
paragraphs.en: Commonly used words include 'hǎoxiàng' (seems), 'dàgài' (probably), 'yěxǔ' (perhaps), and 'shuōbudìng' (maybe). For example, when you are unsure of someone's whereabouts, you can say 'He seems to have gone to the library.' This way of expression conveys your guess and also clearly indicates that it is not an absolute fact.

paragraphs.zh: 此外，當被問及意見或計畫時，使用「我不太確定」或「看情況」作為緩衝，能給自己爭取更多思考或確認的時間。在社交場合中，這種委婉的表達方式通常被認為是更有禮貌且負責任的表現。透過這些技巧，你可以更流暢地參與各種討論。
paragraphs.py: Cǐwài, dāng bèi wènjí yìjiàn huò jìhuà shí, shǐyòng 『wǒ bù tài quèdìng』 huò 『kàn qíngkuàng』 zuòwéi huǎnchōng, néng gěi zìjǐ zhēngqǔ gèng duō sīkǎo huò quèrèn de shíjiān. Zài shèjiāo chǎnghé zhōng, zhèzhǒng wěiwǎn de biǎodá fāngshì tōngcháng bèi rènwéi shì gèng yǒu lǐmào qiě fù zérèn de biǎoxiàn. Tòuguò zhèxiē jìqiǎo, nǐ kěyǐ gèng liúlì dì cānyù gèzhǒng tǎolùn.
paragraphs.en: In addition, when asked for opinions or plans, using 'I'm not quite sure' or 'it depends' as a buffer can gain you more time for thinking or confirmation. In social situations, this euphemistic way of expression is usually considered more polite and responsible. Through these skills, you can participate more fluently in various discussions.

comprehension.question: 為什麼要學會表達不確定性？
options: 為了讓話有餘地並避免尷尬

comprehension.question: 哪一個詞用來表達「好像」？
在社交場合中使用委婉的表達方式通常被認為：

quiz.question: 當你想說「大概」時，可以用：
「聽說」的意思是：
options: 從別人那裡聽來的資訊

scenarios.title: Repeating & Confirming
scenarios.description: Techniques to ensure you've understood correctly and to signal that you are following the conversation.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我們明天下午兩點在火車站門口集合，沒問題吧？
dialogue.py: Wǒmen míngtiān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn zài huǒchēzhàn ménkǒu jíhé, méi wèntí ba?
dialogue.en: We're meeting at the train station entrance at 2:00 PM tomorrow, no problem, right?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 確認一下，你是說「下午兩點」還「下午三點」？
dialogue.py: Quèrèn yīxià, nǐ shì shuō 『xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn』 hái 『xiàwǔ sān diǎn』?
dialogue.en: Let me confirm, did you say '2:00 PM' or '3:00 PM'?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 是下午兩點。因為火車兩點半就開了。
dialogue.py: Shì xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn. Yīnwèi huǒchē liǎng diǎn bàn jiù kāile.
dialogue.en: It's 2:00 PM. Because the train leaves at 2:30.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 喔，好。那我再重複一遍：明天下午兩點，火車站門口。
dialogue.py: Ō, hǎo. Nà wǒ zài chóngfù yībiàn: míngtiān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn, huǒchēzhàn ménkǒu.
dialogue.en: Oh, okay. Let me repeat it once more: 2:00 PM tomorrow, train station entrance.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒錯，就是這樣。記得要準時到喔。
dialogue.py: Méicuò, jiùshì zhèyàng. Jìdé yào zhǔnshí dào ō.
dialogue.en: Correct, exactly. Remember to be on time.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，我已經記在我的行事曆上了。
dialogue.py: Méi wèntí, wǒ yǐjīng jì zài wǒ de xíngshìlì shàng le.
dialogue.en: No problem, I've already noted it on my calendar.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 對了，那如果你沒看到我，記得打電話給我。
dialogue.py: Duìle, nà rúguǒ nǐ méi kàndào wǒ, jìdé dǎ diànhuà gěi wǒ.
dialogue.en: By the way, if you don't see me, remember to call me.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 你是說打你的手機號碼嗎？
dialogue.py: Nǐ shì shuō dǎ nǐ de shǒujī hàomǎ ma?
dialogue.en: You mean call your mobile number?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 是的。如果不見不散的話，我們就那裡見。
dialogue.py: Shì de. Rúguǒ bùjiàn bùsàn de huà, wǒmen jiù nàlǐ jiàn.
dialogue.en: Yes. If it's be there or be square, we'll see you there.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，明天見！
dialogue.py: Hǎo de, míngtiān jiàn!
dialogue.en: Okay, see you tomorrow!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 首先，先把這幾份文件印出來，然後送到經理辦公室。
dialogue.py: Shǒuxiān, xiān bǎ zhè jǐ fèn wénjiàn yìn chūlái, ránhòu sòng dào jīnglǐ bàngōngshì.
dialogue.en: First, print out these documents, and then deliver them to the manager's office.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 慢一點，請再說一遍。你是說「全部」都要印嗎？
dialogue.py: Màn yīdiǎn, qǐng zài shuō yībiàn. Nǐ shì shuō 『quánbù』 dōu yào yìn ma?
dialogue.en: Slower, please say it again. You mean 'all' of them need to be printed?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 不，只要印前三份就可以了。後面的是草稿。
dialogue.py: Bù, zhǐyào yìn qián sān fèn jiù kěyǐ le. Hòumiàn de shì cǎo'àn.
dialogue.en: No, just the first three copies. The ones after are drafts.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我懂了。那印好之後，要立刻送過去嗎？
dialogue.py: Wǒ dǒngle. Nà yìn hǎo zhīhòu, yào lìkè sòng guòqù ma?
dialogue.en: I understand. Once printed, should I deliver them immediately?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 對，經理急著要看。確認一下，你懂怎麼操作這台影印機吧？
dialogue.py: Duì, jīnglǐ jízhe yào kàn. Quèrèn yīxià, nǐ dǒng zěnme cāozuò zhè tái yǐngyìnjī ba?
dialogue.en: Yes, the manager is in a hurry to see them. Let me confirm, you know how to operate this photocopier, right?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我大概懂，就是先把紙放進去，然後按開始鈕，對吧？
dialogue.py: Wǒ dàgài dǒng, jiùshì xiān bǎ zhǐ fàng jìnqù, ránhòu àn kāishǐ niǔ, duì ba?
dialogue.en: I probably know; it's just putting the paper in and then pressing the start button, right?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 基本上是這樣，但別忘了設定印三份喔。
dialogue.py: Jīběn shàng shì zhèyàng, dàn bié wàngle shèdìng yìn sān fèn ō.
dialogue.en: Basically, yes, but don't forget to set it to print three copies.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 喔，妳是說每一份文件都要印三份嗎？
dialogue.py: Ō, nǐ shì shuō měi yī fèn wénjiàn dōu yào yìn sān fèn ma?
dialogue.en: Oh, you mean three copies of each document?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 沒錯。原來如此，我剛才可能沒說清楚。
dialogue.py: Méicuò. Yuánlái rúcǐ, wǒ gāngcái kěnéng méi shuō qīngchǔ.
dialogue.en: Exactly. I see, I might not have spoken clearly just now.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒關係，現在我完全理解了。我馬上就去辦。
dialogue.py: Méiguānxì, xiànzài wǒ wánquán lǐjiěle. Wǒ mǎshàng jiù qù bàn.
dialogue.en: It's okay, now I completely understand. I'll go do it right away.

usefulSentences.py_q: Quèrèn yīxià, nǐ shì shuō...
usefulSentences.py_a: Duì, wǒ de yìsi shì...
usefulSentences.en_q: Let me confirm, did you say...
usefulSentences.en_a: Yes, what I mean is...

usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒ chóngfù yībiàn nǐ de huà.
usefulSentences.py_a: Hǎo de, qǐng shuō.
usefulSentences.en_q: Let me repeat what you said.
usefulSentences.en_a: Okay, please go ahead.

usefulSentences.q: 請再說一遍，我剛才沒聽清楚。
usefulSentences.py_q: Qǐng zài shuō yībiàn, wǒ gāngcái méi tīng qīngchǔ.
usefulSentences.py_a: Méi wèntí, wǒ shuō de shì...
usefulSentences.en_q: Please say it again, I didn't hear clearly just now.
usefulSentences.en_a: No problem, what I said was...

usefulSentences.py_q: Nǐ shì shuō... ma?
usefulSentences.py_a: Méicuò, nǐ lǐjiě dé hěn zhèngquè.
usefulSentences.en_q: Are you saying...?
usefulSentences.en_a: Exactly, you understood correctly.

usefulSentences.q: 慢一點，這部分有點複雜。
usefulSentences.py_q: Màn yīdiǎn, zhè bùfèn yǒudiǎn fùzá.
usefulSentences.py_a: Hǎo, wǒ shuō màn yīdiǎn.
usefulSentences.en_q: Slower, this part is a bit complex.
usefulSentences.en_a: Okay, I'll speak slower.

paragraphs.zh: 在有效的溝通中，「重複」與「確認」是不可或缺的環節。這不僅能幫助聽者鞏固所接收到的資訊，也能讓講者知道自己的意思是否被正確理解。特別是在討論時間、地點或重要細節時，這些技巧能大幅降低出錯的風險。
paragraphs.py: Zài yǒuxiào de gōutōng zhōng, 『chóngfù』 yǔ 『quèrèn』 shì bùkě huòquē de huánjié. Zhè bùjǐn néng bāngzhù tīngzhě gǒnggù suǒ jiēshōu dào de zīxùn, yě néng ràng jiǎngzhě zhīdào zìjǐ de yìsi shìfǒu bèi zhèngquè lǐjiě. Tèbié shì zài tǎolùn shíjiān, dìdiǎn huò zhòngyào xìjié shí, zhèxiē jìqiǎo néng dàfú jiàngdī chūcuò de fēngxiǎn.
paragraphs.en: In effective communication, 'repeating' and 'confirming' are indispensable links. This not only helps the listener consolidate the information received but also lets the speaker know if their meaning has been correctly understood. Especially when discussing time, location, or important details, these skills can significantly reduce the risk of errors.

paragraphs.zh: 常用的確認句式包括「確認一下，你是說...嗎？」或是「我重複一遍你的話」。當你對某個細節不確定時，不要猶豫，立刻要求對方「慢一點」或「再說一遍」。這種主動的互動能建立起雙方的信任感，讓溝通變得更加高效。
paragraphs.py: Chángyòng de quèrèn jùshì bāokuò 『quèrèn yīxià, nǐ shì shuō... ma?』 huòzhě shì 『wǒ chóngfù yībiàn nǐ de huà』. Dāng nǐ duì mǒu gè xìjié bù quèdìng shí, bùyào yóuyù, lìkè yāoqiú duìfāng 『màn yīdiǎn』 huò 『zài shuō yībiàn』. Zhèzhǒng zhǔdòng de hùdòng néng jiànlì qǐ shuāngfāng de xìnrèn gǎn, ràng gōutōng biàndé gèngjiā gāoxiào.
paragraphs.en: Commonly used confirmation sentence patterns include 'Let me confirm, did you say...?' or 'I'll repeat what you said.' When you are unsure about a certain detail, don't hesitate; immediately request the other party to 'slow down' or 'say it again.' This active interaction can build mutual trust and make communication more efficient.

paragraphs.zh: 此外，重複對方的關鍵詞也能起到「我在聽」的訊號作用。例如，當對方說「我昨天去了阿里山」，你可以回覆「阿里山？風景漂亮嗎？」這種回饋式對話能鼓勵對方繼續分享，讓聊天的氣氛更加熱絡。透過這些技巧，你將成為一個更好的溝通者。
paragraphs.py: Cǐwài, chóngfù duìfāng de guānjiàncí yě néng qǐ dào 『wǒ zài tīng』 de xùnhào zuòyòng. Lìrú, dāng duìfāng shuō 『wǒ zuótiān qùle Ālǐshān』, nǐ kěyǐ huífù 『Ālǐshān? Fēngjǐng piàoliang ma?』 Zhèzhǒng huíkuì shì duìhuà néng gǔlì duìfāng jìxù fēnxiǎng, ràng liáotiān de qìfēn gèngjiā rèluò. Tòuguò zhèxiē jìqiǎo, nǐ jiāng chéngwéi yīgè gèng hǎo de gōutōng zhě.
paragraphs.en: In addition, repeating the other party's keywords can also serve as an 'I'm listening' signal. For example, when the other party says 'I went to Alishan yesterday,' you can reply 'Alishan? Was the scenery beautiful?' This feedback-style dialogue can encourage the other party to continue sharing and make the atmosphere of the chat more enthusiastic. Through these skills, you will become a better communicator.

comprehension.question: 「重複」與「確認」的主要作用是什麼？
options: 降低出錯風險並確保理解

comprehension.question: 當對細節不確定時，應該怎麼做？
options: 立刻要求對方慢一點或再說一遍

comprehension.question: 重複對方的關鍵詞有什麼好處？
options: 起到「我在聽」的訊號作用

quiz.question: 「我重複一遍你的話」的目的是：

scenarios.title: Topic Switching
scenarios.description: How to move the conversation to a new topic smoothly and politely.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這件事我們大概討論得差不多了。總之，就按計畫進行吧。
dialogue.py: Zhè jiàn shì wǒmen dàgài tǎolùn dé chàbùduō le. Zǒngzhī, jiù àn jìhuà jìnxíng ba.
dialogue.en: We've discussed this matter almost enough. In short, let's proceed according to the plan.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 同意。對了，說到計畫，你聽說下週的公司旅遊要改期了嗎？
dialogue.py: Tóngyì. Duìle, shuō dào jìhuà, nǐ tīngshuō xià zhōu de gōngsī lǚyóu yào gǎi qí le ma?
dialogue.en: Agreed. By the way, speaking of plans, did you hear that next week's company trip is going to be rescheduled?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 真的嗎？我都沒注意到。原本不是說要去花蓮嗎？
dialogue.py: Zhēnde ma? Wǒ dōu méi zhùyì dào. Yuánběn bùshì shuō yào qù Huālián ma?
dialogue.en: Really? I didn't notice at all. Wasn't it originally said to go to Hualien?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 原本是這樣，但好像因為飯店預約的問題，可能會改去宜蘭。
dialogue.py: Yuánběn shì zhèyàng, dàn hǎoxiàng yīnwèi fàndiàn yùyuē de wèntí, kěnéng huì gǎi qù Yílán.
dialogue.en: It was originally like that, but it seems that because of hotel reservation issues, it might be changed to Yilan.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 喔！說到宜蘭，我上個月才剛去那邊玩了一趟。
dialogue.py: Ō! Shuō dào Yílán, wǒ shàng gè yuè cái gāng qù nàbiān wánle yī tàng.
dialogue.en: Oh! Speaking of Yilan, I just went there for a trip last month.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 是喔？那邊風景漂亮嗎？有推薦的景點嗎？
dialogue.py: Shì ō? Nàbiān fēngjǐng piàoliang ma? Yǒu tuījiàn de jǐngdiǎn ma?
dialogue.en: Is that so? Was the scenery beautiful? Any recommended attractions?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 話說回來，宜蘭的海邊真的很棒。不過我們現在的話題好像跑遠了。
dialogue.py: Huàshuō huílái, Yílán de hǎibiān zhēnde hěn bàng. Bùguò wǒmen xiànzài de huàtí hǎoxiàng pǎo yuǎn le.
dialogue.en: Anyway, the beach in Yilan is really great. However, our topic seems to have drifted far now.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 哈哈，沒關係。我們換個話題，至於旅遊的事，等官方通知再說吧。
dialogue.py: Hāhā, méiguānxì. Wǒmen huàn gè huàtí, zhìyú lǚyóu de shì, děng guānfāng tōngzhī zàishuō ba.
dialogue.en: Haha, it's okay. Let's change the topic; as for the trip, let's wait for the official notification.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好啊。關於剛才提到的那個新專案，你有其他的看法嗎？
dialogue.py: Hǎo a. Guānyú gāngcái tídào de nàge xīn zhuānyè, nǐ yǒu qítā de kànfǎ ma?
dialogue.en: Sure. Regarding that new project mentioned just now, do you have other views?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 讓我想想... 其實我正想跟你討論這件事的細節。
dialogue.py: Ràng wǒ xiǎng xiǎng... qíshí wǒ zhèng xiǎng gēn nǐ tǎolùn zhè jiàn shì de xìjié.
dialogue.en: Let me think... actually, I was just about to discuss the details of this matter with you.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你為什麼還不結婚？你的家人不催你嗎？
dialogue.py: Nǐ wèishéme hái bù jiéhūn? Nǐ de jiārén bù cuī nǐ ma?
dialogue.en: Why aren't you married yet? Doesn't your family press you?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 這個嘛... 我覺得目前一個人的生活也挺好的。
dialogue.py: Zhège ma... wǒ juédé mùqián yīgè rén de shēnghuó yě tǐng hǎo de.
dialogue.en: Well... I think my life alone right now is also quite good.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 但年紀大了之後會很孤單喔。
dialogue.py: Dàn niánjì dàle zhīhòu huì hěn gūdān ō.
dialogue.en: But you'll be very lonely when you get older.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 或許吧。對了，說到年紀，妳上次提到的那本關於養生的書，看完了嗎？
dialogue.py: Huòxǔ ba. Duìle, shuō dào niánjì, nǐ shàng cì tídào de nà běn guānyú yǎngshēng de shū, kàn wánle ma?
dialogue.en: Perhaps. By the way, speaking of age, have you finished reading that book about health maintenance you mentioned last time?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 喔，那本書啊！我剛看完，裡面講了很多實用的技巧。
dialogue.py: Ō, nà běn shū a! Wǒ gāng kàn wán, lǐmiàn jiǎngle hěnduō shíyòng de jìqiǎo.
dialogue.en: Oh, that book! I just finished it; it mentions many practical tips.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 聽起來很不錯。那妳覺得哪一個技巧最有用？
dialogue.py: Tīng qǐlái hěn bùcuò. Nà nǐ juédé nǎ yīgè jìqiǎo zuì yǒuyòng?
dialogue.en: Sounds great. Which tip do you think is most useful?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我覺得早起喝一杯溫水最重要。我現在每天都這樣做。
dialogue.py: Wǒ juédé zǎoqǐ hē yī bēi wēnshuǐ zuì zhòngyào. Wǒ xiànzài měitiān dōu zhèyàng zuò.
dialogue.en: I think waking up early to drink a glass of warm water is most important. I do that every day now.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 原來如此，我也應該嘗試看看。話說回來，妳最近氣色真的變好了。
dialogue.py: Yuánlái rúcǐ, wǒ yě yīnggāi chángshì kàn kàn. Huàshuō huílái, nǐ zuìjìn qìsè zhēnde biàn hǎole.
dialogue.en: I see; I should try it too. Anyway, your complexion has really improved lately.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 真的嗎？謝謝妳的稱讚。我也覺得精神比較好。
dialogue.py: Zhēnde ma? Xièxiè nǐ de chēngzàn. Wǒ yě juédé jīngshén bǐjiào hǎo.
dialogue.en: Really? Thanks for the compliment. I also feel more energetic.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 那太好了。關於這本書，下次再跟我多分享一些心得吧。
dialogue.py: Nà tài hǎole. Guānyú zhè běn shū, xià cì zài gēn wǒ duō fēnxiǎng yīxiē xīndé ba.
dialogue.en: That's great. Regarding this book, share more insights with me next time.

usefulSentences.py_q: Duìle, shuō dào zhège...
usefulSentences.py_a: Wǒ zhènghǎo xiǎng wèn nǐ...
usefulSentences.en_q: By the way, speaking of which...
usefulSentences.en_a: I happen to want to ask you...

usefulSentences.py_q: Wǒmen huàn gè huàtí ba.
usefulSentences.py_a: Hǎo a, nǐ xiǎng liáo shénme?
usefulSentences.en_q: Let's change the topic.
usefulSentences.en_a: Sure, what do you want to chat about?

usefulSentences.py_q: Huàshuō huílái...
usefulSentences.py_a: Huàshuō huílái, nǐ zuìjìn máng ma?
usefulSentences.en_q: Anyway / Coming back to the point...
usefulSentences.en_a: Anyway, have you been busy lately?

usefulSentences.a: 至於這件事，我們改天再談。
usefulSentences.py_q: Zhìyú zhè jiàn shì...
usefulSentences.py_a: Zhìyú zhè jiàn shì, wǒmen gǎitiān zài tán.
usefulSentences.en_q: As for this matter...
usefulSentences.en_a: As for this matter, we'll talk another day.

usefulSentences.py_q: Guānyú nǐ gāngcái tídào de...
usefulSentences.py_a: Ō, nàge yǐjīng jiějué le.
usefulSentences.en_q: Regarding what you just mentioned...
usefulSentences.en_a: Oh, that has already been resolved.

paragraphs.zh: 在對話過程中，當一個話題已經討論得差不多，或是你想避開某些尷尬、不舒服的內容時，學會如何「切換話題」就顯得尤為重要。優雅的轉折能讓對話持續進行，而不會顯得突兀或失禮。
paragraphs.py: Zài duìhuà guòchéng zhōng, dāng yīgè huàtí yǐjīng tǎolùn dé chàbùduō, huòshì nǐ xiǎng bìkāi mǒu xiē gāngà, bù shūfú de nèiróng shí, xuéhuì rúhé 『qiēhuàn huàtí』 jiù xiǎndé yóuwéi zhòngyào. Yōuyǎ de zhuǎnzhé néng ràng duìhuà chíxù jìnxíng, ér bù huì xiǎndé tūwù huò shīlǐ.
paragraphs.en: In the course of a conversation, when a topic has been discussed almost enough, or you want to avoid some embarrassing or uncomfortable content, learning how to 'switch topics' becomes particularly important. An elegant transition can keep the conversation going without appearing abrupt or rude.

paragraphs.zh: 常用的轉折詞包括「對了」、「說到這個」和「話說回來」。例如，你可以利用對方提到的某個關鍵字作為橋樑，順勢帶入一個新的主題。這種方式被稱為「聯想式轉折」，能讓話題的切換聽起來非常自然。
paragraphs.py: Chángyòng de zhuǎnzhé cí bāokuò 『duìle』, 『shuō dào zhège』 hé 『huàshuō huílái』. Lìrú, nǐ kěyǐ lìyòng duìfāng tídào de mǒu gè guānjiànzì zuòwéi qiáoliáng, shùnshì dàirù yīgè xīn de zhǔtí. Zhèzhǒng fāngshì bèi chēng wéi 『liánxiǎng shì zhuǎnzhé』, néng ràng huàtí de qiēhuàn tīng qǐlái fēicháng zìrán.
paragraphs.en: Commonly used transition words include 'duìle' (by the way), 'shuō dào zhège' (speaking of which), and 'huàshuō huílái' (anyway). For example, you can use a certain keyword mentioned by the other party as a bridge to naturally introduce a new theme. This method is called 'associative transition' and can make the topic switch sound very natural.

paragraphs.zh: 如果對方問了一個讓你感到不自在的問題，你可以禮貌地簡短回答，然後立刻用「對了，說到這個，我正好想問你...」來轉移對方的注意力。這不僅保護了自己的隱私，也維持了社交禮儀。掌握這些技巧，能讓你在各種社交場合中遊刃有餘。
paragraphs.py: Rúguǒ duìfāng wènle yīgè ràng nǐ gǎndào bù zìzài de wèntí, nǐ kěyǐ lǐmào dì jiǎnduǎn huídá, ránhòu lìkè yòng 『duìle, shuō dào zhège, wǒ zhènghǎo xiǎng wèn nǐ...』 lái zhuǎnyí duìfāng de zhùyì lì. Zhè bùjǐn bǎohùle zìjǐ de yǐnsī, yě wéichíle shèjiāo lǐyí. Zhǎngwò zhèxiē jìqiǎo, néng ràng nǐ zài gèzhǒng shèjiāo chǎnghé zhōng yóurènyǒuyú.
paragraphs.en: If the other party asks a question that makes you feel uncomfortable, you can answer briefly and politely, and then immediately use 'By the way, speaking of which, I happen to want to ask you...' to divert their attention. This not only protects your own privacy but also maintains social etiquette. Mastering these skills can make you comfortable in various social situations.

comprehension.question: 切換話題的主要目的是什麼？
options: 讓對話持續進行或避開尷尬內容

comprehension.question: 哪一個詞可以用來作為切換話題的開頭？
什麼是「聯想式轉折」？
options: 利用關鍵字帶入新主題

options: 引起對方注意並切換話題
