options: 另一個相關但不同的事項

title: Health & Fitness
description: Exercise, yoga, health checks, and maintaining a balanced lifestyle.

sentence.zh: 我每天早上都會練習半小時的瑜珈。
sentence.py: wǒ měitiān zǎoshàng dūhuì liànxí bàn xiǎoshí de yújiā.
sentence.en: I practice yoga for half an hour every morning.

sentence.zh: 保持工作與生活的平衡非常重要。
sentence.py: bǎochí gōngzuò yǔ shēnghuó de pínghéng fēicháng zhòngyào.
sentence.en: Maintaining a balance between work and life is very important.

sentence.zh: 運動前一定要先做伸展運動。
sentence.py: yùndòng qián yīdìng yào xiān zuò shēnzhǎn yùndòng.
sentence.en: Be sure to do stretching exercises before working out.

sentence.zh: 舉重可以幫助增加肌肉量。
sentence.py: jǔzhòng kěyǐ bāngzhù zēngjiā jīròu liàng.
sentence.en: Lifting weights can help increase muscle mass.

sentence.zh: 適當的運動可以緩解心理壓力。
sentence.py: shìdàng de yùndòng kěyǐ huǎnjiě xīnlǐ yālì.
sentence.en: Proper exercise can relieve mental stress.

sentence.zh: 建議每年都去做一次身體檢查。
sentence.py: jiànyì měinián dōu qù zuò yīcì shēntǐ jiǎnchá.
sentence.en: It is recommended to have a physical examination every year.

sentence.zh: 一般的健康飲食應該包含多種蔬菜。
sentence.py: yībān de jiànkāng yǐnshí yīnggāi bāohán duōzhǒng shūcài.
sentence.en: A general healthy diet should include a variety of vegetables.

sentence.zh: 養成良好的生活習慣對健康有益。
sentence.py: yǎngchéng liánghǎo de shēnghuó xíguàn duì jiànkāng yǒuyì.
sentence.en: Developing good living habits is beneficial to health.

sentence.zh: 受傷後，他每週都去做物理治療。
sentence.py: shòushāng hòu, tā měizhōu dōu qù zuò wùlǐ zhìliáo.
sentence.en: After the injury, he goes to physical therapy every week.

sentence.zh: 他每天有固定的運動時間。
sentence.py: tā měitiān yǒu gùdìng de yùndòng shíjiān.
sentence.en: He has a fixed time for exercise every day.

sentence.zh: 我很享受在公園跑步的感覺。
sentence.py: wǒ hěn xiǎngshòu zài gōngyuán pǎobù de gǎnjué.
sentence.en: I really enjoy the feeling of running in the park.

sentence.zh: 在看醫生之前，請先填寫這張表格。
sentence.py: zài kàn yīshēng zhīqián, qǐng xiān tiánxiě zhèzhāng biǎogé.
sentence.en: Please fill out this form before seeing the doctor.

sentence.zh: 這間健身房提供多樣化的課程。
sentence.py: zhè jiān jiànshēnfáng tígōng duōyànghuà de kèchéng.
sentence.en: This gym provides a variety of courses.

sentence.zh: 請確認你的運動姿勢是否正確。
sentence.py: qǐng quèrèn nǐ de yùndòng zīshì shìfǒu zhèngquè.
sentence.en: Please confirm whether your exercise posture is correct.

sentence.zh: 訓練雖然辛苦，但結果是值得的。
sentence.py: xùnliàn suīrán xīnkǔ, dàn jiéguǒ shì zhídé de.
sentence.en: Although training is hard, the result is worth it.

sentence.zh: 每個人都應該對自己的健康負責。
sentence.py: měigèrén dōu yīnggāi duì zìjǐ de jiànkāng fùzé.
sentence.en: Everyone should be responsible for their own health.

sentence.zh: 保持身體健康是我們自己的責任。
sentence.py: bǎochí shēntǐ jiànkāng shì wǒmen zìjǐ de zérèn.
sentence.en: Keeping the body healthy is our own responsibility.

sentence.zh: 這道蔬菜湯的味道很清淡。
sentence.py: zhè dào shūcàitāng de wèidào hěn qīngdàn.
sentence.en: The taste of this vegetable soup is very light.

sentence.zh: 生病的時候最好吃得清淡一點。
sentence.py: shēngbìng de shíhòu zuìhǎo chī dé qīngdàn yīdiǎn.
sentence.en: When you are sick, it is best to eat light food.

sentence.zh: 因為過敏，我必須對海鮮忌口。
sentence.py: yīnwèi guòmǐn, wǒ bìxū duì hǎixiān jìkǒu.
sentence.en: Because of allergies, I have to avoid seafood.

sentence.zh: 他對這次體檢的結果感到很滿意。
sentence.py: tā duì zhècì tǐjiǎn de jiéguǒ gǎndào hěn mǎnyì.
sentence.en: He is very satisfied with the results of this physical examination.

sentence.zh: 運動後稍微休息一下會比較舒服。
sentence.py: yùndòng hòu shāowēi xiūxí yīxià huì bǐjiào shūfú.
sentence.en: It will be more comfortable to take a short rest after exercise.

sentence.zh: 芒果含有豐富的維他命 C。
sentence.py: mángguǒ hányǒu fēngfù de wéitāmìng C.
sentence.en: Mangoes are rich in Vitamin C.

sentence.zh: 雖然布丁很好吃，但糖分很高。
sentence.py: suīrán bùdīng hěn hǎochī, dàn tángfèn hěn gāo.
sentence.en: Although pudding is delicious, it is high in sugar.

sentence.zh: 啞鈴是鍛鍊肌肉的好工具。
sentence.py: yǎlíng shì duànliàn jīròu de hǎo gōngjù.
sentence.en: Dumbbells are a good tool for exercising muscles.

sentence.zh: 過多的脂肪對心臟健康不利。
sentence.py: guòduō de zhīfáng duì xīnzàng jiànkāng bùlì.
sentence.en: Too much fat is bad for heart health.

sentence.zh: 運動後補充蛋白質可以修復肌肉。
sentence.py: yùndòng hòu bǔchōng dànbáizhì kěyǐ xiūfù jīròu.
sentence.en: Supplementing protein after exercise can repair muscles.

sentence.zh: 他每天早上都會測量體重。
sentence.py: tā měitiān zǎoshàng dūhuì cèliáng tǐzhòng.
sentence.en: He measures his body weight every morning.

sentence.zh: 體檢時會測量身高與體重。
sentence.py: tǐjiǎn shí huì cèliáng shēngāo yǔ tǐzhòng.
sentence.en: Height and weight are measured during a physical exam.

sentence.zh: 這塊蛋糕的卡路里非常高。
sentence.py: zhè kuài dàngāo de kǎlùlǐ fēicháng gāo.
sentence.en: The calories in this piece of cake are very high.

sentence.zh: 有氧運動對燃燒脂肪很有幫助。
sentence.py: yǒuyǎng yùndòng duì ránshāo zhīfáng hěn yǒu bāngzhù.
sentence.en: Aerobic exercise is very helpful for burning fat.

sentence.zh: 長途跑步後，他感到非常疲勞。
sentence.py: chángtú pǎobù hòu, tā gǎndào fēicháng píláo.
sentence.en: After a long-distance run, he felt very tired.

sentence.zh: 充足的睡眠是身體恢復的關鍵。
sentence.py: chōngzú de shuìmián shì shēntǐ huīfù de guānjiàn.
sentence.en: Sufficient sleep is the key to body recovery.

sentence.zh: 為了健康，你應該避免熬夜。
sentence.py: wèile jiànkāng, nǐ yīnggāi bìmiǎn áoyè.
sentence.en: For the sake of your health, you should avoid staying up late.

sentence.zh: 每天運動讓他充滿了活力。
sentence.py: měitiān yùndòng ràng tā chōngmǎnle huólì.
sentence.en: Exercising every day fills him with vitality.

sentence.zh: 冥想可以幫助平靜心情。
sentence.py: míngxiǎng kěyǐ bāngzhù píngjìng xīnqíng.
sentence.en: Meditation can help calm the mind.

sentence.zh: 練習瑜珈可以增加身體的柔軟度。
sentence.py: liànxí yújiā kěyǐ zēngjiā shēntǐ de róuruǎndù.
sentence.en: Practicing yoga can increase body flexibility.

sentence.zh: 游泳是鍛鍊耐力的好方法。
sentence.py: yóuyǒng shì duànliàn nàilì de hǎo fāngfǎ.
sentence.en: Swimming is a good way to build endurance.

sentence.zh: 他的體能最近有明顯的提升。
sentence.py: tā de tǐnéng zuìjìn yǒu míngxiǎn de tíshēng.
sentence.en: His physical fitness has improved significantly recently.

sentence.zh: 在運動中保持規律的呼吸很重要。
sentence.py: zài yùndòng zhōng bǎochí guīlǜ de hūxī zhòngyào.
sentence.en: It is important to maintain regular breathing during exercise.

sentence.zh: 週末我喜歡去山裡放鬆心情。
sentence.py: zhōumò wǒ xǐhuān qù shānlǐ fàngsōng xīnqíng.
sentence.en: On weekends, I like to go to the mountains to relax.

sentence.zh: 運動需要長期的堅持才能看到成效。
sentence.py: yùndòng xūyào chángqí de jiānchí cáinéng kàndào chéngxiào.
sentence.en: Exercise requires long-term persistence to see results.

sentence.zh: 適度運動可以預防很多疾病。
sentence.py: shìdù yùndòng kěyǐ yùfáng hěnduō jíbìng.
sentence.en: Moderate exercise can prevent many diseases.

sentence.zh: 健康的飲食有助於增強免疫力。
sentence.py: jiànkāng de yǐnshí yǒu zhù yú zēngqiáng miǎnyìlì.
sentence.en: A healthy diet helps to strengthen immunity.

sentence.zh: 他每天早上都在河邊跑步。
sentence.py: tā měitiān zǎoshàng dōu zài hébiān pǎobù.
sentence.en: He runs by the river every morning.

sentence.zh: 夏天游泳是最好的運動之一。
sentence.py: xiàtiān yóuyǒng shì zuìhǎo de yùndòng zhīyī.
sentence.en: Swimming is one of the best exercises in summer.

sentence.zh: 他在健身房辦了一張會員卡。
sentence.py: tā zài jiànshēnfáng bànle yīzhāng huìyuán kǎ.
sentence.en: He got a membership card at the gym.

sentence.zh: 健康是人生最重要的財富。
sentence.py: jiànkāng shì rénshēng zuì zhòngyào de cáifù.
sentence.en: Health is the most important wealth in life.

sentence.zh: 多吃蔬菜對身體非常有幫助。
sentence.py: duō chī shūcài duì shēntǐ fēicháng yǒu bāngzhù.
sentence.en: Eating more vegetables is very helpful to the body.

sentence.zh: 每天都要喝充足的水。
sentence.py: měitiān dōu yào hē chōngzú de shuǐ.
sentence.en: Drink sufficient water every day.

scenarios.title: Morning Yoga Session
scenarios.description: Two friends discuss their morning yoga routine and its benefits for flexibility and balance.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你今天早上做瑜珈了嗎？
dialogue.py: nǐ jīntiān zǎoshàng zuò yújiā le ma?
dialogue.en: Did you do yoga this morning?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 做了，我每天都會練習半小時。
dialogue.py: zuòle, wǒ měitiān dūhuì liànxí bàn xiǎoshí.
dialogue.en: Yes, I practice for half an hour every day.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 感覺如何？
dialogue.py: gǎnjué rúhé?
dialogue.en: How do you feel?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 覺得身體更柔軟了，精神也很好。
dialogue.py: juédé shēntǐ gèng róuruǎn le, jīngshén yě hěnhǎo.
dialogue.en: I feel my body is more flexible and my spirit is great.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我最近也想開始練瑜珈，有什麼建議嗎？
dialogue.py: wǒ zuìjìn yě xiǎng kāishǐ liàn yújiā, yǒu shéme jiànyì ma?
dialogue.en: I've been wanting to start practicing yoga lately, any suggestions?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 你可以先從基本的伸展動作開始，不要給自己太大壓力。
dialogue.py: nǐ kěyǐ xiān cóng jīběn de shēnzhǎn dòngzuò kāishǐ, bùyào gěi zìjǐ tài dà yālì.
dialogue.en: You can start with basic stretching moves and don't put too much pressure on yourself.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 瑜珈真的能幫助保持平衡嗎？
dialogue.py: yújiā zhēnde néng bāngzhù bǎochí pínghéng ma?
dialogue.en: Can yoga really help maintain balance?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 當然，這對身心平衡很有幫助。只要堅持練習，你一定能看到成效。
dialogue.py: dāngrán, zhè duì shēnxīn pínghéng hěn yǒu bāngzhù. zhǐyào jiānchí liànxí, nǐ yīdìng néng kàndào chéngxiào.
dialogue.en: Of course, it's very helpful for physical and mental balance. As long as you persist, you will definitely see results.

quiz.question: B 每天練習多久的瑜珈？
根據對話，練習瑜珈有什麼好處？

scenarios.title: Annual Health Check-up
scenarios.description: Talking about the importance of regular physical examinations and filling out medical forms.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你去做年度檢查了嗎？
dialogue.py: nǐ qù zuò niándù jiǎnchá le ma?
dialogue.en: Did you go for your annual check-up?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我昨天剛去完，現在在等結果。
dialogue.py: wǒ zuótiān gāng qù wán, xiànzài zài děng jiéguǒ.
dialogue.en: I just went yesterday, now I'm waiting for the results.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 一切都順利嗎？
dialogue.py: yīqiè dōu shùnlì ma?
dialogue.en: Did everything go smoothly?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 還好，只是填寫了很多表格。
dialogue.py: háihǎo, zhǐshì tiánxiěle hěnduō biǎogé.
dialogue.en: It was okay, I just filled out a lot of forms.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我一般都不太喜歡去醫院，總覺得很麻煩。
dialogue.py: wǒ yībān dōu bù tài xǐhuān qù yīyuàn, zǒng juédé hěn máfan.
dialogue.en: I usually don't like going to hospitals, I always find it troublesome.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 為了預防疾病，定期檢查是必要的責任。
dialogue.py: wèi le yùfáng jíbìng, dìngqí jiǎnchá shì bìyào de zérèn.
dialogue.en: To prevent diseases, regular check-ups are a necessary responsibility.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你說得對。我也應該預約一下我的醫生了。
dialogue.py: nǐ shuō dé duì. wǒ yě yīnggāi yùyuē yīxià wǒ de yīshēng le.
dialogue.en: You're right. I should also make an appointment with my doctor.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 確認一下你的身高、體重和血壓，對自己也有好處。
dialogue.py: quèrèn yīxià nǐ de shēngāo, tǐzhòng hé xièyā, duì zìjǐ yě yǒu hǎochù.
dialogue.en: Checking your height, weight, and blood pressure is also good for you.

quiz.question: B 什麼時候去做了檢查？
根據 B 的說法，定期檢查的主要目的是什麼？

scenarios.title: Stress Management at Work
scenarios.description: Colleagues discuss ways to handle high stress levels and the importance of mental health.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你最近看起來壓力很大，還好嗎？
dialogue.py: nǐ zuìjìn kàn qǐlái yālì hěn dà, háihǎo ma?
dialogue.en: You look very stressed lately, are you okay?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 是有點辛苦，工作堆得像山一樣。
dialogue.py: shì yǒudiǎn xīnkǔ, gōngzuò duī dé xiàng shān yīyàng.
dialogue.en: It's a bit tough, work is piled up like a mountain.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 要不要試試冥想？
dialogue.py: yào bùyào shìshì míngxiǎng?
dialogue.en: Do you want to try meditation?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我有想過，但不知道怎麼開始。
dialogue.py: wǒ yǒu xiǎngguò, dàn bù zhīdào zěnme kāishǐ.
dialogue.en: I've thought about it, but I don't know how to start.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 每天只需要花五分鐘，稍微閉上眼專注呼吸就行了。
dialogue.py: měitiān zhǐ xūyào huā wǔ fēnzhōng, shāowēi bì shàng yǎn zhuānzhù hūxī jiù xíng le.
dialogue.en: You only need to spend five minutes a day, just close your eyes slightly and focus on your breathing.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 這真的能緩解壓力嗎？
dialogue.py: zhè zhēnde néng huǎnjiě yālì ma?
dialogue.en: Can this really relieve stress?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 對我很有用。放鬆心情後，工作效率反而更高。
dialogue.py: duì wǒ hěn yǒuyòng. fàngsōng xīnqíng hòu, gōngzuò xiàolǜ fǎn'ér gèng gāo.
dialogue.en: It works for me. After relaxing, work efficiency is actually higher.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 聽起來很棒，我今晚就回家試試看。
dialogue.py: tīng qǐlái hěn bàng, wǒ jīnwǎn jiù huíjiā shìshì kàn.
dialogue.en: Sounds great, I'll go home and try it tonight.

quiz.question: A 建議 B 試試看什麼？
冥想時應該專注於什麼？

scenarios.title: Planning a Fitness Routine
scenarios.description: Friends plan a regular exercise schedule focusing on muscle building and stamina.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我們一起去健身房好嗎？
dialogue.py: wǒmen yīqǐ qù jiànshēnfáng hǎo ma?
dialogue.en: Shall we go to the gym together?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好啊，我想增加一點肌肉。
dialogue.py: hǎo a, wǒ xiǎng zēngjiā yīdiǎn jīròu.
dialogue.en: Sure, I want to gain some muscle.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那我們先制定一個固定的計畫。
dialogue.py: nà wǒmen xiān zhìdìng yīgè gùdìng de jìhuà.
dialogue.en: Then let's first set a fixed plan.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，我也想提升一下體能。
dialogue.py: méi wèntí, wǒ yě xiǎng tíshēng yīxià tǐnéng.
dialogue.en: No problem, I also want to improve my physical fitness.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我們可以每週二和週四去，先做有氧，再練啞鈴。
dialogue.py: wǒmen kěyǐ měi zhōu èr hé zhōu sì qù, xiān zuò yǒuyǎng, zài liàn yǎlíng.
dialogue.en: We can go every Tuesday and Thursday, do cardio first, then dumbbells.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 啞鈴是很好的工具，對肌肉鍛鍊很有幫助。
dialogue.py: yǎlíng shì hěnhǎo de gōngjù, duì jīròu duànliàn hěn yǒu bāngzhù.
dialogue.en: Dumbbells are a great tool, very helpful for muscle training.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 只要我們能堅持下去，耐力一定會變好。
dialogue.py: zhǐyào wǒmen néng jiānchí xiàqù, nàilì yīdìng huì biàn hǎo.
dialogue.en: As long as we can persist, our endurance will definitely get better.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒錯，我們也要注意補充足夠的蛋白質。
dialogue.py: méicuò, wǒmen yě yào zhùyì bǔchōng zúgòu de dànbáizhì.
dialogue.en: Exactly, we should also pay attention to supplementing enough protein.

quiz.question: 他們計畫一週去幾次健身房？

scenarios.title: Healthy Eating Habits
scenarios.description: Discussing the benefits of a light diet and avoiding unhealthy snacks.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你最近吃得很清淡呢。
dialogue.py: nǐ zuìjìn chī dé qīngdàn ne.
dialogue.en: You've been eating very light lately.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 對啊，我想養成健康的飲食習慣。
dialogue.py: duì a, wǒ xiǎng yǎngchéng jiànkāng de yǐnshí xíguàn.
dialogue.en: Yes, I want to develop healthy eating habits.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 有什麼效果嗎？
dialogue.py: yǒu shéme xiàoguǒ ma?
dialogue.en: Are there any effects?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 覺得精神變好了，也沒那麼容易疲勞。
dialogue.py: juédé jīngshén biàn hǎo le, yě méi nàme róngyì píláo.
dialogue.en: I feel more energetic and not as easily fatigued.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我也想試試看，但我不喜歡吃太多蔬菜。
dialogue.py: wǒ yě xiǎng shìshì kàn, dàn wǒ bù xǐhuān chī tài duō shūcài.
dialogue.en: I want to try it too, but I don't like eating too many vegetables.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 你可以把蔬菜和芒果或者其他水果混合做成沙拉，味道很不錯。
dialogue.py: nǐ kěyǐ bǎ shūcài hé mángguǒ huòzhě qítā shuǐguǒ hùnhé zuò chéng shālā, wèidào hěn bùcuò.
dialogue.en: You can mix vegetables with mangoes or other fruits to make a salad, the taste is quite good.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 那布丁呢？我每天下午都要吃一個布丁。
dialogue.py: nà bùdīng ne? wǒ měitiān xiàwǔ dū yào chī yīgè bùdīng.
dialogue.en: What about pudding? I eat one every afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 布丁糖分太高了，最好要忌口。享受健康比享受甜點更重要。
dialogue.py: bùdīng tángfèn tài gāo le, zuìhǎo yào jì kǒu. xiǎngshòu jiànkāng bǐ xiǎngshòu tiándiǎn gèng zhòngyào.
dialogue.en: Pudding is too high in sugar, it's best to avoid it. Enjoying health is more important than enjoying desserts.

quiz.question: B 建議 A 怎麼吃蔬菜？
為什麼 B 建議對布丁忌口？

title: Work & Career
description: Professional communication, recruitment, meetings, and career development.

sentence.zh: 他在公司的財務部門工作。
sentence.py: tā zài gōngsī de cáiwù bùmén gōngzuò.
sentence.en: He works in the finance department of the company.

sentence.zh: 你的提議真的很棒，大家都支持。
sentence.py: nǐ de tíyì zhēnde hěn bàng, dàjiā dōu zhīchí.
sentence.en: Your proposal is really great; everyone supports it.

sentence.zh: 下班後我們有個同事聚會。
sentence.py: xiàbān hòu wǒmen yǒu gè tóngshì jùhuì.
sentence.en: We have a colleague gathering after work.

sentence.zh: 請隨時跟我保持聯繫。
sentence.py: qǐng suíshí gēn wǒ bǎochí liánxì.
sentence.en: Please keep in touch with me at any time.

sentence.zh: 現代辦公室需要穩定的網絡連接。
sentence.py: xiàndài bàngōngshì xūyào wěndìng de wǎngluò liánjiē.
sentence.en: Modern offices need stable internet connections.

sentence.zh: 這家通訊公司的服務非常可靠。
sentence.py: zhè jiā tōngxùn gōngsī de fúwù fēicháng kěkào.
sentence.en: This communication company's service is very reliable.

sentence.zh: 很抱歉，我今天開會遲到了。
sentence.py: hěn bàoqiàn, wǒ jīntiān kāihuì chídào le.
sentence.en: I'm very sorry; I was late for the meeting today.

sentence.zh: 希望你的新專案進展順利。
sentence.py: xīwàng nǐ de xīn zhuān'àn jìnzhǎn shùnlì.
sentence.en: I hope your new project progresses smoothly.

sentence.zh: 經理指派他負責這個任務。
sentence.py: jīnglǐ zhǐpài tā fùzé zhège rènwù.
sentence.en: The manager assigned him to be in charge of this task.

sentence.zh: 我們下午要去拜訪一位重要的客戶。
sentence.py: wǒmen xiàwǔ yào qù bàifǎng yīwèi zhòngyào de kèhù.
sentence.en: We are going to visit an important client this afternoon.

sentence.zh: 高科技產業的競爭非常激烈。
sentence.py: gāo kējì chǎnyè de jìngzhēng fēicháng jīliè.
sentence.en: Competition in the high-tech industry is very intense.

sentence.zh: 公司的各個部門都表現得很好。
sentence.py: gōngsī de gègè bùmén dōu biǎoxiàn dé hěnhǎo.
sentence.en: Every department of the company performed well.

sentence.zh: 我們需要明確未來的發展方向。
sentence.py: wǒmen xūyào míngquè wèilái de fǎzhǎn fāngxiàng.
sentence.en: We need to clarify our future development direction.

sentence.zh: 這間辦公室的工作氣氛很輕鬆。
sentence.py: zhè jiān bàngōngshì de gōngzuò qìfēn hěn qīngsōng.
sentence.en: The working atmosphere in this office is very relaxed.

sentence.zh: 請在你的座位上等候開會。
sentence.py: qǐng zài nǐ de zuòwèi shàng děnghòu kāihuì.
sentence.en: Please wait at your seat for the meeting.

sentence.zh: 他在這個城市工作了五年。
sentence.py: tā zài zhège chéngshì gōngzuòle wǔ nián.
sentence.en: He has worked in this city for five years.

sentence.zh: 公司決定投資新的生產線。
sentence.py: gōngsī juédìng tóuzī xīn de shēngchǎnxiàn.
sentence.en: The company decided to invest in a new production line.

sentence.zh: 謝謝你對我工作的支持。
sentence.py: xièxiè nǐ duì wǒ gōngzuò de zhīchí.
sentence.en: Thank you for your support of my work.

sentence.zh: 報告的內容寫得很清楚。
sentence.py: bàogào de nèiróng xiě dé hěn qīngchǔ.
sentence.en: The content of the report is written very clearly.

sentence.zh: 我們今天收到了很多國外訂單。
sentence.py: wǒmen jīntiān shōudào le hěnduō guówài dìngdān.
sentence.en: We received many foreign orders today.

sentence.zh: 客戶對產品質量的要求很高。
sentence.py: kèhù duì chǎnpǐn zhìliàng de yāoqiú hěn gāo.
sentence.en: The client has high requirements for product quality.

sentence.zh: 這張發票需要填寫統一編號。
sentence.py: zhè zhāng fāpiào xūyào tiánxiě tǒngyī biānhào.
sentence.en: This invoice needs to have a tax ID (unified business number).

sentence.zh: 請確認產品的編號是否正確。
sentence.py: qǐng quèrèn chǎnpǐn de biānhào shìfǒu zhèngquè.
sentence.en: Please confirm if the product number is correct.

sentence.zh: 你可以從公司官網下載最新的簡報。
sentence.py: nǐ kěyǐ cóng gōngsī guānwǎng xiàzài zuìxīn de jiǎnbào.
sentence.en: You can download the latest presentation from the company website.

sentence.zh: 經理在會議上誇獎了他的表現。
sentence.py: jīnglǐ zài huìyì shàng kuājiǎng le tā de biǎoxiàn.
sentence.en: The manager praised his performance in the meeting.

sentence.zh: 如果你達成目標，會有額外的獎金。
sentence.py: rúguǒ nǐ dáchéng mùbiāo, huì yǒu éwài de jiǎngjīn.
sentence.en: If you reach the target, there will be an additional bonus.

sentence.zh: 我們公司正在招聘新的工程師。
sentence.py: wǒmen gōngsī zhèngzài zhāopìn xīn de gōngchéngshī.
sentence.en: Our company is recruiting new engineers.

sentence.zh: 恭喜你被錄取為正職員工。
sentence.py: gōngxǐ nǐ bèi lùqǔ wéi zhèngzhí yuángōng.
sentence.en: Congratulations on being hired as a full-time employee.

sentence.zh: 我已經把資料寄到你的郵件信箱了。
sentence.py: wǒ yǐjīng bǎ zīliào jì dào nǐ de yóujiàn xìnxiāng le.
sentence.en: I have already sent the data to your email inbox.

sentence.zh: 他在行銷領域有豐富的經驗。
sentence.py: tā zài xíngxiāo lǐngyù yǒu fēngfù de jīngyàn.
sentence.en: He has extensive experience in the marketing field.

sentence.zh: 大學生常常在暑假期間去企業實習。
sentence.py: dàxuéshēng chángcháng zài shǔjià qījiān qù qǐyè shíxí.
sentence.en: University students often go for internships at enterprises during the summer vacation.

sentence.zh: 他對待工作的態度非常專業。
sentence.py: tā duìdài gōngzuò de tàidù fēicháng zhuānyè.
sentence.en: His attitude towards work is very professional.

sentence.zh: 這兩國之間的貿易往來非常頻繁。
sentence.py: zhè liǎng guó zhījiān de màoyì wǎnglái fēicháng pínfán.
sentence.en: Trade between these two countries is very frequent.

sentence.zh: 行銷策略對品牌推廣至關重要。
sentence.py: xíngxiāo cèlüè duì pǐnpái tuīguǎng zhìguān zhòngyào.
sentence.en: Marketing strategy is vital for brand promotion.

sentence.zh: 銷售團隊每個月都會開會討論目標。
sentence.py: xiāoshòu tuánduì měi gè yuè dūhuì kāihuì tǎolùn mùbiāo.
sentence.en: The sales team meets every month to discuss goals.

sentence.zh: 請確保你填寫的資料是正確的。
sentence.py: qǐng quèbǎo nǐ tiánxiě de zīliào shì zhèngquè de.
sentence.en: Please ensure the information you filled in is correct.

sentence.zh: 這是公司的內部文件，請勿外傳。
sentence.py: zhè shì gōngsī de nèibù wénjiàn, qǐng wù wàichuán.
sentence.en: This is an internal document; please do not circulate it externally.

sentence.zh: 大家都辛苦了，專案終於完成了。
sentence.py: dàjiā dōu xīnkǔ le, zhuān'àn zhōngyú wánchéng le.
sentence.en: Everyone worked hard; the project is finally finished.

sentence.zh: 你是誰負責接待這位貴賓的？
sentence.py: nǐ shì shuí fùzé jiēdài zhè wèi guìbīn de?
sentence.en: Who is responsible for receiving this VIP?

sentence.zh: 各個部門都需要協同合作。
sentence.py: gègè bùmén dōu xūyào xiétóng hézuò.
sentence.en: Every department needs to work together.

sentence.zh: 這個計畫的工作範圍很廣。
sentence.py: zhège jìhuà de gōngzuò fànwéi hěn guǎng.
sentence.en: The scope of work for this plan is very broad.

sentence.zh: 請在合同的最後一頁簽名。
sentence.py: qǐng zài hétóng de zuìhòu yī yè qiānmíng.
sentence.en: Please sign on the last page of the contract.

sentence.zh: 主管給了他的表現很高的肯定。
sentence.py: zhǔguǎn gěi le tā de biǎoxiàn hěn gāo de kěndìng.
sentence.en: The supervisor gave high affirmation to his performance.

sentence.zh: 薪水會直接匯入你的銀行帳戶。
sentence.py: xīnshuǐ huì zhíjiē huì rù nǐ de yínháng zhànghù.
sentence.en: The salary will be remitted directly into your bank account.

sentence.zh: 我們已經收到了客戶的匯款。
sentence.py: wǒmen yǐjīng shōudào le kèhù de huìkuǎn.
sentence.en: We have already received the client's remittance.

sentence.zh: 定期存款是一種穩定的投資方式。
sentence.py: dìngqí cúnkuǎn shì yīzhǒng wěndìng de tóuzī fāngshì.
sentence.en: Time deposits are a stable way to invest.

sentence.zh: 房租合同到期後，他選擇續約一年。
sentence.py: fángzū hétóng dàoqī hòu, tā xuǎnzé xùyuē yī nián.
sentence.en: After the rental contract expired, he chose to renew it for one year.

sentence.zh: 不同的國家使用不同的貨幣。
sentence.py: bùtóng de guójiā shǐyòng bùtóng de huòbì.
sentence.en: Different countries use different currencies.

sentence.zh: 請妥善保管你的電腦登入密碼。
sentence.py: qǐng tuǒshàn bǎoguǎn nǐ de diànnǎo dēngrù mìmǎ.
sentence.en: Please keep your computer login password safe.

sentence.zh: 應徵工作時，需要提供學歷證明。
sentence.py: yìngzhēng gōngzuò shí, xūyào tígōng xuélì zhèngmíng.
sentence.en: When applying for a job, you need to provide proof of education.

scenarios.title: Job Interview
scenarios.description: A candidate discusses their experience and recruitment process with an interviewer.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你好，我是來面試工程師職位的。
dialogue.py: nǐhǎo, wǒ shì lái miànshì gōngchéngshī zhíwèi de.
dialogue.en: Hello, I'm here to interview for the engineer position.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 你好，請坐。我們公司正在招聘有經驗的人才。
dialogue.py: nǐhǎo, qǐng zuò. wǒmen gōngsī zhèngzài zhāopìn yǒu jīngyàn de réncái.
dialogue.en: Hello, please take a seat. Our company is recruiting experienced talent.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我有五年的相關工作經驗。
dialogue.py: wǒ yǒu wǔ nián de xiāngguān gōngzuò jīngyàn.
dialogue.en: I have five years of relevant work experience.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 那很棒。你的表現對我們很重要。
dialogue.py: nà hěn bàng. nǐ de biǎoxiàn duì wǒmen hěn zhòngyào.
dialogue.en: That's great. Your performance is very important to us.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我已經在郵件裡發送了我的簡歷和學歷證明。
dialogue.py: wǒ yǐjīng zài yóujiàn lǐ fāsòngle wǒ de jiǎnlì hé xuélì zhèngmíng.
dialogue.en: I've already sent my resume and proof of education via email.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我們看過了。你的專業技能非常符合我們的要求。
dialogue.py: wǒmen kànguò le. nǐ de zhuānyè jìnéng fēicháng fúhé wǒmen de yāoqiú.
dialogue.en: We've seen it. Your professional skills match our requirements very well.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 謝謝誇獎。如果被錄取，我會負責好指派的任務。
dialogue.py: xièxiè kuājiǎng. rúguǒ bèi lùqǔ, wǒ huì fùzé hǎo zhǐpài de rènwù.
dialogue.en: Thank you for the praise. If hired, I'll take responsibility for the assigned tasks.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 很好。關於薪水和獎金，我們內部會再討論。
dialogue.py: hěnhǎo. guānyú xīnshuǐ hé jiǎngjīn, wǒmen nèibù huì zài tǎolùn.
dialogue.en: Good. Regarding salary and bonuses, we will discuss them internally.

quiz.question: A 應徵的是什麼職位？

scenarios.title: Meeting with a Client
scenarios.description: Discussing business trade and confirming order details with an important client.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 很高興能拜訪貴公司。
dialogue.py: hěn gāoxìng néng bàifǎng guì gōngsī.
dialogue.en: I'm very happy to visit your company.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 歡迎！我們一直想跟你們建立貿易聯繫。
dialogue.py: huānyíng! wǒmen yīzhí xiǎng gēn nǐmen jiànlì màoyì liánxì.
dialogue.en: Welcome! We've always wanted to establish trade links with you.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這次的訂單金額很大，我們需要仔細確認。
dialogue.py: zhècì de dìngdān jīné hěn dà, wǒmen xūyào zǐxì quèrèn.
dialogue.en: The amount of this order is quite large; we need to confirm carefully.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，正確的編號和數量非常重要。
dialogue.py: méi wèntí, zhèngquè de biānhào hé shùliàng fēicháng zhòngyào.
dialogue.en: No problem; accurate numbers and quantities are very important.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我們需要確認統一編號，以便開立發票。
dialogue.py: wǒmen xūyào quèrèn tǒngyī biānhào, yǐbiàn kāilì fāpiào.
dialogue.en: We need to confirm the tax ID (VAT number) to issue an invoice.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我等一下會把財務資料發到你的通訊軟體。
dialogue.py: wǒ děng yīxià huì bǎ cáiwù zīliào fā dào nǐ de tōngxùn ruǎntǐ.
dialogue.en: I'll send the financial data to your messaging app in a moment.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好的。關於匯款方式，我們可以續約後再談。
dialogue.py: hǎo de. guānyú huìkuǎn fāngshì, wǒmen kěyǐ xùyuē hòu zài tán.
dialogue.en: Okay. Regarding the remittance method, we can talk about it after renewing the contract.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒問題，希望一切順利。
dialogue.py: méi wèntí, xīwàng yīqiè shùnlì.
dialogue.en: No problem; I hope everything goes smoothly.

quiz.question: 為什麼 A 要拜訪 B 的公司？
開立發票需要什麼資訊？

scenarios.title: Department Team Building
scenarios.description: Colleagues enjoy a gathering and discuss the positive atmosphere in the office.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 今天的聚會真的很棒，大家的氣氛很輕鬆。
dialogue.py: jīntiān de jùhuì zhēnde hěn bàng, dàjiā de qìfēn hěn qīngsōng.
dialogue.en: Today's gathering is really great; everyone's atmosphere is very relaxed.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 是啊，這對團隊合作很有幫助。
dialogue.py: shì a, zhè duì tuánduì hézuò hěn yǒu bāngzhù.
dialogue.en: Yes, it's very helpful for teamwork.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 各個部門的同事都來了吧？
dialogue.py: gègè bùmén de tóngshì dōu lái le ba?
dialogue.en: Colleagues from every department came, right?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 差不多，連財務部和行銷部都派人參加了。
dialogue.py: chàbùduō, lián cáiwùbù hé xíngxiāobù dōu pài rén cānjiā le.
dialogue.en: Almost; even the finance and marketing departments sent people.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 在這個城市工作雖然辛苦，但有這樣的團隊很值得。
dialogue.py: zài zhège chéngshì gōngzuò suīrán xīnkǔ, dàn yǒu zhèyàng de tuánduì hěn zhídé.
dialogue.en: Although working in this city is hard, having a team like this is worth it.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒錯。經理也常說，肯定員工的努力是公司的責任。
dialogue.py: méicuò. jīnglǐ yě cháng shuō, kěndìng yuángōng de nǔlì shì gōngsī de zérèn.
dialogue.en: True. The manager also often says that affirming employees' efforts is the company's responsibility.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我們以後應該多辦這樣的聚會，增加聯繫。
dialogue.py: wǒmen yǐhòu yīnggāi duō bàn zhèyàng de jùhuì, zēngjiā liánxì.
dialogue.en: We should hold more gatherings like this in the future to increase connections.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 我支持你的提議。這對未來的發展方向很好。
dialogue.py: wǒ zhīchí nǐ de tíyì. zhè duì wèilái de fāzhǎn fāngxiàng hěnhǎo.
dialogue.en: I support your proposal. It's good for our future development direction.

quiz.question: 哪兩個部門派人參加了聚會？
B 認為聚會對什麼有幫助？

scenarios.title: Signing a Contract
scenarios.description: Discussing the details of a business contract and providing necessary signatures.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這份合同的內容我都看清楚了。
dialogue.py: zhè fèn hétóng de nèiróng wǒ dōu kàn qīngchǔ le.
dialogue.en: I've read the contents of this contract clearly.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 那請在最後一頁簽名。
dialogue.py: nà qǐng zài zuìhòu yī yè qiānmíng.
dialogue.en: Then please sign on the last page.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 工作範圍和支付方式都有寫在裡面嗎？
dialogue.py: gōngzuò fànwéi hé zhīfù fāngshì dōu yǒu xiě zài lǐmiàn ma?
dialogue.en: Are the scope of work and payment method all written in there?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 是的，就在第三頁，寫得很明確。
dialogue.py: shì de, jiù zài dì sān yè, xiě dé hěng míngquè.
dialogue.en: Yes, right on the third page; it's written very explicitly.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 抱歉，我想確認一下貨幣種類，是美金還是台幣？
dialogue.py: bàoqiàn, wǒ xiǎng quèrèn yīxià huòbì zhǒnglèi, shì měijīn háishì táibì?
dialogue.en: Sorry, I'd like to confirm the currency type—is it USD or TWD?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 是台幣。這對我們的內部財務處理比較方便。
dialogue.py: shì táibì. zhè duì wǒmen de nèibù cáiwù chǔlǐ bǐjiào fāngbiàn.
dialogue.en: It's TWD. This is more convenient for our internal financial processing.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 好的，我明白了。我已經簽好名了。
dialogue.py: hǎo de, wǒ míngbái le. wǒ yǐjīng qiān hǎo míng le.
dialogue.en: Okay, I understand. I've finished signing.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 謝謝。我會把掃描檔寄到你的電子郵件。
dialogue.py: xièxiè. wǒ huì bǎ sǎomiáo dàng jì dào nǐ de diànzǐ yóujiàn.
dialogue.en: Thank you. I'll send the scanned file to your email.

quiz.question: 合約中的支付方式是用哪種貨幣？
B 會把合約的什麼東西寄給 A？

scenarios.title: Online Communication
scenarios.description: Colleagues discuss using technology and software for remote communication.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你下載了最新的通訊軟體了嗎？
dialogue.py: nǐ xiàzài le zuìxīn de tōngxùn ruǎntǐ le ma?
dialogue.en: Have you downloaded the latest communication software?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 下載了，這個科技工具對遠端工作很有幫助。
dialogue.py: xiàzàile, zhège kējì gōngjù duì yuǎnduān gōngzuò hěn yǒu bāngzhù.
dialogue.en: Yes, I did. This technological tool is very helpful for remote work.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 你覺得網絡連接穩定嗎？
dialogue.py: nǐ juédé wǎngluò liánjiē wěndìng ma?
dialogue.en: Do you think the internet connection is stable?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 還可以，但一定要設一個複雜的密碼。
dialogue.py: hái kěyǐ, dàn yīdìng yào shè yīgè fùzá de mìmǎ.
dialogue.en: It's okay, but you must set a complex password.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 這對保障公司內部資料的安全非常重要。
dialogue.py: zhè duì bǎozhàng gōngsī nèibù zīliào de ānquán fēicháng zhòngyào.
dialogue.en: This is very important for protecting the security of the company's internal data.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 沒錯。你可以在帳戶設定裡修改密碼。
dialogue.py: méicuò. nǐ kěyǐ zài zhànghù shèdìng lǐ xiūgǎi mìmǎ.
dialogue.en: Exactly. You can change your password in the account settings.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.zh: 我等一下會測試一下語音通訊的功能。
dialogue.py: wǒ děng yīxià huì cèshì yīxià yǔyīn tōngxùn de gōngnéng.
dialogue.en: I'll test the voice communication function in a moment.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.zh: 好的，如果進展順利，我們下午就在線上開會。
dialogue.py: hǎo de, rúguǒ jìnzhǎn shùnlì, wǒmen xiàwǔ jiù zài xiànshàng kāihuì.
dialogue.en: Okay, if it goes smoothly, we'll have an online meeting this afternoon.

quiz.question: B 建議 A 設置什麼？
